papers.title: A Nonasymptotic Theory of Gain-Dependent Error Dynamics in Behavior Cloning
papers.abstract: Behavior cloning (BC) policies on position-controlled robots inherit the closed-loop response of the underlying PD controller, yet the nonasymptotic finite-horizon consequences of controller gains for BC failure remain open. We show that independent sub-Gaussian action errors propagate through the gain-dependent closed-loop dynamics to yield sub-Gaussian position errors whose proxy matrix $X_\infty(K)$ governs the failure tail. The probability of horizon-$T$ task failure factorizes into a gain-dependent amplification index $Γ_T(K)$ and the validation loss plus a generalization slack, so training loss alone cannot predict closed-loop performance. Under shape-preserving upper-bound structural assumptions, the proxy admits the scalar bound $X_\infty(K)\preceqΨ(K)\bar X$, with $Ψ(K)$ decomposed into label difficulty, injection strength, and contraction. This ranks the four canonical regimes with compliant-overdamped (CO) tightest, stiff-underdamped (SU) loosest, and the stiff-overdamped versus compliant-underdamped ordering system-dependent. For the canonical scalar second-order PD system, the closed-form continuous-time stationary variance $X_\infty^{\mathrm{c}}(α,β)=σ^2α/(2β)$ is strictly monotone in stiffness and damping over the entire stable orthant, covering both underdamped and overdamped regimes, and the exact zero-order-hold (ZOH) discretization inherits this monotonicity. The analysis gives a nonasymptotic finite-horizon extension of the gain-dependent error-attenuation explanation of Bronars et al.

analysis.tldr: 行为克隆中增益依赖误差动力学的非渐近理论，揭示了控制器增益对任务失败概率的影响。
analysis.research_motivation: 行为克隆策略在位置控制机器人中继承了PD控制器的闭环响应，但控制器增益对行为克隆失败的非渐近有限时域后果尚不明确，现有方法无法解释训练损失与闭环性能之间的差距。
analysis.problem: 建立行为克隆中增益依赖误差动力学的非渐近有限时域理论，量化控制器增益对任务失败概率的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，独立次高斯动作误差通过增益依赖的闭环动力学传播，产生次高斯位置误差，其代理矩阵X∞(K)控制失败尾部；任务失败概率分解为增益依赖的放大指数Γ_T(K)与验证损失加泛化松弛的乘积，因此训练损失单独无法预测闭环性能。
analysis.method: 提出非渐近有限时域理论框架，通过代理矩阵X∞(K)和放大指数Γ_T(K)量化增益依赖误差传播，并在形状保持上界假设下给出标量界Ψ(K)X̄，分解为标签难度、注入强度和收缩项。
contributions: 建立了行为克隆中增益依赖误差动力学的非渐近有限时域理论，揭示了任务失败概率的分解形式。
给出了四种典型增益区域的排序，并针对标量二阶PD系统推导了闭式稳态方差及其单调性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论主要针对位置控制机器人和PD控制器，可能不适用于其他控制架构。
形状保持上界假设可能在某些实际系统中不成立。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 行为克隆中增益依赖误差动力学的非渐近理论，揭示了控制器增益对任务失败概率的影响。

papers.title: Exascale Multi-Task Graph Foundation Models for Imbalanced, Multi-Fidelity Atomistic Data
papers.abstract: We present an exascale workflow for materials discovery using atomistic graph foundation models built on HydraGNN. We jointly train on 16 open first-principles datasets (544+ million structures covering 85+ elements) using a multi-task architecture with per-dataset heads and a scalable ADIOS2/DDStore data pipeline. On Frontier, we execute six large-scale DeepHyper hyperparameter optimization campaigns in FP64 and promote the top-performing message-passing models to sustained 2,048-node training, yielding a PaiNN-based lead model. The resulting model enables billion-scale screening, evaluating 1.1 billion atomistic structures in 50 seconds, compressing a workload that would require years of first-principles computation, and supports data-scarce fine-tuning across diverse downstream tasks. We quantify precision-performance tradeoffs (BF16/FP32/FP64), demonstrate transfer across twelve chemically diverse downstream tasks, and establish seamless strong- and weak-scaling across Frontier, Aurora, and Perlmutter. This work allows fast and reliable exploration of vast chemical design spaces that are otherwise inaccessible to first-principles methods.

analysis.tldr: 基于HydraGNN的千万亿次多任务图基础模型，实现大规模原子结构筛选与跨任务迁移。
analysis.research_motivation: 第一性原理方法计算成本极高，无法快速探索广阔的化学设计空间，亟需高效且可靠的替代方案。
analysis.problem: 如何利用大规模多保真度原子数据训练统一的图基础模型，实现亿级结构快速筛选并支持数据稀缺下游任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用HydraGNN构建多任务架构，每个数据集独立输出头，通过ADIOS2/DDStore数据管道在Frontier上执行大规模超参数优化，选出最优PaiNN模型并在2048节点上持续训练。
contributions: 提出千万亿次多任务图基础模型训练工作流，整合16个第一性原理数据集（5.44亿结构，85+元素）。
实现11亿原子结构50秒筛选，压缩原本需数年计算的任务，并支持跨12个化学下游任务的微调。
analysis.experiments: 在Frontier、Aurora、Perlmutter上验证强扩展性与弱扩展性，量化BF16/FP32/FP64精度-性能权衡，并在12个下游任务上展示迁移能力。
limitations: 模型依赖大规模计算资源，可能难以在普通集群复现。
多任务架构中不同数据集间的冲突或负迁移未深入讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于HydraGNN的千万亿次多任务图基础模型，实现大规模原子结构筛选与跨任务迁移。

papers.title: Seeing Through Circuits: Faithful Mechanistic Interpretability for Vision Transformers
papers.abstract: Transparency of neural networks' internal reasoning is at the heart of interpretability research, adding to trust, safety, and understanding of these models. The field of mechanistic interpretability has recently focused on studying task-specific computational graphs, defined by connections (edges) between model components. Such edge-based circuits have been defined in the context of large language models, yet vision-based approaches so far only consider neuron-based circuits. These tell which information is encoded, but not how it is routed through the complex wiring of a neural network. In this work, we investigate whether useful mechanistic circuits can be identified through computational graphs in vision transformers. We propose an effective method for Automatic Visual Circuit Discovery (Vi-CD) that recovers class-specific circuits for classification, identifies circuits underlying typographic attacks in CLIP, and discovers circuits that lend themselves for steering to correct harmful model behavior. Overall, we find that insightful and actionable edge-based circuits can be recovered from vision transformers, adding transparency to the internal computations of these models.

analysis.tldr: 提出自动视觉电路发现方法Vi-CD，在视觉Transformer中提取基于边的可解释电路，揭示信息路由机制。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉可解释性研究仅关注神经元级电路，无法揭示信息如何在网络复杂连接中传递，缺乏对模型内部推理透明度的理解。
analysis.problem: 如何在视觉Transformer中识别基于计算图（边）的机制性电路，以揭示信息路由过程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出自动视觉电路发现（Vi-CD）方法，通过计算图恢复类别特定电路，并用于分析对抗攻击和模型行为修正。
contributions: 首次在视觉Transformer中定义并提取基于边的机制性电路。
提出Vi-CD方法，可自动发现分类、对抗攻击和模型行为修正相关的电路。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 方法可能依赖特定模型架构，泛化性待验证。
电路发现的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自动视觉电路发现方法Vi-CD，在视觉Transformer中提取基于边的可解释电路，揭示信息路由机制。

papers.title: Evo-MedAgent: Beyond One-Shot Diagnosis with Agents That Remember, Reflect, and Improve
papers.abstract: Tool-augmented large language model (LLM) agents can orchestrate specialist classifiers, segmentation models, and visual question-answering modules to interpret chest X-rays. However, these agents still solve each case in isolation: they fail to accumulate experience across cases, correct recurrent reasoning mistakes, or adapt their tool-use behavior without expensive reinforcement learning. While a radiologist naturally improves with every case, current agents remain static. In this work, we propose Evo-MedAgent, a self-evolving memory module that equips a medical agent with the capacity for inter-case learning at test time. Our memory comprises three complementary stores: (1)~\emph{Retrospective Clinical Episodes} that retrieve problem-solving experiences from similar past cases, (2)~an \emph{Adaptive Procedural Heuristics} bank curating priority-tagged diagnostic rules that evolves via reflection, much like a physician refining their internal criteria, and (3)~a \emph{Tool Reliability Controller} that tracks per-tool trustworthiness. On ChestAgentBench, Evo-MedAgent raises multiple-choice question (MCQ) accuracy from 0.68 to 0.79 on GPT-5-mini, and from 0.76 to 0.87 on Gemini-3 Flash. With a strong base model, evolving memory improves performance more effectively than orchestrating external tools on qualitative diagnostic tasks. Because Evo-MedAgent requires no training, its per-case overhead is bounded by one additional retrieval pass and a single reflection call, making it deployable on top of any frozen model.

analysis.tldr: 提出Evo-MedAgent，通过记忆模块让医疗Agent在测试时跨病例学习，无需训练即可提升诊断准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有工具增强的LLM Agent在医学诊断中孤立处理每个病例，无法积累经验、纠正错误或适应工具使用行为，而放射科医生会随病例增多而进步，因此需要让Agent具备跨病例学习能力。
analysis.problem: 如何让医疗Agent在测试时无需昂贵强化学习即可实现跨病例的经验积累、错误反思和工具行为自适应。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Evo-MedAgent，包含三个互补记忆存储：回顾性临床案例（检索相似病例经验）、自适应程序启发式库（通过反思演化优先级标签的诊断规则）、工具可靠性控制器（追踪每个工具的信任度）。
contributions: 提出无需训练的自进化记忆模块，使医疗Agent在测试时实现跨病例学习。
在ChestAgentBench上，Evo-MedAgent将GPT-5-mini的MCQ准确率从0.68提升至0.79，Gemini-3 Flash从0.76提升至0.87。
analysis.experiments: 在ChestAgentBench上评估，使用GPT-5-mini和Gemini-3 Flash作为基础模型，报告了MCQ准确率提升。
limitations: 仅针对胸部X光片诊断，可能不直接适用于其他医学模态。
记忆模块的检索和反思调用可能引入额外延迟。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Evo-MedAgent，通过记忆模块让医疗Agent在测试时跨病例学习，无需训练即可提升诊断准确率。

papers.title: Response-Aware User Memory Selection for LLM Personalization
papers.abstract: A common approach to personalization in large language models (LLMs) is to incorporate a subset of the user memory into the prompt at inference time to guide the model's generation. Existing methods select these subsets primarily using similarity between user memory items and input queries, ignoring how features actually affect the model's response distribution. We propose Response-Utility optimization for Memory Selection (RUMS), a novel method that selects user memory items by measuring the mutual information between a subset of memory and the model's outputs, identifying items that reduce response uncertainty and sharpen predictions beyond semantic similarity. We demonstrate that this information-theoretic foundation enables more principled user memory selection that aligns more closely with human selection compared to state-of-the-art methods, and models $400\times$ larger. Additionally, we show that memory items selected using RUMS result in better response quality compared to existing approaches, while having up to $95\%$ reduction in computational cost.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于互信息的用户记忆选择方法RUMS，提升LLM个性化效果并大幅降低计算成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM个性化方法主要基于语义相似度选择用户记忆，忽略了记忆项对模型输出分布的实际影响，导致选择不够精准且计算开销大。
analysis.problem: 如何根据记忆项对模型输出的影响（而非仅语义相似度）来选择最有效的用户记忆子集，以提升个性化生成质量并降低计算成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出RUMS方法，通过最大化记忆子集与模型输出之间的互信息来选择用户记忆项，从而降低响应不确定性并增强预测的锐利度。
contributions: 提出基于互信息的记忆选择框架RUMS，比语义相似度方法更符合人类选择偏好。
在400倍大的模型上仍优于现有方法，且计算成本降低高达95%。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的用户记忆数据。
互信息计算在大规模场景下可能面临可扩展性挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于互信息的用户记忆选择方法RUMS，提升LLM个性化效果并大幅降低计算成本。

papers.title: Auxiliary Finite-Difference Residual-Gradient Regularization for PINNs
papers.abstract: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) are often selected by a single scalar loss even when the quantity of interest is more specific. We study a hybrid design in which the governing PDE residual remains automatic-differentiation (AD) based, while finite differences (FD) appear only in a weak auxiliary term that penalizes gradients of the sampled residual field. The FD term regularizes the residual field without replacing the PDE residual itself. We examine this idea in two stages. Stage 1 is a controlled Poisson benchmark comparing a baseline PINN, the FD residual-gradient regularizer, and a matched AD residual-gradient baseline. Stage 2 transfers the same logic to a three-dimensional annular heat-conduction benchmark (PINN3D), where baseline errors concentrate near a wavy outer wall and the auxiliary grid is implemented as a body-fitted shell adjacent to the wall. In Stage 1, the FD regularizer reproduces the main effect of residual-gradient control while exposing a trade-off between field accuracy and residual cleanliness. In Stage 2, the shell regularizer improves the application-facing quantities, namely outer-wall flux and boundary-condition behavior. Across seeds 0-5 and 100k epochs, the most reliable tested configuration is a fixed shell weight of 5e-4 under the Kourkoutas-beta optimizer regime: relative to a matched run without the shell term, it reduces the mean outer-wall BC RMSE from 1.22e-2 to 9.29e-4 and the mean wall-flux RMSE from 9.21e-3 to 9.63e-4. Adam with beta2=0.999 becomes usable when the initial learning rate is reduced to 1e-3, although its shell benefit is less robust than under Kourkoutas-beta. Overall, the results support a targeted view of hybrid PINNs: an auxiliary-only FD regularizer is most valuable when it is aligned with the physical quantity of interest, here the outer-wall flux.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种辅助有限差分流残差梯度正则化方法，在不替换PDE残差的情况下提升PINNs在特定物理量上的精度。
analysis.research_motivation: PINNs通常由单一标量损失优化，但实际应用中关注特定物理量（如边界通量），现有方法难以针对性提升。
analysis.problem: 如何在不改变主PDE残差（基于自动微分）的前提下，通过辅助正则化项提升PINNs对特定物理量的预测精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出基线误差集中在波浪形外壁附近，辅助网格可针对该区域。
analysis.method: 混合设计：主PDE残差仍用自动微分，有限差分仅用于辅助项，惩罚采样残差场的梯度，实现残差场正则化。
contributions: 提出辅助有限差分流残差梯度正则化方法，不替换PDE残差。
在2D泊松和3D环形热传导基准上验证，显著提升外壁通量和边界条件精度。
analysis.experiments: 在2D泊松基准和3D环形热传导基准（PINN3D）上实验，种子0-5、100k epochs，最可靠配置为固定壳权重5e-4配合Kourkoutas-beta优化器，外壁BC RMSE从1.22e-2降至9.29e-4，壁通量RMSE从9.21e-3降至9.63e-4。
limitations: 辅助项权重需手动调节，可能依赖问题。
仅针对特定物理量（外壁通量）有效，通用性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种辅助有限差分流残差梯度正则化方法，在不替换PDE残差的情况下提升PINNs在特定物理量上的精度。

papers.title: Improving Human Performance with Value-Aware Interventions: A Case Study in Chess
papers.abstract: AI systems are increasingly used to assist humans in sequential decision-making tasks, yet determining when and how an AI assistant should intervene remains a fundamental challenge. A potential baseline is to recommend the optimal action according to a strong model. However, such actions assume optimal follow-up actions, which human decision makers may fail to execute, potentially reducing overall performance. In this work, we propose and study value-aware interventions, motivated by a basic principle in reinforcement learning: under the Bellman equation, the optimal policy selects actions that maximize the immediate reward plus the value function. When a decision maker follows a suboptimal policy, this policy-value consistency no longer holds, creating discrepancies between the actions taken by the policy and those that maximize the immediate reward plus the value of the next state. We show that these policy-value inconsistencies naturally identify opportunities for intervention. We formalize this problem in a Markov decision process where an AI assistant may override human actions under an intervention budget. In the single-intervention regime, we show that the optimal strategy is to recommend the action that maximizes the human value function. For settings with multiple interventions, we propose a tractable approximation that prioritizes interventions based on the magnitude of the policy-value discrepancy. We evaluate these ideas in the domain of chess by learning models of humans from large-scale gameplay data. In simulation, our approach consistently outperforms interventions based on the strongest chess engine (Stockfish) in a wide range of settings. A within-subject human study with 20 players and 600 games further shows that our interventions significantly improve performance for low- and mid-skill players while matching expert-engine interventions for high-skill players.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于策略-价值不一致性的干预方法，在象棋中显著提升人类表现。
analysis.research_motivation: AI辅助人类决策时，何时及如何干预是关键挑战；简单推荐最优动作可能因人类无法执行后续最优步骤而效果不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何在有限干预预算下，通过识别人类策略与价值函数的不一致性来设计有效干预，提升人类在序列决策任务中的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 人类决策者可能无法执行最优后续动作，导致推荐最优动作的基线方法效果有限；策略-价值不一致性自然标识了干预机会。
analysis.method: 基于马尔可夫决策过程形式化干预问题，单次干预时推荐最大化人类价值函数的动作，多次干预时根据策略-价值差异大小排序进行近似优化。
contributions: 提出价值感知干预框架，利用策略-价值不一致性指导干预时机与内容
在象棋领域通过大规模游戏数据学习人类模型，并在仿真和人类实验中验证有效性
analysis.experiments: 仿真实验在多种设置下优于基于最强引擎Stockfish的干预；人类实验（20名玩家，600局游戏）显示低、中技能玩家表现显著提升，高技能玩家与专家引擎干预效果相当。
limitations: 可能依赖准确的人类行为模型，模型偏差会影响干预效果
实验仅在象棋领域验证，泛化到其他序列决策任务需进一步研究
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于策略-价值不一致性的干预方法，在象棋中显著提升人类表现。

papers.title: FocalLens: Visualizing Narratives through Focalization
papers.abstract: Visualizing narratives is useful to writers to reflect on unfinished drafts and identify unintentional biases and inconsistencies. Literary scholars can use the visualizations to identify nuanced patterns and literary styles from written text. Current narrative visualization is limited to representing character and location co-occurrences in a timeline, omitting important and complex narrative components such as focalization, causality, and speech. This paper aims to capture and visualize underexplored, complex narrative components as a basis for narrative visualization. As a starting point, we propose a new narrative visualization, named FocalLens, that uses focalization, the component that establishes who sees or perceives the events in a narrative, for representing the narrative. We provide the theoretical foundation of focalization and describe various types and facets of focalization. The details are incorporated in the novel visualization that captures how different characters perceive an event, who directly participate in an event, who indirectly observe the event, and who narrate the event. We also developed a tool that provides fluid interaction between the text and the proposed visualization. The tool was evaluated with four writers and scholars in a qualitative study, where writers analyzed their draft stories and scholars analyzed well-known stories. The findings suggest the tool added a new dimension to the workflow for writers and scholars, an analytical lens that is not available otherwise. We conclude by identifying design implications and future directions.

analysis.tldr: 提出FocalLens，一种基于聚焦理论的可视化叙事工具，帮助作者和学者分析叙事中的视角与感知。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有叙事可视化仅能表示角色与地点的时间线共现，忽略了聚焦、因果、言语等复杂叙事成分，限制了作者反思草稿和学者分析文学风格的能力。
analysis.problem: 如何捕捉并可视化叙事中未被充分探索的复杂成分（如聚焦），以提供更丰富的叙事分析视角。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于聚焦理论（focalization）定义多种类型和方面，设计可视化方案展示不同角色如何感知事件、直接参与、间接观察或叙述事件，并开发支持文本与可视化流畅交互的工具。
contributions: 提出FocalLens，一种基于聚焦理论的新型叙事可视化方法。
通过定性用户研究验证工具为作者和学者提供了新的分析维度。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 定性研究样本量较小（4位作者和学者），可能不具广泛代表性。
工具仅聚焦于聚焦成分，未涵盖因果、言语等其他复杂叙事成分。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FocalLens，一种基于聚焦理论的可视化叙事工具，帮助作者和学者分析叙事中的视角与感知。

papers.title: AIBuildAI: An AI Agent for Automatically Building AI Models
papers.abstract: AI models underpin modern intelligent systems, driving advances across science, medicine, finance, and technology. Yet developing high-performing AI models remains a labor-intensive process that requires expert practitioners to iteratively design architectures, engineer representations, implement training pipelines and refine approaches through empirical evaluation. Existing AutoML methods partially alleviate this burden but remain limited to narrow aspects such as hyperparameter optimization and model selection within predefined search spaces, leaving the full development lifecycle largely dependent on human expertise. To address this gap, we introduce AIBuildAI, an AI agent that automatically builds AI models from a task description and training data. AIBuildAI adopts a hierarchical agent architecture in which a manager agent coordinates three specialized sub-agents: a designer for modeling strategy, a coder for implementation and debugging, and a tuner for training and performance optimization. Each sub-agent is itself a large language model (LLM) based agent capable of multi-step reasoning and tool use, enabling end-to-end automation of the AI model development process that goes beyond the scope of existing AutoML approaches. We evaluate AIBuildAI on MLE-Bench, a benchmark of realistic Kaggle-style AI development tasks spanning visual, textual, time-series and tabular modalities. AIBuildAI ranks first on MLE-Bench with a medal rate of 63.1%, outperforming all existing baseline methods and matching the capability of highly experienced AI engineers. These results demonstrate that hierarchical agent systems can automate the full AI model development process from task specification to deployable model, suggesting a pathway toward broadly accessible AI development with minimal human intervention.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个分层AI智能体AIBuildAI，自动完成从任务描述到模型部署的全流程开发，在MLE-Bench上达到63.1%奖牌率，超越现有AutoML方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 开发高性能AI模型依赖专家反复迭代设计架构、工程实现和调优，过程劳动密集；现有AutoML仅覆盖超参优化和模型选择等窄环节，无法自动化完整开发周期。
analysis.problem: 如何实现从任务描述和训练数据到可部署AI模型的端到端自动化构建，超越现有AutoML的局限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出分层智能体架构AIBuildAI，包含一个管理智能体和三个专业子智能体：设计者（建模策略）、编码者（实现与调试）、调优者（训练与性能优化），每个子智能体基于LLM具备多步推理和工具使用能力。
contributions: 提出首个能自动完成AI模型全生命周期开发的分层智能体系统AIBuildAI。
在MLE-Bench基准上以63.1%奖牌率排名第一，匹配资深AI工程师能力。
analysis.experiments: 在MLE-Bench基准上评估，涵盖视觉、文本、时间序列和表格模态的Kaggle风格任务，AIBuildAI奖牌率63.1%，超越所有基线方法。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的推理能力，在复杂或资源受限场景下性能未知。
未讨论智能体协作失败或错误传播的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个分层AI智能体AIBuildAI，自动完成从任务描述到模型部署的全流程开发，在MLE-Bench上达到63.1%奖牌率，超越现有AutoML方法。

papers.title: CooperDrive: Enhancing Driving Decisions Through Cooperative Perception
papers.abstract: Autonomous vehicles equipped with robust onboard perception, localization, and planning still face limitations in occlusion and non-line-of-sight (NLOS) scenarios, where delayed reactions can increase collision risk. We propose CooperDrive, a cooperative perception framework that augments situational awareness and enables earlier, safer driving decisions. CooperDrive offers two key advantages: (i) each vehicle retains its native perception, localization, and planning stack, and (ii) a lightweight object-level sharing and fusion strategy bridges perception and planning. Specifically, CooperDrive reuses detector Bird's-Eye View (BEV) features to estimate accurate vehicle poses without additional heavy encoders, thereby reconstructing BEV representations and feeding the planner with low latency. On the planning side, CooperDrive leverages the expanded object set to anticipate potential conflicts earlier and adjust speed and trajectory proactively, thereby transforming reactive behaviors into predictive and safer driving decisions. Real-world closed-loop tests at occlusion-heavy NLOS intersections demonstrate that CooperDrive increases reaction lead time, minimum time-to-collision (TTC), and stopping margin, while requiring only 90 kbps bandwidth and maintaining an average end-to-end latency of 89 ms.

analysis.tldr: CooperDrive通过轻量级目标级协同感知框架，在遮挡和非视距场景下提升自动驾驶决策的提前量和安全性。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动驾驶车辆在遮挡和非视距场景下感知受限，导致反应延迟、碰撞风险增加，现有协同感知方法通常需要额外编码器或改变原有感知规划栈，部署成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何在保留车辆原有感知、定位和规划栈的前提下，通过轻量级协同感知提升遮挡/NLOS场景下的驾驶决策提前量和安全性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CooperDrive框架，复用检测器BEV特征估计车辆位姿，无需额外编码器；采用轻量级目标级共享与融合策略，将扩展目标集输入规划器，实现前瞻性速度与轨迹调整。
contributions: 提出一种保留车辆原生感知定位规划栈的轻量级协同感知框架，仅需90 kbps带宽和89 ms端到端延迟。
在真实世界遮挡严重的NLOS交叉路口闭环测试中，验证了该方法能增加反应提前时间、最小碰撞时间和停车余量。
analysis.experiments: 在真实世界遮挡严重的NLOS交叉路口进行闭环测试，测量反应提前时间、最小碰撞时间（TTC）和停车余量，并报告带宽和延迟。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的遮挡/NLOS场景，泛化性未充分验证。
目标级共享可能丢失像素级细节，极端情况下的感知精度有待考察。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CooperDrive通过轻量级目标级协同感知框架，在遮挡和非视距场景下提升自动驾驶决策的提前量和安全性。

papers.title: FAIR Universe Weak Lensing ML Uncertainty Challenge: Handling Uncertainties and Distribution Shifts for Precision Cosmology
papers.abstract: Weak gravitational lensing, the correlated distortion of background galaxy shapes by foreground structures, is a powerful probe of the matter distribution in our universe and allows accurate constraints on the cosmological model. In recent years, high-order statistics and machine learning (ML) techniques have been applied to weak lensing data to extract the nonlinear information beyond traditional two-point analysis. However, these methods typically rely on cosmological simulations, which poses several challenges: simulations are computationally expensive, limiting most realistic setups to a low training data regime; inaccurate modeling of systematics in the simulations create distribution shifts that can bias cosmological parameter constraints; and varying simulation setups across studies make method comparison difficult. To address these difficulties, we present the first weak lensing benchmark dataset with several realistic systematics and launch the FAIR Universe Weak Lensing Machine Learning Uncertainty Challenge. The challenge focuses on measuring the fundamental properties of the universe from weak lensing data with limited training set and potential distribution shifts, while providing a standardized benchmark for rigorous comparison across methods. Organized in two phases, the challenge will bring together the physics and ML communities to advance the methodologies for handling systematic uncertainties, data efficiency, and distribution shifts in weak lensing analysis with ML, ultimately facilitating the deployment of ML approaches into upcoming weak lensing survey analysis.

analysis.tldr: 首个弱引力透镜基准数据集与挑战，聚焦有限训练数据和分布偏移下的宇宙学参数推断。
analysis.research_motivation: 弱引力透镜分析依赖高成本模拟，存在训练数据少、系统误差建模不准确导致分布偏移、不同研究难以比较等问题，亟需标准化基准来推动ML方法在精密宇宙学中的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在有限训练数据和分布偏移下，利用机器学习从弱引力透镜数据中准确推断宇宙学参数。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建首个包含多种真实系统效应的弱引力透镜基准数据集，并组织两阶段挑战赛，提供标准化评估框架。
contributions: 发布了首个包含多种系统效应的弱引力透镜基准数据集。
发起FAIR Universe弱引力透镜机器学习不确定性挑战，促进物理与ML社区合作。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集可能无法覆盖所有真实系统效应。
挑战赛结果可能受参赛方法多样性影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个弱引力透镜基准数据集与挑战，聚焦有限训练数据和分布偏移下的宇宙学参数推断。

papers.title: Crowdsourcing of Real-world Image Annotation via Visual Properties
papers.abstract: Recent advances in data-centric artificial intelligence highlight inherent limitations in object recognition datasets. One of the primary issues stems from the semantic gap problem, which results in complex many-to-many mappings between visual data and linguistic descriptions. This bias adversely affects performance in computer vision tasks. This paper proposes an image annotation methodology that integrates knowledge representation, natural language processing, and computer vision techniques, aiming to reduce annotator subjectivity by applying visual property constraints. We introduce an interactive crowdsourcing framework that dynamically asks questions based on a predefined object category hierarchy and annotator feedback, guiding image annotation by visual properties. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of this methodology, and annotator feedback is discussed to optimize the crowdsourcing setup.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种通过视觉属性约束减少标注主观性的众包图像标注方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有目标识别数据集存在语义鸿沟问题，导致视觉数据与语言描述之间的多对多映射复杂，影响计算机视觉任务性能。
analysis.problem: 减少图像标注中的标注者主观性，提高标注一致性和质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 语义鸿沟导致标注偏差，影响模型性能。
analysis.method: 集成知识表示、自然语言处理和计算机视觉技术，通过预定义对象类别层次和标注者反馈动态提问，利用视觉属性约束引导标注。
contributions: 提出一种结合视觉属性约束的图像标注方法以减少主观性。
设计交互式众包框架，动态调整问题以优化标注过程。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖预定义类别层次，灵活性有限。
众包设置优化需进一步研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种通过视觉属性约束减少标注主观性的众包图像标注方法。

papers.title: Robustness Analysis of Machine Learning Models for IoT Intrusion Detection Under Data Poisoning Attacks
papers.abstract: Ensuring the reliability of machine learning-based intrusion detection systems remains a critical challenge in Internet of Things (IoT) environments, particularly as data poisoning attacks increasingly threaten the integrity of model training pipelines. This study evaluates the susceptibility of four widely used classifiers, Random Forest, Gradient Boosting Machine, Logistic Regression, and Deep Neural Network models, against multiple poisoning strategies using three real-world IoT datasets. Results show that while ensemble-based models exhibit comparatively stable performance, Logistic Regression and Deep Neural Networks suffer degradation of up to 40% under label manipulation and outlier-based attacks. Such disruptions significantly distort decision boundaries, reduce detection fidelity, and undermine deployment readiness. The findings highlight the need for adversarially robust training, continuous anomaly monitoring, and feature-level validation within operational Network Intrusion Detection Systems. The study also emphasizes the importance of integrating resilience testing into regulatory and compliance frameworks for AI-driven IoT security. Overall, this work provides an empirical foundation for developing more resilient intrusion detection pipelines and informs future research on adaptive, attack-aware models capable of maintaining reliability under adversarial IoT conditions.

analysis.tldr: 评估四种ML模型在IoT入侵检测中面对数据投毒攻击的鲁棒性，发现集成模型较稳定，而逻辑回归和深度神经网络在标签操纵下性能下降达40%。
analysis.research_motivation: IoT环境中基于ML的入侵检测系统面临数据投毒攻击威胁，模型训练管线的完整性受损，亟需评估现有模型的鲁棒性以指导防御策略。
analysis.problem: 量化不同ML分类器在多种数据投毒策略下的性能退化程度，并分析决策边界扭曲和检测保真度下降的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 集成模型（随机森林、梯度提升机）表现相对稳定，而逻辑回归和深度神经网络在标签操纵和基于离群点的攻击下准确率下降高达40%，决策边界严重扭曲。
analysis.method: 使用三个真实IoT数据集，对随机森林、梯度提升机、逻辑回归和深度神经网络四种分类器实施多种投毒攻击（标签操纵、离群点注入等），评估分类性能变化。
contributions: 系统比较了四种ML模型在IoT入侵检测中对数据投毒攻击的鲁棒性差异
揭示了逻辑回归和深度神经网络在特定攻击下的脆弱性（性能下降达40%）
强调了对抗鲁棒训练、持续异常监控和特征级验证的必要性
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅评估了四种模型，未涵盖更多先进架构（如Transformer）
未提出具体的防御方法或鲁棒训练策略
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 评估四种ML模型在IoT入侵检测中面对数据投毒攻击的鲁棒性，发现集成模型较稳定，而逻辑回归和深度神经网络在标签操纵下性能下降达40%。

papers.title: Hierarchical vs. Flat Iteration in Shared-Weight Transformers
papers.abstract: We present an empirical study of whether hierarchically structured, shared-weight recurrence can match the representational quality of independent-layer stacking in a Transformer-based language model. HRM-LM replaces L independent Transformer layers with a two-speed recurrent pair: a Fast module operating at every step for local refinement, and a Slow module operating every T steps for global compression. This recurrent hierarchy is unrolled for M = N x T steps with shared parameters. The central and most robust finding, supported by a parameter-matched Universal Transformer ablation (UniTF, 1.2B) across five independent runs, is a sharp empirical gap between the two approaches.

analysis.tldr: 共享权重的层次化循环Transformer（HRM-LM）在表示质量上显著弱于独立层堆叠的Transformer。
analysis.research_motivation: 共享权重的循环结构（如Universal Transformer）理论上能实现深度泛化，但实际效果常不如独立层堆叠，原因尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 探究层次化循环结构（HRM-LM）与独立层堆叠在表示质量上的差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出HRM-LM，用Fast和Slow两个共享权重的循环模块替代独立Transformer层，通过参数匹配的Universal Transformer消融实验进行对比。
contributions: 系统比较了层次化循环结构与独立层堆叠在Transformer语言模型中的表示质量。
揭示了共享权重循环结构在表示能力上的显著劣势。
analysis.experiments: 在1.2B参数的Universal Transformer消融实验上进行了5次独立运行，结果支持层次化循环与独立层堆叠之间存在明显经验差距。
limitations: 仅针对语言模型，未验证其他模态或任务。
未提供具体性能指标或数据集细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 共享权重的层次化循环Transformer（HRM-LM）在表示质量上显著弱于独立层堆叠的Transformer。

papers.title: LLMs taking shortcuts in test generation: A study with SAP HANA and LevelDB
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved impressive results on public benchmarks, often leading to claims of advanced reasoning and understanding. However, recent research in cognitive science reveals that these models sometimes rely on shallow heuristics and memorization, taking shortcuts rather than demonstrating genuine cognitive abilities. This paper investigates LLM behavior in automated test generation for software, contrasting performance on an open-source system (LevelDB) with SAP HANA, one of the most widely deployed commercial database systems worldwide, whose proprietary codebase is guaranteed to be absent from training data. We combine cognitive evaluation principles, drawing on Mitchell's mechanism-focused assessment methodology, with empirical software testing, employing mutation score and iterative compiler-feedback repair loops to assess both accuracy and underlying reasoning strategies. Results show that LLMs excel on familiar, open-source benchmarks but struggle with unseen, complex domains, often prioritizing compilability over semantic effectiveness. These findings provide independent software engineering evidence for the broader claim that current LLMs lack robust reasoning, and highlight the need for evaluation frameworks that penalize trivial shortcuts and reward true generalization.

analysis.tldr: LLMs在测试生成中依赖捷径，在未见过的商业系统上表现差，缺乏真正推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: LLMs在公开基准上表现优异，但可能依赖浅层启发式和记忆，而非真正推理；需要评估其在未见领域中的泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 研究LLMs在自动化测试生成中是否依赖捷径，以及其在未见过的商业系统（SAP HANA）上的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLMs在熟悉的开源基准（LevelDB）上表现好，但在未见过的商业系统（SAP HANA）上挣扎，优先保证编译性而非语义有效性。
analysis.method: 结合认知评估原则（Mitchell的机制聚焦评估）与实证软件测试（变异分数和迭代编译器反馈修复循环），对比LevelDB和SAP HANA上的测试生成。
contributions: 提供了LLMs在软件测试中依赖捷径的独立证据
强调了需要惩罚捷径、奖励真正泛化的评估框架
analysis.experiments: 在LevelDB和SAP HANA上进行了测试生成实验，使用变异分数和编译器反馈修复循环评估。
limitations: 仅针对两个系统，泛化性有限
未深入分析LLM内部机制
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLMs在测试生成中依赖捷径，在未见过的商业系统上表现差，缺乏真正推理能力。

papers.title: Geometric Routing Enables Causal Expert Control in Mixture of Experts
papers.abstract: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models scale parameters while fixing active computation per token, but the specialization of individual experts remains opaque. In a companion paper we showed that routing topology is quality-neutral: five structurally different configurations converge to statistically equivalent language modeling quality. Here we show that expert identity is nonetheless causally meaningful: individual rank-1 experts are monosemantic by construction, and cosine-similarity routing in a low-dimensional metric space makes their specialization directly inspectable. We present four lines of evidence. First, projecting expert output vectors through the unembedding matrix yields a Semantic Dictionary: 15% of experts are monosemantic specialists spanning 10 categories (temporal, geographic, cardinal, discourse, emotional, financial, military, scientific). Second, routing exhibits a frequency-to-syntax gradient: early layers separate tokens by word frequency, deeper layers by syntactic class (Zipf-confound controls, all $p < 0.001$). Third, causal interventions confirm these labels: steering toward a temporal expert's centroid increases P(temporal) by +321% (median across 44 prompts); suppressing a geographic expert drops P(geographic) by -23%; rewriting an expert's output vector halves target-category probability, and effects compose additively across layers. Fourth, the interventions are not unique to cosine routing: linear routers support comparable steering, but only cosine routing provides geometric transparency -- expert specialization is readable directly from the centroid matrix. MoE expert-level specialization is a first-class interpretability primitive: architecturally monosemantic, causally validated, and controllable at inference with zero overhead.

analysis.tldr: MoE专家在低维度量空间中通过余弦路由实现几何透明，专家是单语义的且可因果控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 稀疏MoE模型虽能扩展参数但专家专业化不透明，现有路由拓扑对质量影响中性，需要理解专家身份是否具有因果意义。
analysis.problem: 揭示MoE中专家是否具有因果可解释性，并实现零开销的推理时专家控制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 路由拓扑与质量无关，但专家身份因果有意义；余弦路由提供几何透明性，线性路由虽可控制但缺乏可读性。
analysis.method: 通过低维度量空间中的余弦相似度路由，利用解嵌入矩阵投影专家输出构建语义词典，并进行因果干预（中心点引导、抑制、重写）。
contributions: 发现15%的专家是单语义的，涵盖10个语义类别。
验证路由存在频率-语法梯度，早期层按词频分离，深层按语法类分离。
因果干预证实专家标签有效，且效果跨层可加性组合。
余弦路由提供几何透明性，专家专业化可直接从中心点矩阵读取。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅验证了rank-1专家，更高秩专家可能更复杂。
语义词典类别可能不完整或存在重叠。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MoE专家在低维度量空间中通过余弦路由实现几何透明，专家是单语义的且可因果控制。

papers.title: Zero-Ablation Overstates Register Content Dependence in DINO Vision Transformers
papers.abstract: Zero-ablation -- replacing token activations with zero vectors -- is widely used to probe token function in vision transformers. Register zeroing in DINOv2+registers and DINOv3 produces large drops (up to $-36.6$\,pp classification, $-30.9$\,pp segmentation), suggesting registers are functionally indispensable. However, three replacement controls -- mean-substitution, noise-substitution, and cross-image register-shuffling -- preserve performance across classification, correspondence, and segmentation, remaining within ${\sim}1$\,pp of the unmodified baseline. Per-patch cosine similarity shows these replacements genuinely perturb internal representations, while zeroing causes disproportionately large perturbations, consistent with why it alone degrades tasks. We conclude that zero-ablation overstates dependence on exact register content. In the frozen-feature evaluations we test, performance depends on plausible register-like activations rather than on exact image-specific values. Registers nevertheless buffer dense features from \texttt{[CLS]} dependence and are associated with compressed patch geometry. These findings, including the replacement-control results, replicate at ViT-B scale.

analysis.tldr: 零消融高估了DINO视觉Transformer中寄存器内容的依赖性，替代控制实验表明性能依赖于合理的类寄存器激活而非精确值。
analysis.research_motivation: 零消融（将token激活替换为零向量）被广泛用于探测视觉Transformer中token的功能，但该方法可能高估某些组件的重要性，导致对模型机制的误解。
analysis.problem: 评估零消融在DINO视觉Transformer中是否准确反映了寄存器（register）的功能依赖性，并探究寄存器实际作用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 零消融导致分类和分割性能大幅下降（分别达-36.6 pp和-30.9 pp），暗示寄存器不可或缺；但均值替换、噪声替换和跨图像寄存器混洗等替代控制仅引起约1 pp的性能变化，表明零消融的破坏性不成比例地大。
analysis.method: 提出三种替代控制方法（均值替换、噪声替换、跨图像寄存器混洗）与零消融对比，通过性能变化和内部表征扰动分析寄存器依赖性。
contributions: 发现零消融高估了DINO视觉Transformer中寄存器内容的依赖性，替代控制实验表明性能依赖于合理的类寄存器激活而非精确值。
揭示寄存器在冻结特征评估中缓冲密集特征对[CLS]的依赖，并与压缩的patch几何结构相关。
analysis.experiments: 在ViT-B尺度上，使用分类、对应和分割任务进行实验，验证了替代控制方法保持性能，而零消融导致大幅下降。
limitations: 实验仅在DINOv2+registers和DINOv3上进行，可能不适用于其他架构或训练范式。
仅评估了冻结特征，未涉及微调或端到端训练场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 零消融高估了DINO视觉Transformer中寄存器内容的依赖性，替代控制实验表明性能依赖于合理的类寄存器激活而非精确值。

papers.title: Three-Phase Transformer
papers.abstract: We present Three-Phase Transformer (3PT), a residual-stream structural prior for decoder-only Transformers on a standard SwiGLU + RMSNorm + RoPE + GQA backbone. The hidden vector is partitioned into N equally-sized cyclic channels, each maintained by phase-respecting ops: a per-channel RMSNorm, a 2D Givens rotation between attention and FFN that rotates each channel by theta + i*(2*pi/N), and a head-count constraint aligning GQA heads with the partition. The architecture is a self-stabilizing equilibrium between scrambling and re-imposition, not a bolted-on module. The partition carves out a one-dimensional DC subspace orthogonal to the channels, into which we inject a fixed Gabriel's horn profile r(p) = 1/(p+1) as an absolute-position side-channel composing orthogonally with RoPE's relative-position rotation. The canonical N=3 borrows its metaphor from balanced three-phase AC, where three sinusoids 120 degrees apart sum to zero with no anti-correlated pair. At 123M parameters on WikiText-103, 3PT achieves -7.20% perplexity (-2.62% bits-per-byte) over a matched RoPE-Only baseline at +1,536 parameters (0.00124% of total), with 1.93x step-count convergence speedup (1.64x wall-clock). N behaves as a parameter-sharing knob rather than a unique optimum: at 5.5M an N-sweep over {1,2,3,4,6,8,12} is near-monotone with N=1 winning; at 123M a three-seed sweep finds N=3 and N=1 statistically indistinguishable. The load-bearing mechanism is the channel-partitioned residual stream, per-block rotation, per-phase normalization, and horn DC injection. We characterize (a) self-stabilization of the geometry without explicit enforcement, a novel instance of the conservation-law framework for neural networks; (b) a U-shaped depth profile of rotation-angle drift at 12 layers; (c) orthogonal composition with RoPE, attention, and FFN.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种残差流结构先验Three-Phase Transformer，通过通道分区、Givens旋转和DC注入提升Transformer效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准Transformer架构缺乏显式的残差流结构先验，导致训练效率低、收敛慢，需要探索更高效的参数共享和自稳定机制。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种轻量级、自稳定的残差流结构先验，以提升解码器-only Transformer的收敛速度和性能，同时保持与现有组件（如RoPE、GQA）的正交兼容性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：通道分区和旋转操作能自稳定几何结构，无需显式约束；旋转角漂移呈现U形深度分布；N作为参数共享旋钮，在较大模型下N=3与N=1统计上无差异。
analysis.method: 提出Three-Phase Transformer (3PT)，将隐藏向量划分为N个等大小循环通道，每个通道应用逐通道RMSNorm、注意力与FFN之间的2D Givens旋转（角度为theta + i*2π/N），以及GQA头数约束；同时注入正交于通道的DC子空间，使用Gabriel's horn轮廓作为绝对位置侧信道。
contributions: 提出一种新的残差流结构先验3PT，通过通道分区和旋转实现自稳定，无需额外模块。
在123M参数模型上，以仅增加0.00124%参数实现7.20%的困惑度降低和1.93倍步数收敛加速。
揭示了通道分区残差流、逐块旋转、逐相位归一化和DC注入的负载平衡机制，并分析了旋转角漂移的深度分布。
analysis.experiments: 在WikiText-103上，123M参数模型与RoPE-Only基线对比，报告了困惑度、bits-per-byte、收敛加速比等指标，并进行了N值扫描实验。
limitations: 实验仅在WikiText-103上进行，泛化性需更多验证。
N=3的隐喻性选择可能缺乏理论最优性证明。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种残差流结构先验Three-Phase Transformer，通过通道分区、Givens旋转和DC注入提升Transformer效率。

papers.title: Demonstration of Pneuma-Seeker: Agentic System for Reifying and Fulfilling Information Needs on Tabular Data
papers.abstract: Data analysts working with relational data often start with vague or underspecified questions and refine them iteratively as they explore the data. To support this iterative process, we demonstrate Pneuma-Seeker, a system that reifies a user's information need as explicit, inspectable relational specifications, enabling iterative refinement of the information need, targeted data discovery, and provenance-aware execution. Through two real-world procurement use cases, we show how Pneuma-Seeker leverages LLMs as transparent, interactive analytical collaborators rather than opaque answer engines.

analysis.tldr: Pneuma-Seeker 是一个将用户模糊信息需求转化为可检查的关系规范，并支持迭代精炼的智能系统。
analysis.research_motivation: 数据分析师在处理关系数据时，初始问题往往模糊或未完全指定，需要迭代探索和精炼，现有系统缺乏对信息需求的显式表示和可追溯执行。
analysis.problem: 如何将用户模糊的信息需求具体化为可检查、可迭代精炼的关系规范，并支持有溯源的数据发现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用LLM作为透明、交互式的分析协作者，将用户信息需求具体化为显式的关系规范，支持迭代精炼、目标数据发现和溯源执行。
contributions: 提出Pneuma-Seeker系统，将模糊信息需求转化为可检查的关系规范。
通过两个真实采购用例展示系统作为透明交互式分析协作者的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的推理质量，在复杂场景下规范生成可能不准确。
仅通过两个用例展示，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Pneuma-Seeker 是一个将用户模糊信息需求转化为可检查的关系规范，并支持迭代精炼的智能系统。

papers.title: M3R: Localized Rainfall Nowcasting with Meteorology-Informed MultiModal Attention
papers.abstract: Accurate and timely rainfall nowcasting is crucial for disaster mitigation and water resource management. Despite recent advances in deep learning, precipitation prediction remains challenging due to limitations in effectively leveraging diverse multimedia data sources. We introduce M3R, a Meteorology-informed MultiModal attention-based architecture for direct Rainfall prediction that synergistically combines visual NEXRAD radar imagery with numerical Personal Weather Station (PWS) measurements, using a comprehensive pipeline for temporal alignment of heterogeneous meteorological data. With specialized multimodal attention mechanisms, M3R novelly leverages weather station time series as queries to selectively attend to spatial radar features, enabling focused extraction of precipitation signatures. Experimental results for three spatial areas of 100 km * 100 km centered at NEXRAD radar stations demonstrate that M3R outperforms existing approaches, achieving substantial improvements in accuracy, efficiency, and precipitation detection capabilities. Our work establishes new benchmarks for multimedia-based precipitation nowcasting and provides practical tools for operational weather prediction systems. The source code is available at https://github.com/Sanjeev97/M3Rain

analysis.tldr: M3R 提出一种气象信息引导的多模态注意力架构，融合雷达图像与气象站数据，实现局部降雨临近预报。
analysis.research_motivation: 降雨临近预报对防灾减灾至关重要，但现有深度学习方法难以有效利用雷达图像和气象站等多种数据源。
analysis.problem: 如何融合异构气象数据（雷达图像和气象站时序数据）提升局部降雨临近预报的精度和效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 M3R 架构，使用气象站时间序列作为查询，通过多模态注意力机制选择性关注空间雷达特征，实现异构数据的时间对齐和融合。
contributions: 提出气象信息引导的多模态注意力架构 M3R，融合雷达图像和气象站数据。
在三个 100 km × 100 km 区域上验证，M3R 在精度、效率和降水检测能力上超越现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在三个以 NEXRAD 雷达站为中心的 100 km × 100 km 空间区域上进行实验，M3R 在准确率、效率和降水检测方面优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能仅适用于有雷达和气象站覆盖的区域。
多模态对齐和注意力机制的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: M3R 提出一种气象信息引导的多模态注意力架构，融合雷达图像与气象站数据，实现局部降雨临近预报。

papers.title: Equifinality in Mixture of Experts: Routing Topology Does Not Determine Language Modeling Quality
papers.abstract: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures employ increasingly sophisticated routing mechanisms -- learned routers, multi-hop trajectories, token-dependent gating. We ask: does routing topology actually determine language modeling quality? We build a geometric MoE (ST-MoE) using cosine-similarity routing against learned centroids in a low-dimensional space ($d_{space} = 64$), requiring 80% fewer routing parameters than standard linear routers. Through 62 controlled experiments on WikiText-103 at 76--84M parameters trained to convergence (50K steps, 1.64B tokens), we find that routing topology does not determine asymptotic perplexity (PPL): five cosine-routing variants are statistically equivalent within a 1-PPL margin (Two One-Sided Tests [TOST], $p < 0.05$ for all 10 pairwise comparisons; 15 runs across 3 seeds, observed range 33.93--34.72). The finding extends to hash, random-fixed, and top-1 routing (single-seed; graceful 1.1--2.2 PPL degradation) and replicates on OpenWebText (0.03 PPL gap, 6 runs, 3 seeds each). A standard linear router with 5.3$\times$ more routing parameters reaches PPL 32.76, but iso-parameter cosine routing closes 67% of this gap -- the true mechanism advantage is $\sim$1.2%. The mechanistic explanation is convergent redundancy: multi-hop updates are collinear ($\cos(Δh_0, Δh_1) = 0.805$), implementing magnitude amplification rather than compositional reasoning; a single learnable scalar replicates multi-hop performance. As a practical payoff, zero-shot relative-norm halting saves 25% of MoE FLOPs at +0.12% PPL. Expert-level specialization and causal controllability -- which coexist with topology-level equifinality -- are explored in a companion paper.

analysis.tldr: MoE路由拓扑对语言建模质量影响极小，简单几何路由即可达到相近性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 稀疏MoE架构中路由机制日益复杂，但路由拓扑是否真正决定语言建模质量尚不明确，需要系统验证。
analysis.problem: 探究MoE路由拓扑（如学习型路由器、多跳轨迹等）对语言建模困惑度的因果影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过62次控制实验发现，不同余弦路由变体在渐近困惑度上统计等价（1-PPL范围内），且该现象在哈希、随机固定和top-1路由中复现。
analysis.method: 提出ST-MoE，使用低维空间（d=64）中基于余弦相似度的几何路由，并设计零样本相对范数停止机制节省FLOPs。
contributions: 发现MoE路由拓扑不影响渐近语言建模质量，存在等终局性（equifinality）。
提出参数效率更高的几何路由（ST-MoE），减少80%路由参数。
揭示多跳更新本质是幅度放大而非组合推理，单标量可复现多跳性能。
零样本相对范数停止机制节省25% MoE FLOPs，仅增加0.12% PPL。
analysis.experiments: 在WikiText-103（76-84M参数，50K步，1.64B tokens）进行62次控制实验，使用TOST统计检验；在OpenWebText上复现（0.03 PPL差距）。
limitations: 实验限于中等规模模型（<100M参数），更大规模模型可能不同。
仅关注语言建模任务，其他任务（如翻译）可能不同。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MoE路由拓扑对语言建模质量影响极小，简单几何路由即可达到相近性能。

papers.title: Zoom Consistency: A Free Confidence Signal in Multi-Step Visual Grounding Pipelines
papers.abstract: Multi-step zoom-in pipelines are widely used for GUI grounding, yet the intermediate predictions they produce are typically discarded after coordinate remapping. We observe that these intermediate outputs contain a useful confidence signal for free: zoom consistency, the distance between a model's step-2 prediction and the crop center. Unlike log-probabilities or token-level uncertainty, zoom consistency is a geometric quantity in a shared coordinate space, making it directly comparable across architecturally different VLMs without calibration. We prove this quantity is a linear estimator of step-1 spatial error under idealized conditions (perfect step-2, target within crop) and show it correlates with prediction correctness across two VLMs (AUC = 0.60; Spearman rho = -0.14, p < 10^{-6} for KV-Ground-8B; rho = -0.11, p = 0.0003 for Qwen3.5-27B). The correlation is small but consistent across models, application categories, and operating systems. As a proof-of-concept, we use zoom consistency to route between a specialist and generalist model, capturing 16.5% of the oracle headroom between them (+0.8%, McNemar p = 0.19). Code is available at https://github.com/omxyz/zoom-consistency-routing.

analysis.tldr: 多步视觉定位流水线中，中间步骤的预测与裁剪中心之间的距离可作为免费置信度信号，无需校准即可跨架构比较。
analysis.research_motivation: 多步缩放流水线广泛用于GUI定位，但中间预测通常被丢弃，未能利用其中蕴含的置信度信息。现有置信度信号（如对数概率、token级不确定性）需要校准且难以跨模型比较。
analysis.problem: 如何从多步视觉定位流水线的中间输出中提取一个无需校准、跨模型可比的置信度信号。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到中间步骤预测与裁剪中心之间的距离（缩放一致性）与预测正确性相关，且该相关性在不同VLM、应用类别和操作系统上一致但较小。
analysis.method: 定义缩放一致性为模型第二步预测与裁剪中心之间的距离，证明其在理想条件下是第一步空间误差的线性估计量，并作为置信度信号用于模型路由。
contributions: 提出缩放一致性作为多步视觉定位流水线中免费的置信度信号，无需校准即可跨架构比较。
理论证明缩放一致性在理想条件下是第一步空间误差的线性估计量。
实验验证缩放一致性与预测正确性的相关性（AUC=0.60，Spearman ρ=-0.14），并展示其在模型路由中的应用（捕获16.5%的oracle提升）。
analysis.experiments: 在两个VLM（KV-Ground-8B和Qwen3.5-27B）上评估缩放一致性与预测正确性的相关性，并作为路由信号在专业模型与通用模型之间进行路由，获得+0.8%的准确率提升（McNemar p=0.19）。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 相关性较小（Spearman ρ约-0.1），可能在实际应用中效果有限。
路由实验的统计显著性不足（p=0.19），需要更大规模验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多步视觉定位流水线中，中间步骤的预测与裁剪中心之间的距离可作为免费置信度信号，无需校准即可跨架构比较。

papers.title: Credo: Declarative Control of LLM Pipelines via Beliefs and Policies
papers.abstract: Agentic AI systems are becoming commonplace in domains that require long-lived, stateful decision-making in continuously evolving conditions. As such, correctness depends not only on the output of individual model calls, but also on how to best adapt when incorporating new evidence or revising prior conclusions. However, existing frameworks rely on imperative control loops, ephemeral memory, and prompt-embedded logic, making agent behavior opaque, brittle, and difficult to verify. This paper introduces Credo, which represents semantic state as beliefs and regulates behavior using declarative policies defined over these beliefs. This design supports adaptive, auditable, and composable execution through a database-backed semantic control plane. We showcase these concepts in a decision-control scenario, where beliefs and policies declaratively guide critical execution choices (e.g., model selection, retrieval, corrective re-execution), enabling dynamic behavior without requiring any changes to the underlying pipeline code.

analysis.tldr: Credo通过信念和声明式策略实现LLM管线的声明式控制，提升可审计性和适应性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有Agent框架依赖命令式控制循环、短暂记忆和提示嵌入逻辑，导致行为不透明、脆弱且难以验证。
analysis.problem: 如何使LLM管线在动态环境中具备自适应、可审计和可组合的执行能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Credo框架，将语义状态表示为信念，并基于这些信念定义声明式策略来调控行为，通过数据库支持的语义控制平面实现自适应、可审计和可组合的执行。
contributions: 提出基于信念和声明式策略的LLM管线控制方法
实现数据库支持的语义控制平面，支持动态行为且无需修改管线代码
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖数据库性能
声明式策略的复杂场景覆盖可能有限
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Credo通过信念和声明式策略实现LLM管线的声明式控制，提升可审计性和适应性。

papers.title: SpaceMind: A Modular and Self-Evolving Embodied Vision-Language Agent Framework for Autonomous On-orbit Servicing
papers.abstract: Autonomous on-orbit servicing demands embodied agents that perceive through visual sensors, reason about 3D spatial situations, and execute multi-phase tasks over extended horizons. We present SpaceMind, a modular and self-evolving vision-language model (VLM) agent framework that decomposes knowledge, tools, and reasoning into three independently extensible dimensions: skill modules with dynamic routing, Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools with configurable profiles, and injectable reasoning-mode skills. An MCP-Redis interface layer enables the same codebase to operate across simulation and physical hardware without modification, and a Skill Self-Evolution mechanism distills operational experience into persistent skill files without model fine-tuning. We validate SpaceMind through 192 closed-loop runs across five satellites, three task types, and two environments, a UE5 simulation and a physical laboratory, deliberately including degraded conditions to stress-test robustness. Under nominal conditions all modes achieve 90--100% navigation success; under degradation, the Prospective mode uniquely succeeds in search-and-approach tasks where other modes fail. A self-evolution study shows that the agent recovers from failure in four of six groups from a single failed episode, including complete failure to 100% success and inspection scores improving from 12 to 59 out of 100. Real-world validation confirms zero-code-modification transfer to a physical robot with 100% rendezvous success. Code: https://github.com/wuaodi/SpaceMind

analysis.tldr: SpaceMind 是一个模块化、自进化的具身视觉-语言智能体框架，用于自主在轨服务，在仿真和物理实验中均表现出高鲁棒性和零代码迁移能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 自主在轨服务任务要求智能体通过视觉传感器感知、推理3D空间情境并执行多阶段任务，现有方法在长程任务、鲁棒性和跨平台迁移方面存在不足。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个模块化、可自进化且能跨仿真与物理硬件无缝迁移的具身VLM智能体框架，以应对在轨服务中的复杂、退化条件。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但实验表明在退化条件下，Prospective模式能成功完成搜索-接近任务而其他模式失败，且自进化机制能从单次失败中恢复。
analysis.method: 提出SpaceMind框架，包含三个可独立扩展的维度：技能模块（动态路由）、MCP工具（可配置配置文件）和可注入推理模式技能；通过MCP-Redis接口层实现仿真与硬件零代码迁移；Skill Self-Evolution机制将操作经验蒸馏为持久技能文件，无需微调模型。
contributions: 提出模块化、自进化的具身VLM智能体框架SpaceMind，支持知识、工具和推理的独立扩展。
设计MCP-Redis接口层，实现同一代码库在仿真和物理硬件间零修改迁移。
引入Skill Self-Evolution机制，无需模型微调即可从失败经验中学习并提升性能。
在192次闭环实验（5颗卫星、3种任务类型、2种环境）中验证了框架的鲁棒性和有效性，包括退化条件和真实机器人迁移。
analysis.experiments: 在UE5仿真和物理实验室中进行了192次闭环实验，涵盖5颗卫星、3种任务类型和2种环境，包括退化条件。名义条件下导航成功率90-100%；退化条件下Prospective模式唯一成功；自进化研究显示6组中有4组从单次失败中恢复，包括从完全失败到100%成功，检查分数从12提升至59。真实机器人验证零代码修改迁移，交会成功率100%。
limitations: 摘要未提及在更复杂或未知任务上的泛化能力。
自进化机制可能依赖特定任务分布，跨领域迁移效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SpaceMind 是一个模块化、自进化的具身视觉-语言智能体框架，用于自主在轨服务，在仿真和物理实验中均表现出高鲁棒性和零代码迁移能力。

papers.title: Generating Concept Lexicalizations via Dictionary-Based Cross-Lingual Sense Projection
papers.abstract: We study the task of automatically expanding WordNet-style lexical resources to new languages through sense generation. We generate senses by associating target-language lemmas with existing lexical concepts via semantic projection. Given a sense-tagged English corpus and its translation, our method projects English synsets onto aligned target-language tokens and assigns the corresponding lemmas to those synsets. To generate these alignments and ensure their quality, we augment a pre-trained base aligner with a bilingual dictionary, which is also used to filter out incorrect sense projections. We evaluate the method on multiple languages, comparing it to prior methods, as well as dictionary-based and large language model baselines. Results show that the proposed project-and-filter strategy improves precision while remaining interpretable and requiring few external resources. We plan to make our code, documentation, and generated sense inventories accessible.

analysis.tldr: 通过双语词典增强的跨语言语义投影方法自动生成WordNet词义，提升精度且保持可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: WordNet风格词汇资源在低资源语言中匮乏，人工构建成本高，现有自动扩展方法精度不足或依赖大量资源。
analysis.problem: 如何利用有限资源（双语词典和词义标注语料）自动将英语WordNet词义投影到目标语言，生成准确的词义清单。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于预训练对齐器，结合双语词典进行跨语言语义投影，并通过词典过滤错误投影的“投影-过滤”策略。
contributions: 提出一种结合双语词典的跨语言语义投影方法，用于自动生成WordNet词义。
在多种语言上验证方法有效性，相比先前方法和基线（包括LLM）在精度上更优，且可解释、资源需求低。
analysis.experiments: 在多种语言上评估，与先前方法、基于词典的基线和大语言模型基线比较，结果显示投影-过滤策略提升了精度。
limitations: 依赖双语词典和词义标注语料，可能对无词典语言不适用。
未提及召回率或覆盖率的详细分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过双语词典增强的跨语言语义投影方法自动生成WordNet词义，提升精度且保持可解释性。

papers.title: BiCon-Gate: Consistency-Gated De-colloquialisation for Dialogue Fact-Checking
papers.abstract: Automated fact-checking in dialogue involves multi-turn conversations where colloquial language is frequent yet understudied. To address this gap, we propose a conservative rewrite candidate for each response claim via staged de-colloquialisation, combining lightweight surface normalisation with scoped in-claim coreference resolution. We then introduce BiCon-Gate, a semantics-aware consistency gate that selects the rewrite candidate only when it is semantically supported by the dialogue context, otherwise falling back to the original claim. This gated selection stabilises downstream fact-checking and yields gains in both evidence retrieval and fact verification. On the DialFact benchmark, our approach improves retrieval and verification, with particularly strong gains on SUPPORTS, and outperforms competitive baselines, including a decoder-based one-shot LLM rewrite that attempts to perform all de-colloquialisation steps in a single pass.

analysis.tldr: 提出BiCon-Gate一致性门控机制，通过分阶段去口语化改写对话声明，提升对话事实核查的证据检索和验证性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 对话事实核查中口语化语言频繁但研究不足，现有方法难以处理口语化带来的语义歧义和噪声，影响下游核查准确性。
analysis.problem: 如何有效去除对话声明中的口语化表达，同时避免改写引入语义错误，以提升事实核查的证据检索和验证效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出BiCon-Gate方法，先通过分阶段去口语化（轻量级表面归一化+受限声明内共指消解）生成保守改写候选，再使用语义一致性门控选择仅在对话上下文语义支持时采用改写，否则回退原声明。
contributions: 提出分阶段去口语化策略，结合表面归一化和共指消解生成保守改写候选。
引入BiCon-Gate一致性门控，基于语义支持选择改写或回退，稳定下游事实核查。
在DialFact基准上取得证据检索和事实验证的改进，尤其在SUPPORTS类别上表现突出。
analysis.experiments: 在DialFact基准上评估，对比包括基于解码器的一次性LLM改写基线，结果显示方法在检索和验证上均有提升。
limitations: 可能依赖对话上下文的语义表示质量。
分阶段改写可能无法处理所有口语化现象。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出BiCon-Gate一致性门控机制，通过分阶段去口语化改写对话声明，提升对话事实核查的证据检索和验证性能。

papers.title: FoodSense: A Multisensory Food Dataset and Benchmark for Predicting Taste, Smell, Texture, and Sound from Images
papers.abstract: Humans routinely infer taste, smell, texture, and even sound from food images a phenomenon well studied in cognitive science. However, prior vision language research on food has focused primarily on recognition tasks such as meal identification, ingredient detection, and nutrition estimation. Image-based prediction of multisensory experience remains largely unexplored. We introduce FoodSense, a human-annotated dataset for cross-sensory inference containing 66,842 participant-image pairs across 2,987 unique food images. Each pair includes numeric ratings (1-5) and free-text descriptors for four sensory dimensions: taste, smell, texture, and sound. To enable models to both predict and explain sensory expectations, we expand short human annotations into image-grounded reasoning traces. A large language model generates visual justifications conditioned on the image, ratings, and descriptors. Using these annotations, we train FoodSense-VL, a vision language benchmark model to produce both multisensory ratings and grounded explanations directly from food images. This work connects cognitive science findings on cross-sensory perception with modern instruction tuning for multimodal models and shows that many popular evaluation metrics are insufficient for visually sensory inference.

analysis.tldr: 提出多感官食物数据集FoodSense及基准模型FoodSense-VL，用于从图像预测味道、气味、质地和声音。
analysis.research_motivation: 人类能从食物图像推断多感官体验，但现有视觉语言研究仅关注识别任务，缺乏对跨感官推断的探索。
analysis.problem: 从食物图像预测多感官体验（味道、气味、质地、声音）并生成可解释的推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 许多流行评估指标不足以评估视觉感官推断任务。
analysis.method: 构建包含66,842个参与者-图像对的数据集，使用LLM生成图像基础推理轨迹，训练FoodSense-VL模型输出多感官评分和解释。
contributions: 提出FoodSense数据集，包含多感官评分和文本描述。
提出FoodSense-VL基准模型，实现从图像预测多感官体验并生成解释。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集仅包含2,987张食物图像，规模有限。
模型依赖LLM生成的推理轨迹，可能引入噪声。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多感官食物数据集FoodSense及基准模型FoodSense-VL，用于从图像预测味道、气味、质地和声音。

papers.title: Coalition Formation in LLM Agent Networks: Stability Analysis and Convergence Guarantees
papers.abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) agents are increasingly deployed in multi-agent systems requiring strategic coordination. While recent work has analyzed LLM behavior in two-player games, coalition formation, where $n$ agents dynamically form cooperative groups, remains theoretically uncharacterized. We present the first framework grounding coalition formation in LLM agent networks in hedonic game theory with formal stability guarantees. We introduce the LLM Coalition Formation Game (LCFG), establish sufficient conditions for Nash-stable partitions, and prove complexity results. Our analysis reveals that LLM agents exhibit bounded rationality characterized by $ε$-rational preferences; we provide both deterministic existence guarantees and consistency-driven stability bounds whose predictions are consistent with empirical outcomes. Experiments with GPT-4, Claude-3, and Llama-3 across 2,400 episodes validate our framework: LLM coalitions achieve Nash stability in 73.2% of cases under our Coalition-of-Thought (CoalT) protocol, compared to 58.4% under chain-of-thought and 41.8% under standard prompting ($p < 0.001$). Our framework provides theoretical foundations for designing stable multi-agent LLM systems.

analysis.tldr: 首个将LLM智能体网络中的联盟形成问题置于hedonic博弈论框架下，给出稳定性分析与收敛保证。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM智能体在多智能体系统中需要战略协调，但现有研究仅分析两人博弈，对n个智能体动态形成合作联盟的理论刻画缺失。
analysis.problem: 如何为LLM智能体网络中的联盟形成建立理论框架，提供稳定性保证和收敛性分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM智能体表现出有界理性，具有ε-理性偏好；理论预测与实验结果一致。
analysis.method: 提出LLM联盟形成博弈（LCFG），基于hedonic博弈论建立Nash稳定分区的充分条件，并设计Coalition-of-Thought（CoalT）协议。
contributions: 首个将hedonic博弈论引入LLM智能体网络联盟形成问题，提供形式化稳定性保证。
证明Nash稳定分区的存在性条件和复杂性结果，并给出基于一致性的稳定性界。
analysis.experiments: 在GPT-4、Claude-3、Llama-3上进行了2400轮实验，CoalT协议下Nash稳定性达73.2%，优于链式思维（58.4%）和标准提示（41.8%），p<0.001。
limitations: 实验仅涉及三种模型，可能不适用于所有LLM。
理论分析假设智能体偏好为ε-理性，实际中ε的确定可能依赖具体场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个将LLM智能体网络中的联盟形成问题置于hedonic博弈论框架下，给出稳定性分析与收敛保证。

papers.title: Step-level Denoising-time Diffusion Alignment with Multiple Objectives
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has emerged as a powerful tool for aligning diffusion models with human preferences, typically by optimizing a single reward function under a KL regularization constraint. In practice, however, human preferences are inherently pluralistic, and aligned models must balance multiple downstream objectives, such as aesthetic quality and text-image consistency. Existing multi-objective approaches either rely on costly multi-objective RL fine-tuning or on fusing separately aligned models at denoising time, but they generally require access to reward values (or their gradients) and/or introduce approximation error in the resulting denoising objectives. In this paper, we revisit the problem of RL fine-tuning for diffusion models and address the intractability of identifying the optimal policy by introducing a step-level RL formulation. Building on this, we further propose Multi-objective Step-level Denoising-time Diffusion Alignment (MSDDA), a retraining-free framework for aligning diffusion models with multiple objectives, obtaining the optimal reverse denoising distribution in closed form, with mean and variance expressed directly in terms of single-objective base models. We prove that this denoising-time objective is exactly equivalent to the step-level RL fine-tuning, introducing no approximation error. Moreover, we provide numerical results, which indicate our method outperforms existing denoising-time approaches.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需重训的多目标扩散模型对齐框架MSDDA，在去噪步骤层面以闭式解融合多个奖励，理论等价于步骤级RL微调且无近似误差。
analysis.research_motivation: 人类偏好本质上是多元的，扩散模型对齐需平衡多个下游目标（如美学质量、图文一致性），现有方法要么依赖昂贵的多目标RL微调，要么在去噪时融合单独对齐的模型，但通常需要访问奖励值或其梯度，且引入近似误差。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新训练的情况下，高效地将扩散模型与多个目标对齐，并保证去噪目标无近似误差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出多目标步骤级去噪时间扩散对齐（MSDDA），通过步骤级RL公式化，推导出最优反向去噪分布的闭式解，其均值和方差直接由单目标基模型表示，无需重训。
contributions: 引入步骤级RL公式，解决了扩散模型RL微调中最优策略难以识别的问题。
提出MSDDA框架，无需重训即可对齐多个目标，且去噪目标与步骤级RL微调精确等价，无近似误差。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于可分解为单目标基模型线性组合的场景。
闭式解依赖于步骤级马尔可夫假设，实际中可能受限于模型容量。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需重训的多目标扩散模型对齐框架MSDDA，在去噪步骤层面以闭式解融合多个奖励，理论等价于步骤级RL微调且无近似误差。

papers.title: Modular Continual Learning via Zero-Leakage Reconstruction Routing and Autonomous Task Discovery
papers.abstract: Catastrophic forgetting remains a primary hurdle in sequential task learning for artificial neural networks. We propose a silicon-native modular architecture that achieves structural parameter isolation using Task-Specific Experts and a distributed, outlier-based Gatekeeper. Moving beyond traditional sequential consolidation, our framework utilizes a Simultaneous Pipeline where Teacher learning, Student distillation, and Router manifold acquisition occur in parallel while raw data is present in a localized training session. This approach ensures computational efficiency and complies with privacy mandates like GDPR by deleting raw data as soon as a task is learned. We demonstrate that a Tight-Bottleneck Autoencoder (TB-AE) can effectively distinguish semantically crowded manifolds in high-dimensional latent spaces, overcoming the posterior collapse inherent to standard variational methods. By establishing strict topological boundaries, our TB-AE resolves latent space crowding in 4096-D LLM embeddings to provide a robust, unsupervised novelty signal. Furthermore, we validate an Autonomous Retrieval mechanism that confidently identifies returning manifolds, enabling stable lifelong learning without redundant module instantiation. Empirical results demonstrate that our ``Live Distillation'' approach acts as a natural regularizer, achieving strong retention across computer vision and natural language processing domains without suffering a student fidelity gap.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种模块化持续学习方法，通过零泄漏重建路由和自主任务发现解决灾难性遗忘。
analysis.research_motivation: 灾难性遗忘是序列任务学习中人工神经网络的主要障碍，现有方法在隐私合规和计算效率方面存在不足。
analysis.problem: 如何在不违反隐私法规（如GDPR）且保持计算高效的前提下，实现持续学习中的结构参数隔离和任务发现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出硅原生模块化架构，包含任务特定专家和基于离群值的分布式门控；采用同时管道并行执行教师学习、学生蒸馏和路由器流形获取；使用紧瓶颈自编码器（TB-AE）区分高维潜在空间中的语义拥挤流形，并实现自主检索机制。
contributions: 提出零泄漏重建路由和自主任务发现的模块化持续学习框架
验证紧瓶颈自编码器在4096维LLM嵌入中解决潜在空间拥挤的有效性
展示实时蒸馏方法作为自然正则化器，在计算机视觉和自然语言处理领域实现强保留
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定架构设计，泛化性需进一步验证
自主任务发现在复杂真实场景下的鲁棒性未明确
analysis.primary_area_en: transfer learning, meta learning, and lifelong learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种模块化持续学习方法，通过零泄漏重建路由和自主任务发现解决灾难性遗忘。

papers.title: SatBLIP: Context Understanding and Feature Identification from Satellite Imagery with Vision-Language Learning
papers.abstract: Rural environmental risks are shaped by place-based conditions (e.g., housing quality, road access, land-surface patterns), yet standard vulnerability indices are coarse and provide limited insight into risk contexts. We propose SatBLIP, a satellite-specific vision-language framework for rural context understanding and feature identification that predicts county-level Social Vulnerability Index (SVI). SatBLIP addresses limitations of prior remote sensing pipelines-handcrafted features, manual virtual audits, and natural-image-trained VLMs-by coupling contrastive image-text alignment with bootstrapped captioning tailored to satellite semantics. We use GPT-4o to generate structured descriptions of satellite tiles (roof type/condition, house size, yard attributes, greenery, and road context), then fine-tune a satellite-adapted BLIP model to generate captions for unseen images. Captions are encoded with CLIP and fused with LLM-derived embeddings via attention for SVI estimation under spatial aggregation. Using SHAP, we identify salient attributes (e.g., roof form/condition, street width, vegetation, cars/open space) that consistently drive robust predictions, enabling interpretable mapping of rural risk environments.

analysis.tldr: SatBLIP通过卫星图像-文本对齐和自举字幕生成，实现农村社会脆弱性指数的可解释预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准脆弱性指数粗糙且缺乏对农村环境风险的细粒度理解，现有遥感方法依赖手工特征或自然图像训练的VLM，无法适应卫星语义。
analysis.problem: 如何从卫星图像中自动提取可解释的农村环境特征，并准确预测县级社会脆弱性指数（SVI）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用GPT-4o生成卫星图块的结构化描述，微调卫星适应的BLIP模型生成字幕，通过CLIP编码并与LLM嵌入融合进行SVI估计，结合SHAP识别关键属性。
contributions: 提出卫星专用的视觉-语言框架SatBLIP，结合对比图像-文本对齐和自举字幕生成。
利用SHAP实现可解释的农村风险环境映射，识别屋顶形式、街道宽度等关键驱动属性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖GPT-4o生成描述的质量和一致性。
仅针对县级SVI预测，泛化到其他尺度或区域需验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SatBLIP通过卫星图像-文本对齐和自举字幕生成，实现农村社会脆弱性指数的可解释预测。

papers.title: The Cost of Language: Centroid Erasure Exposes and Exploits Modal Competition in Multimodal Language Models
papers.abstract: Multimodal language models systematically underperform on visual perception tasks, yet the structure underlying this failure remains poorly understood. We propose centroid replacement, collapsing each token to its nearest K-means centroid, as a controlled probe for modal dependence. Across seven models spanning three architecture families, erasing text centroid structure costs 4$\times$ more accuracy than erasing visual centroid structure, exposing a universal imbalance where language representations overshadow vision even on tasks that demand visual reasoning. We exploit this asymmetry through text centroid contrastive decoding, recovering up to +16.9% accuracy on individual tasks by contrastively decoding against a text-centroid-erased reference. This intervention varies meaningfully with training approaches: standard fine-tuned models show larger gains (+5.6% on average) than preference-optimized models (+1.5% on average). Our findings suggest that modal competition is structurally localized, correctable at inference time without retraining, and quantifiable as a diagnostic signal to guide future multimodal training.

analysis.tldr: 多模态语言模型中语言表征系统性压制视觉表征，通过质心擦除可暴露并利用这种模态竞争，无需重训即可提升视觉任务准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态语言模型在视觉感知任务上表现不佳，但失败的结构性原因尚不明确，亟需理解模态间竞争机制以指导改进。
analysis.problem: 揭示并量化多模态语言模型中语言表征对视觉表征的压制现象，并利用该现象设计无需重训的推理时干预方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：擦除文本质心结构比擦除视觉质心结构导致准确率下降多4倍，表明语言表征系统性压制视觉表征，即使任务需要视觉推理。
analysis.method: 提出质心替换（centroid replacement）作为受控探针，将每个token替换为最近K-means质心；并基于此设计文本质心对比解码（text centroid contrastive decoding），通过对比解码擦除文本质心的参考模型来恢复视觉性能。
contributions: 提出质心替换方法作为探测模态依赖性的受控探针，发现多模态模型中语言表征压倒视觉表征的普遍不平衡。
利用该不对称性设计文本质心对比解码，无需重训即可提升视觉任务准确率（最高+16.9%）。
揭示训练方式（标准微调 vs. 偏好优化）对干预效果的影响，为未来多模态训练提供诊断信号。
analysis.experiments: 在7个模型（涵盖3种架构家族）上进行实验，报告了准确率提升（最高+16.9%，标准微调平均+5.6%，偏好优化平均+1.5%）。
limitations: 仅基于K-means质心，可能无法完全捕捉模态间复杂交互。
实验限于视觉感知任务，未验证其他模态（如音频）或更复杂推理任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多模态语言模型中语言表征系统性压制视觉表征，通过质心擦除可暴露并利用这种模态竞争，无需重训即可提升视觉任务准确率。

papers.title: VeriCWEty: Embedding enabled Line-Level CWE Detection in Verilog
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown significant improvement in RTL code generation. Despite the advances, the generated code is often riddled with common vulnerabilities and weaknesses (CWEs) that can slip by untrained eyes. Attackers can often exploit these weaknesses to fulfill their nefarious motives. Existing RTL bug-detection techniques rely on rule-based checks, formal properties, or coarse-grained structural analysis, which either fail to capture semantic vulnerabilities or lack precise localization. In our work, we bridge this gap by proposing an embedding-based bug-detection framework that detects and classifies bugs at both module and line-level granularity. Our method achieves about 89% precision in identifying common CWEs such as CWE-1244 and CWE-1245, and 96% accuracy in detecting line-level bugs.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于嵌入的Verilog代码漏洞检测框架，实现模块级和行级CWE分类，精度达89%。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM生成的RTL代码常含安全漏洞，现有检测方法（规则检查、形式化属性、粗粒度结构分析）无法捕获语义漏洞或精确定位。
analysis.problem: 如何精确检测和分类Verilog代码中的常见漏洞（CWE），并定位到行级粒度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于嵌入的漏洞检测框架，利用嵌入表示对模块级和行级漏洞进行分类。
contributions: 提出首个嵌入驱动的行级CWE检测方法，突破现有粗粒度分析局限。
在常见CWE（如CWE-1244、CWE-1245）上达到89%精度和96%行级检测准确率。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验设置，仅报告了精度和准确率结果。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定CWE类型有效，泛化性未验证。
依赖嵌入质量，对罕见漏洞可能失效。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于嵌入的Verilog代码漏洞检测框架，实现模块级和行级CWE分类，精度达89%。

papers.title: APEX-MEM: Agentic Semi-Structured Memory with Temporal Reasoning for Long-Term Conversational AI
papers.abstract: Large language models still struggle with reliable long-term conversational memory: simply enlarging context windows or applying naive retrieval often introduces noise and destabilizes responses. We present APEX-MEM, a conversational memory system that combines three key innovations: (1) a property graph which uses domain-agnostic ontology to structure conversations as temporally grounded events in an entity-centric framework, (2) append-only storage that preserves the full temporal evolution of information, and (3) a multi-tool retrieval agent that understands and resolves conflicting or evolving information at query time, producing a compact and contextually relevant memory summary. This retrieval-time resolution preserves the full interaction history while suppressing irrelevant details. APEX-MEM achieves 88.88% accuracy on LOCOMO's Question Answering task and 86.2% on LongMemEval, outperforming state-of-the-art session-aware approaches and demonstrating that structured property graphs enable more temporally coherent long-term conversational reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出APEX-MEM，结合属性图、追加存储和多工具检索代理，提升长对话记忆的时序推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型在长对话中记忆不可靠，简单扩展上下文或朴素检索会引入噪声，导致响应不稳定。
analysis.problem: 如何构建可靠的长对话记忆系统，处理信息冲突与演化，实现时序连贯的推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: APEX-MEM包含三个创新：属性图（用领域无关本体将对话结构化为以实体为中心的时序事件）、追加存储（保留信息完整时序演化）、多工具检索代理（在查询时理解并解决冲突/演化信息，生成紧凑上下文相关的记忆摘要）。
contributions: 提出结合属性图、追加存储和多工具检索的对话记忆系统APEX-MEM。
在LOCOMO和LongMemEval上取得领先性能，验证了结构化属性图对时序推理的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在LOCOMO问答任务上准确率88.88%，在LongMemEval上准确率86.2%，优于现有会话感知方法。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量本体构建，领域迁移需额外工作。
多工具检索增加推理开销，实时性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出APEX-MEM，结合属性图、追加存储和多工具检索代理，提升长对话记忆的时序推理能力。

papers.title: When PCOS Meets Eating Disorders: An Explainable AI Approach to Detecting the Hidden Triple Burden
papers.abstract: Women with polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS) face substantially elevated risks of body image distress, disordered eating, and metabolic challenges, yet existing natural language processing approaches for detecting these conditions lack transparency and cannot identify co-occurring presentations. We developed small, open-source language models to automatically detect this triple burden in social media posts with grounded explainability. We collected 1,000 PCOS-related posts from six subreddits, with two trained annotators labeling posts using guidelines operationalizing Lee et al. (2017) clinical framework. Three models (Gemma-2-2B, Qwen3-1.7B, DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B) were fine-tuned using Low-Rank Adaptation to generate structured explanations with textual evidence. The best model achieved 75.3 percent exact match accuracy on 150 held-out posts, with robust comorbidity detection and strong explainability. Performance declined with diagnostic complexity, indicating their best use is for screening rather than autonomous diagnosis.

analysis.tldr: 针对PCOS患者饮食障碍与代谢问题的三重负担，微调小型开源语言模型实现可解释的社交媒体检测。
analysis.research_motivation: PCOS患者面临身体形象困扰、饮食障碍和代谢挑战的高风险，但现有NLP方法缺乏透明性且无法识别共病表现。
analysis.problem: 如何利用可解释的AI方法从社交媒体帖子中自动检测PCOS相关的三重负担（身体形象困扰、饮食障碍、代谢挑战）及其共病情况。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型性能随诊断复杂性增加而下降，表明其更适合筛查而非自主诊断。
analysis.method: 收集1,000条PCOS相关Reddit帖子，由两名标注者基于Lee等人(2017)临床框架标注；使用LoRA微调三个小型语言模型（Gemma-2-2B、Qwen3-1.7B、DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B）生成带有文本证据的结构化解释。
contributions: 构建了PCOS相关社交媒体帖子数据集，并基于临床框架进行标注。
微调小型开源语言模型实现可解释的三重负担检测，最佳模型在150条保留集上达到75.3%精确匹配准确率。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集规模较小（1,000条），可能限制泛化性。
模型性能随诊断复杂性下降，不适合自主诊断。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对PCOS患者饮食障碍与代谢问题的三重负担，微调小型开源语言模型实现可解释的社交媒体检测。

papers.title: PAC-MCTS: Bias-Aware Pruning for Robust LLM-Guided Search and Planning
papers.abstract: As search depth increases in autonomous reasoning and embodied planning, candidate action spaces expand exponentially, often exhausting computational budgets. While heuristic pruning is a critical countermeasure, existing approaches lack formal safety guarantees when guided by surrogate evaluators such as Large Language Models (LLMs), which exhibit systematic biases. We formulate node expansion as a localized Best-Arm Identification (BAI) problem under bounded bias $L$ and derive a sample complexity upper bound of $\mathcal{O}((Δ-4L)^{-2})$, identifying $Δ> 4L$ as the regime where safe elimination is feasible. We further establish an information-theoretic lower bound of $Ω((Δ-2L)^{-2})$ that characterizes the structural limits of biased exploration. Motivated by these results, we propose PAC-MCTS, a bias-aware pruning framework that dynamically adapts confidence bounds during search. Experiments on Blocksworld and ALFWorld demonstrate that PAC-MCTS consistently improves robustness and search efficiency over strong pruning baselines, achieving up to 78\% fewer API evaluations and over 3$\times$ higher sample efficiency under strict compute budgets. Ablation studies further validate the predicted degradation behavior as evaluator bias increases.

analysis.tldr: 提出PAC-MCTS，一种在LLM引导搜索中通过偏置感知剪枝实现鲁棒高效规划的框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 在自主推理和具身规划中，搜索深度增加导致候选动作空间指数级增长，计算预算易耗尽；现有启发式剪枝方法在LLM作为代理评估器时缺乏形式化安全保证，因为LLM存在系统性偏差。
analysis.problem: 如何在LLM引导的搜索和规划中，在存在评估器偏差的情况下，实现安全且高效的剪枝，同时保证样本复杂度的理论界限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出LLM作为评估器存在系统性偏差，且偏差增大时性能会退化。
analysis.method: 将节点扩展形式化为有界偏差L下的局部最佳臂识别问题，推导出安全消除的可行条件Δ>4L，并提出PAC-MCTS框架，动态调整置信界以进行偏置感知剪枝。
contributions: 将节点扩展形式化为有界偏差下的最佳臂识别问题，并推导出样本复杂度上界和下界。
提出PAC-MCTS，一种偏置感知的剪枝框架，动态调整置信界以提升鲁棒性和搜索效率。
在Blocksworld和ALFWorld上实验验证，相比强基线，API评估次数减少78%，样本效率提升3倍以上。
analysis.experiments: 在Blocksworld和ALFWorld任务上评估，与强剪枝基线对比，PAC-MCTS在严格计算预算下实现高达78%更少的API评估和超过3倍的样本效率提升；消融研究验证了评估器偏差增大时性能退化的预测行为。
limitations: 理论分析假设偏差有界且已知，实际中偏差界可能难以准确估计。
方法在更复杂或更大规模的规划任务上的泛化性尚未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PAC-MCTS，一种在LLM引导搜索中通过偏置感知剪枝实现鲁棒高效规划的框架。

papers.title: Mistake gating leads to energy and memory efficient continual learning
