A significant portion of IT incidents are caused by changes, making it important to identify high-risk changes before deployment. This study presents a predictive incident risk scoring approach at a large international bank. The approach supports engineers during the assessment and planning phases of change deployments by predicting the potential of inducing incidents. To satisfy regulatory constraints, we built the model with auditability and explainability in mind, applying SHAP values to provide feature-level insights and ensure decisions are traceable and transparent. Using a one-year real-world dataset, we compare the existing rule-based process with three machine learning models: HGBC, LightGBM, and XGBoost. LightGBM achieved the best performance, particularly when enriched with aggregated team metrics that capture organisational context. Our results show that data-driven, interpretable models can outperform rule-based approaches while meeting compliance needs, enabling proactive risk mitigation and more reliable IT operations.

analysis.tldr: 用可解释的机器学习模型预测IT变更风险，在银行场景中优于规则方法。
analysis.research_motivation: IT变更导致大量事故，尤其在金融等受监管行业，需要提前识别高风险变更以保障运营可靠性，同时满足审计和可解释性要求。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个既准确又符合监管合规（可审计、可解释）的变更风险预测模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用SHAP值增强可解释性的机器学习模型（HGBC、LightGBM、XGBoost），并加入聚合团队指标。
contributions: 提出一种面向受监管IT环境的可解释变更风险预测方法。
通过真实银行数据验证了数据驱动模型优于规则方法，LightGBM表现最佳。
analysis.experiments: 使用一年真实银行数据集，比较规则方法与三种ML模型，LightGBM结合团队指标效果最好。
limitations: 仅在一个银行场景验证，泛化性未知。
未讨论模型在极端不平衡或冷启动情况下的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用可解释的机器学习模型预测IT变更风险，在银行场景中优于规则方法。

papers.title: From Order to Distribution: A Spectral Characterization of Forgetting in Continual Learning
papers.abstract: A central challenge in continual learning is forgetting, the loss of performance on previously learned tasks induced by sequential adaptation to new ones. While forgetting has been extensively studied empirically, rigorous theoretical characterizations remain limited. A notable step in this direction is \citet{evron2022catastrophic}, which analyzes forgetting under random orderings of a fixed task collection in overparameterized linear regression. We shift the perspective from order to distribution. Rather than asking how a fixed task collection behaves under random orderings, we study an exact-fit linear regime in which tasks are sampled i.i.d.\ from a task distribution~$Π$, and ask how the generating distribution itself governs forgetting. In this setting, we derive an exact operator identity for the forgetting quantity, revealing a recursive spectral structure. Building on this identity, we establish an unconditional upper bound, identify the leading asymptotic term, and, in generic nondegenerate cases, characterize the convergence rate up to constants. We further relate this rate to geometric properties of the task distribution, clarifying what drives slow or fast forgetting in this model.

analysis.tldr: 将遗忘研究从任务顺序转向任务分布，在过参数化线性回归中推导出遗忘量的精确算子恒等式并刻画其渐近行为。
analysis.research_motivation: 持续学习中遗忘现象被广泛研究，但缺乏严格的理论刻画；现有工作主要关注固定任务集合在随机顺序下的行为，忽略了任务生成分布本身对遗忘的影响。
analysis.problem: 在任务独立同分布采样的过参数化线性回归设定下，从分布角度理论刻画遗忘量的行为，包括上界、渐近项和收敛速率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 遗忘量具有递归谱结构，其收敛速率与任务分布的几何性质相关，非退化情形下可精确刻画至常数阶。
analysis.method: 推导遗忘量的精确算子恒等式，揭示递归谱结构；基于该恒等式建立无条件上界、识别主渐近项并刻画收敛速率。
contributions: 将遗忘分析从任务顺序视角转向任务分布视角，提出新的理论框架
推导出遗忘量的精确算子恒等式，揭示递归谱结构
建立无条件上界、渐近主项和收敛速率的完整理论刻画，并关联任务分布几何性质
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果
limitations: 理论分析限于过参数化线性回归，未扩展到非线性模型
假设任务独立同分布，可能不适用于任务间存在依赖的实际场景
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将遗忘研究从任务顺序转向任务分布，在过参数化线性回归中推导出遗忘量的精确算子恒等式并刻画其渐近行为。

papers.title: Asymmetric-Loss-Guided Hybrid CNN-BiLSTM-Attention Model for Industrial RUL Prediction with Interpretable Failure Heatmaps
papers.abstract: Turbofan engine degradation under sustained operational stress necessitates robust prognostic systems capable of accurately estimating the Remaining Useful Life (RUL) of critical components. Existing deep learning approaches frequently fail to simultaneously capture multi-sensor spatial correlations and long-range temporal dependencies, while standard symmetric loss functions inadequately penalize the safety-critical error of over-estimating residual life. This study proposes a hybrid architecture integrating Twin-Stage One-Dimensional Convolutional Neural Networks (1D-CNN), a Bidirectional Long Short-Term Memory (BiLSTM) network, and a custom Bahdanau Additive Attention mechanism. The model was trained and evaluated on the NASA Commercial Modular Aero-Propulsion System Simulation (C-MAPSS) FD001 sub-dataset employing a zero-leakage preprocessing pipeline, piecewise-linear RUL labeling capped at 130 cycles, and the NASA-specified asymmetric exponential loss function that disproportionately penalizes over-estimation to enforce industrial safety constraints. Experiments on 100 test engines achieved a Root Mean Squared Error (RMSE) of 17.52 cycles and a NASA S-Score of 922.06. Furthermore, extracted attention weight heatmaps provide interpretable, per-engine insights into the temporal progression of degradation, supporting informed maintenance decision-making. The proposed framework demonstrates competitive performance against established baselines and offers a principled approach to safe, interpretable prognostics in industrial settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出非对称损失引导的CNN-BiLSTM-Attention混合模型，用于涡扇发动机RUL预测，在C-MAPSS数据集上取得竞争性能并生成可解释故障热图。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度学习方法难以同时捕获多传感器空间相关性和长程时间依赖，且标准对称损失函数对高估剩余寿命这一安全关键错误惩罚不足，亟需安全、可解释的工业预测方法。
analysis.problem: 解决涡扇发动机RUL预测中多传感器时空特征融合不足以及高估寿命导致的安全风险问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出混合架构，包括双阶段一维CNN、BiLSTM和Bahdanau加性注意力机制，采用零泄漏预处理、分段线性RUL标签（上限130周期）和NASA指定的非对称指数损失函数。
contributions: 提出非对称损失引导的CNN-BiLSTM-Attention混合模型，在C-MAPSS FD001上实现RMSE 17.52和S-Score 922.06。
通过注意力权重热图提供可解释的每引擎退化时间进程，支持维护决策。
analysis.experiments: 在NASA C-MAPSS FD001子数据集上对100个测试引擎进行实验，得到RMSE 17.52和S-Score 922.06。
limitations: 仅在单一子数据集FD001上验证，泛化性待检验。
可解释性仅基于注意力权重，缺乏因果或反事实分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出非对称损失引导的CNN-BiLSTM-Attention混合模型，用于涡扇发动机RUL预测，在C-MAPSS数据集上取得竞争性能并生成可解释故障热图。

papers.title: MyoVision: A Mobile Research Tool and NEATBoost-Attention Ensemble Framework for Real Time Chicken Breast Myopathy Detection
papers.abstract: Woody Breast (WB) and Spaghetti Meat (SM) myopathies significantly impact poultry meat quality, yet current detection methods rely either on subjective manual evaluation or costly laboratory-grade imaging systems. We address the problem of low-cost, non-destructive multi-class myopathy classification using consumer smartphones. MyoVision is introduced as a mobile transillumination imaging framework in which 14-bit RAW images are captured and structural texture descriptors indicative of internal tissue abnormalities are extracted. To classify three categories (Normal, Woody Breast, Spaghetti Meat), we propose a NEATBoost-Attention Ensemble model, which is a neuroevolution-optimized weighted fusion of LightGBM and attention-based MLP models. Hyperparameters are automatically discovered using NeuroEvolution of Augmenting Topologies (NEAT), eliminating manual tuning and enabling architecture diversity for small tabular datasets. On a dataset of 336 fillets collected from a commercial processing facility, our method achieves 82.4% test accuracy (F1 = 0.83), outperforming conventional machine learning and deep learning baselines and matching performance reported by hyperspectral imaging systems costing orders of magnitude more. Beyond classification performance, MyoVision establishes a reproducible mobile RGB-D acquisition pipeline for multimodal meat quality research, demonstrating that consumer-grade imaging can support scalable internal tissue assessment.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于智能手机的鸡肉肌病检测框架MyoVision，结合NEATBoost-Attention集成模型实现低成本、非破坏性的多分类检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 鸡肉肌病（如木质化鸡胸和意大利面条肉）严重影响肉品质量，但现有检测方法依赖主观人工评估或昂贵的实验室成像系统，缺乏低成本、非破坏性的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 如何利用消费级智能手机实现低成本、非破坏性的多类别鸡肉肌病分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MyoVision移动透射成像框架，捕获14位RAW图像并提取结构纹理特征；构建NEATBoost-Attention集成模型，通过神经进化（NEAT）自动优化LightGBM和注意力MLP的加权融合超参数。
contributions: 首次提出基于智能手机的鸡肉肌病检测框架MyoVision，实现低成本、非破坏性检测。
提出NEATBoost-Attention集成模型，利用神经进化自动优化超参数，在小样本表格数据集上表现优异。
在336个样本数据集上达到82.4%准确率（F1=0.83），与昂贵的高光谱成像系统性能相当。
analysis.experiments: 在336个鸡胸肉样本数据集上测试，准确率82.4%，F1=0.83，优于传统机器学习和深度学习基线。
limitations: 数据集规模较小（336个样本），可能影响泛化性。
仅针对三种肌病类别，未涵盖其他类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于智能手机的鸡肉肌病检测框架MyoVision，结合NEATBoost-Attention集成模型实现低成本、非破坏性的多分类检测。

papers.title: Outperforming Self-Attention Mechanisms in Solar Irradiance Forecasting via Physics-Guided Neural Networks
papers.abstract: Accurate Global Horizontal Irradiance (GHI) forecasting is critical for grid stability, particularly in arid regions characterized by rapid aerosol fluctuations. While recent trends favor computationally expensive Transformer-based architectures, this paper challenges the prevailing "complexity-first" paradigm. We propose a lightweight, Physics-Informed Hybrid CNN-BiLSTM framework that prioritizes domain knowledge over architectural depth. The model integrates a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) for spatial feature extraction with a Bi-Directional LSTM for capturing temporal dependencies. Unlike standard data-driven approaches, our model is explicitly guided by a vector of 15 engineered features including Clear-Sky indices and Solar Zenith Angle - rather than relying solely on raw historical data. Hyperparameters are rigorously tuned using Bayesian Optimization to ensure global optimality. Experimental validation using NASA POWER data in Sudan demonstrates that our physics-guided approach achieves a Root Mean Square Error (RMSE) of 19.53 W/m^2, significantly outperforming complex attention-based baselines (RMSE 30.64 W/m^2). These results confirm a "Complexity Paradox": in high-noise meteorological tasks, explicit physical constraints offer a more efficient and accurate alternative to self-attention mechanisms. The findings advocate for a shift towards hybrid, physics-aware AI for real-time renewable energy management.

analysis.tldr: 提出物理引导的CNN-BiLSTM轻量框架，在太阳辐照度预测中超越复杂自注意力模型，揭示高噪声气象任务中的“复杂度悖论”。
analysis.research_motivation: 准确预测太阳辐照度对电网稳定至关重要，尤其在干旱地区气溶胶快速波动下。当前趋势偏向计算昂贵的Transformer架构，但存在“复杂度优先”范式，可能不适用于高噪声气象任务。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持轻量高效的同时，提升太阳辐照度预测的准确性，并挑战自注意力机制在该任务中的必要性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现“复杂度悖论”：在高噪声气象任务中，显式物理约束比复杂自注意力机制更高效准确。实验表明，物理引导的轻量模型RMSE 19.53 W/m²，显著优于注意力基线30.64 W/m²。
analysis.method: 提出物理引导的混合CNN-BiLSTM框架，集成CNN提取空间特征和BiLSTM捕获时间依赖，并利用15个工程特征（如晴空指数、太阳天顶角）显式引导模型，超参数通过贝叶斯优化调优。
contributions: 挑战了太阳辐照度预测中“复杂度优先”的范式，证明物理引导的轻量模型可超越复杂自注意力模型。
提出并验证了物理引导的CNN-BiLSTM框架，在NASA POWER数据上取得显著更低的RMSE（19.53 vs 30.64 W/m²）。
analysis.experiments: 使用NASA POWER数据在苏丹进行实验，与基于注意力的基线对比，RMSE从30.64降至19.53 W/m²。摘要未提供更多实验细节。
limitations: 仅在一个地区（苏丹）和单一数据集（NASA POWER）上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
工程特征的设计依赖领域知识，可能不易迁移到其他气象任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出物理引导的CNN-BiLSTM轻量框架，在太阳辐照度预测中超越复杂自注意力模型，揭示高噪声气象任务中的“复杂度悖论”。

papers.title: A Study of Failure Modes in Two-Stage Human-Object Interaction Detection
papers.abstract: Human-object interaction (HOI) detection aims to detect interactions between humans and objects in images. While recent advances have improved performance on existing benchmarks, their evaluations mainly focus on overall prediction accuracy and provide limited insight into the underlying causes of model failures. In particular, modern models often struggle in complex scenes involving multiple people and rare interaction combinations. In this work, we present a study to better understand the failure modes of two-stage HOI models, which form the basis of many current HOI detection approaches. Rather than constructing a large-scale benchmark, we instead decompose HOI detection into multiple interpretable perspectives and analyze model behavior across these dimensions to study different types of failure patterns. We curate a subset of images from an existing HOI dataset organized by human-object-interaction configurations (e.g., multi-person interactions and object sharing), and analyze model behavior under these configurations to examine different failure modes. This design allows us to analyze how these HOI models behave under different scene compositions and why their predictions fail. Importantly, high overall benchmark performance does not necessarily reflect robust visual reasoning about human-object relationships. We hope that this study can provide useful insights into the limitations of HOI models and offer observations for future research in this area.

analysis.tldr: 通过分解HOI检测为多个可解释维度，系统分析两阶段模型在复杂场景下的失败模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有HOI检测评估仅关注整体准确率，缺乏对模型失败原因的深入理解，尤其在多人、稀有交互组合等复杂场景下模型表现不佳。
analysis.problem: 揭示两阶段HOI检测模型在复杂场景中的具体失败模式及其成因。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高整体基准性能并不一定反映稳健的视觉推理能力；模型在多人交互、对象共享等配置下存在特定失败模式。
analysis.method: 将HOI检测分解为多个可解释视角（如多人交互、对象共享），从现有数据集中按配置筛选子集，分析模型在不同场景下的行为。
contributions: 提出一种分解式分析方法，系统研究两阶段HOI模型的失败模式。
揭示高整体性能与稳健视觉推理之间的差距，为未来研究提供观察。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅分析两阶段模型，未涵盖单阶段或其他范式。
使用现有数据集子集，可能缺乏对更广泛场景的覆盖。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过分解HOI检测为多个可解释维度，系统分析两阶段模型在复杂场景下的失败模式。

papers.title: A KL Lens on Quantization: Fast, Forward-Only Sensitivity for Mixed-Precision SSM-Transformer Models
papers.abstract: Deploying Large Language Models (LLMs) on edge devices faces severe computational and memory constraints, limiting real-time processing and on-device intelligence. Hybrid architectures combining Structured State Space Models (SSMs) with transformer-based LLMs offer a balance of efficiency and performance. Aggressive quantization can drastically cut model size and speed up inference, but its uneven effects on different components require careful management. In this work, we propose a lightweight, backpropagation-free, surrogate-based sensitivity analysis framework to identify hybrid SSM-Transformer components most susceptible to quantization-induced degradation. Relying solely on forward-pass metrics, our method avoids expensive gradient computations and retraining, making it suitable for situations where access to in-domain data is limited due to proprietary restrictions or privacy constraints. We also provide a formal analysis showing that the Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence metric better captures quantization sensitivity for Language modeling tasks than widely adopted alternatives such as mean squared error (MSE) and signal-to-quantization-noise ratio (SQNR). Through extensive experiments on SSM and hybrid architectures, our ablation studies confirm that KL-based rankings align with observed performance drops and outperform alternative metrics. This framework enables the practical deployment of advanced hybrid models on resource-constrained edge devices with minimal accuracy loss. We further validate our approach with real-world on-device profiling on Intel Lunar Lake hardware, demonstrating that KL-guided mixed-precision achieves near-FP16 perplexity with model sizes and throughput competitive with Uniform INT4 on both CPU and GPU execution modes. Code is available at https://github.com/jasonkongie/kl-ssm-quant.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于KL散度的轻量级前向传播敏感性分析框架，用于混合精度量化SSM-Transformer模型，无需反向传播和重训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 在边缘设备部署LLM面临计算和内存限制，混合SSM-Transformer架构虽平衡效率与性能，但量化对不同组件影响不均，现有方法依赖梯度计算或领域数据，不适用于隐私受限场景。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用反向传播和领域数据的情况下，快速识别混合SSM-Transformer模型中对量化最敏感的组件，以指导混合精度量化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出KL散度比MSE和SQNR更能捕捉语言建模任务的量化敏感性。
analysis.method: 提出一种基于前向传播的代理敏感性分析框架，使用KL散度作为度量，无需反向传播和重训练，通过前向传播计算各层量化前后的输出分布KL散度来评估敏感性。
contributions: 提出一种轻量级、无反向传播的敏感性分析框架，适用于混合SSM-Transformer模型的混合精度量化。
形式化证明KL散度比MSE和SQNR更适合语言建模任务的量化敏感性度量。
在Intel Lunar Lake硬件上验证了KL引导的混合精度量化在CPU和GPU模式下均能实现接近FP16的困惑度，且模型大小和吞吐量与Uniform INT4相当。
analysis.experiments: 在SSM和混合架构上进行消融实验，验证KL散度排名与性能下降一致，并在Intel Lunar Lake硬件上进行实际设备性能分析。
limitations: 方法仅针对SSM-Transformer混合架构，可能不适用于纯Transformer或纯SSM模型。
依赖前向传播，对于极深网络可能计算开销仍较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于KL散度的轻量级前向传播敏感性分析框架，用于混合精度量化SSM-Transformer模型，无需反向传播和重训练。

papers.title: Interpretable and Explainable Surrogate Modeling for Simulations: A State-of-the-Art Survey and Perspectives on Explainable AI for Decision-Making
papers.abstract: The simulation of complex systems increasingly relies on sophisticated but fundamentally opaque computational black-box simulators. Surrogate models play a central role in reducing the computational cost of complex systems simulations across a wide range of scientific and engineering domains. Notwithstanding, they inevitably inherit and often exacerbate this black-box nature, obscuring how input variables drive physical responses. Conversely, Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) offers powerful tools to unpack these models. Yet, XAI methods struggle with engineering-specific constraints, such as highly correlated inputs, dynamical systems, and rigorous reliability requirements. Consequently, surrogate modeling and XAI have largely evolved as distinct fields of research, despite their strong complementarity. To reconnect these approaches, this state-of-the-art survey provides a structured perspective that maps existing XAI techniques onto the various stages of surrogate modeling workflows for design and exploration. To ground this synthesis, we draw upon illustrative applications across both equation-based simulations and agent-based modeling. We survey a broad spectrum of techniques, highlighting their strengths for revealing interactions and supporting human comprehension. Finally, we identify pressing open challenges, including the explainability of dynamical systems and the handling of mixed-variable systems, and propose a research agenda to make explainability a core, embedded element of simulation-driven workflows from model construction through decision-making. By transforming opaque emulators into explainable tools, this agenda empowers practitioners to move beyond accelerating simulations to extracting actionable insights from complex system behaviors.

analysis.tldr: 综述将可解释AI技术映射到代理建模工作流各阶段，提出将可解释性嵌入仿真驱动决策的研究议程。
analysis.research_motivation: 复杂系统仿真依赖黑箱模拟器，代理模型虽降低计算成本但加剧了不透明性，而现有XAI方法难以处理工程约束（如高相关输入、动力系统），两者互补却独立发展，亟需整合。
analysis.problem: 如何系统地将可解释AI技术融入代理建模工作流，使仿真从加速计算转向可解释决策支持。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出代理模型继承并加剧了黑箱特性，XAI方法在工程场景（高相关输入、动力系统、可靠性要求）中面临挑战，且两个领域长期分离发展。
analysis.method: 结构化综述：将现有XAI技术映射到代理建模工作流各阶段（设计、探索等），并基于方程仿真和基于智能体的建模案例进行说明。
contributions: 提供了XAI技术与代理建模工作流各阶段的系统映射框架
识别了关键开放挑战（动力系统可解释性、混合变量处理）并提出了研究议程
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 综述性质，未提出新方法或实验验证
可能未覆盖所有XAI技术或领域特定约束
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 综述将可解释AI技术映射到代理建模工作流各阶段，提出将可解释性嵌入仿真驱动决策的研究议程。

papers.title: MaMe & MaRe: Matrix-Based Token Merging and Restoration for Efficient Visual Perception and Synthesis
papers.abstract: Token compression is crucial for mitigating the quadratic complexity of self-attention mechanisms in Vision Transformers (ViTs), which often involve numerous input tokens. Existing methods, such as ToMe, rely on GPU-inefficient operations (e.g., sorting, scattered writes), introducing overheads that limit their effectiveness. We introduce MaMe, a training-free, differentiable token merging method based entirely on matrix operations, which is GPU-friendly to accelerate ViTs. Additionally, we present MaRe, its inverse operation, for token restoration, forming a MaMe+MaRe pipeline for image synthesis. When applied to pre-trained models, MaMe doubles ViT-B throughput with a 2% accuracy drop. Notably, fine-tuning the last layer with MaMe boosts ViT-B accuracy by 1.0% at 1.1x speed. In SigLIP2-B@512 zero-shot classification, MaMe provides 1.3x acceleration with negligible performance degradation. In video tasks, MaMe accelerates VideoMAE-L by 48.5% on Kinetics-400 with only a 0.84% accuracy loss. Furthermore, MaMe achieves simultaneous improvements in both performance and speed on some tasks. In image synthesis, the MaMe+MaRe pipeline enhances quality while reducing Stable Diffusion v2.1 generation latency by 31%. Collectively, these results demonstrate MaMe's and MaRe's effectiveness in accelerating vision models. The code is available at https://github.com/cominder/mame}{https://github.com/cominder/mame.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于纯矩阵运算的Token合并与恢复方法MaMe和MaRe，高效加速视觉Transformer推理与图像生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉Transformer中自注意力机制的计算复杂度随token数量呈二次增长，现有token压缩方法（如ToMe）依赖GPU低效操作（排序、分散写入），引入额外开销限制了加速效果。
analysis.problem: 设计一种GPU友好、免训练且可微的token合并方法，在保持性能的同时显著加速ViT推理，并扩展至图像生成任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: MaMe：基于纯矩阵运算的免训练可微token合并方法，避免排序和分散写入等GPU低效操作；MaRe：MaMe的逆操作，用于token恢复，形成MaMe+MaRe流水线应用于图像合成。
contributions: 提出MaMe，一种基于纯矩阵运算的GPU友好token合并方法，可加速ViT推理。
提出MaRe，作为MaMe的逆操作，实现token恢复，并构建MaMe+MaRe流水线用于图像合成。
在图像分类、视频理解和图像生成任务上验证了方法的有效性，部分任务实现性能与速度同时提升。
analysis.experiments: 在ViT-B（ImageNet）、SigLIP2-B@512（零样本分类）、VideoMAE-L（Kinetics-400）和Stable Diffusion v2.1上评估，MaMe在ViT-B上实现2倍吞吐量（精度下降2%），微调最后一层后精度提升1.0%且加速1.1倍；SigLIP2-B上加速1.3倍且性能损失可忽略；VideoMAE-L加速48.5%且精度损失0.84%；MaMe+MaRe在SD v2.1上提升生成质量并减少31%延迟。
limitations: 方法在部分任务上仍存在精度-速度权衡，如ViT-B直接应用时精度下降2%。
MaRe的逆操作可能引入额外计算开销，需进一步优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于纯矩阵运算的Token合并与恢复方法MaMe和MaRe，高效加速视觉Transformer推理与图像生成。

papers.title: A Unified Conditional Flow for Motion Generation, Editing, and Intra-Structural Retargeting
papers.abstract: Text-driven motion editing and intra-structural retargeting, where source and target share topology but may differ in bone lengths, are traditionally handled by fragmented pipelines with incompatible inputs and representations: editing relies on specialized generative steering, while retargeting is deferred to geometric post-processing. We present a unifying perspective where both tasks are cast as instances of conditional transport within a single generative framework. By leveraging recent advances in flow matching, we demonstrate that editing and retargeting are fundamentally the same generative task, distinguished only by which conditioning signal, semantic or structural, is modulated during inference. We implement this vision via a rectified-flow motion model jointly conditioned on text prompts and target skeletal structures. Our architecture extends a DiT-style transformer with per-joint tokenization and explicit joint self-attention to strictly enforce kinematic dependencies, while a multi-condition classifier-free guidance strategy balances text adherence with skeletal conformity. Experiments on SnapMoGen and a multi-character Mixamo subset show that a single trained model supports text-to-motion generation, zero-shot editing, and zero-shot intra-structural retargeting. This unified approach simplifies deployment and improves structural consistency compared to task-specific baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一条件流模型，将运动生成、编辑和结构内重定向统一为条件传输任务。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统上文本驱动的运动编辑和结构内重定向由碎片化流程处理，输入和表示不兼容，编辑依赖专用生成引导，重定向依赖几何后处理，导致部署复杂且结构一致性差。
analysis.problem: 如何将运动生成、编辑和结构内重定向统一到一个生成框架中，消除碎片化流程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于整流流匹配的条件运动模型，联合文本提示和目标骨骼结构条件；采用DiT风格Transformer，每关节token化并显式关节自注意力强制运动学依赖；多条件无分类器引导平衡文本与骨骼一致性。
contributions: 提出统一视角，将运动编辑和结构内重定向视为条件传输实例，仅推理时调节条件信号不同。
实现单个模型支持文本到运动生成、零样本编辑和零样本结构内重定向。
analysis.experiments: 在SnapMoGen和多角色Mixamo子集上实验，单个模型支持三种任务，相比任务特定基线提升结构一致性。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量文本-运动配对数据。
零样本重定向可能对极端骨骼差异敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一条件流模型，将运动生成、编辑和结构内重定向统一为条件传输任务。

papers.title: Event-Adaptive State Transition and Gated Fusion for RGB-Event Object Tracking
papers.abstract: Existing Vision Mamba-based RGB-Event(RGBE) tracking methods suffer from using static state transition matrices, which fail to adapt to variations in event sparsity. This rigidity leads to imbalanced modeling-underfitting sparse event streams and overfitting dense ones-thus degrading cross-modal fusion robustness. To address these limitations, we propose MambaTrack, a multimodal and efficient tracking framework built upon a Dynamic State Space Model(DSSM). Our contributions are twofold. First, we introduce an event-adaptive state transition mechanism that dynamically modulates the state transition matrix based on event stream density. A learnable scalar governs the state evolution rate, enabling differentiated modeling of sparse and dense event flows. Second, we develop a Gated Projection Fusion(GPF) module for robust cross-modal integration. This module projects RGB features into the event feature space and generates adaptive gates from event density and RGB confidence scores. These gates precisely control the fusion intensity, suppressing noise while preserving complementary information. Experiments show that MambaTrack achieves state-of-the-art performance on the FE108 and FELT datasets. Its lightweight design suggests potential for real-time embedded deployment.

analysis.tldr: 提出MambaTrack，通过事件自适应状态转移和门控投影融合提升RGB-事件跟踪性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于Vision Mamba的RGB-事件跟踪方法使用静态状态转移矩阵，无法适应事件稀疏性变化，导致稀疏事件欠拟合和密集事件过拟合，降低跨模态融合鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 解决静态状态转移矩阵在RGB-事件跟踪中无法适应事件稀疏性变化的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 静态状态转移矩阵导致稀疏事件流建模不足（欠拟合）和密集事件流过拟合，影响融合鲁棒性。
analysis.method: 提出MambaTrack框架，包含事件自适应状态转移机制（动态调整状态转移矩阵）和门控投影融合模块（基于事件密度和RGB置信度生成自适应门控控制融合强度）。
contributions: 提出事件自适应状态转移机制，通过可学习标量动态调节状态演化速率，实现稀疏/密集事件流的差异化建模。
设计门控投影融合模块，利用事件密度和RGB置信度生成自适应门控，抑制噪声并保留互补信息。
analysis.experiments: 在FE108和FELT数据集上达到最先进性能，轻量设计暗示实时嵌入式部署潜力。
limitations: 可能仅在特定事件稀疏性范围内有效。
未在更多样化的数据集上验证泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MambaTrack，通过事件自适应状态转移和门控投影融合提升RGB-事件跟踪性能。

papers.title: VibeFlow: Versatile Video Chroma-Lux Editing through Self-Supervised Learning
papers.abstract: Video chroma-lux editing, which aims to modify illumination and color while preserving structural and temporal fidelity, remains a significant challenge. Existing methods typically rely on expensive supervised training with synthetic paired data. This paper proposes VibeFlow, a novel self-supervised framework that unleashes the intrinsic physical understanding of pre-trained video generation models. Instead of learning color and light transitions from scratch, we introduce a disentangled data perturbation pipeline that enforces the model to adaptively recombine structure from source videos and color-illumination cues from reference images, enabling robust disentanglement in a self-supervised manner. Furthermore, to rectify discretization errors inherent in flow-based models, we introduce Residual Velocity Fields alongside a Structural Distortion Consistency Regularization, ensuring rigorous structural preservation and temporal coherence. Our framework eliminates the need for costly training resources and generalizes in a zero-shot manner to diverse applications, including video relighting, recoloring, low-light enhancement, day-night translation, and object-specific color editing. Extensive experiments demonstrate that VibeFlow achieves impressive visual quality with significantly reduced computational overhead. Our project is publicly available at https://lyf1212.github.io/VibeFlow-webpage.

analysis.tldr: VibeFlow通过自监督学习实现视频色光编辑，无需配对数据。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频色光编辑（如光照和颜色修改）在保持结构和时间一致性方面具有挑战性，现有方法依赖昂贵的监督训练和合成配对数据。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用配对数据的情况下，实现高质量、零样本的视频色光编辑，同时保持结构保真度和时间一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出自监督框架VibeFlow，利用预训练视频生成模型的物理理解，通过解耦数据扰动管道强制模型从源视频重组结构、从参考图像提取颜色-光照线索，并引入残差速度场和结构失真一致性正则化来纠正流模型的离散化误差。
contributions: 提出自监督视频色光编辑框架VibeFlow，无需配对数据。
引入解耦数据扰动管道和残差速度场与结构失真一致性正则化，确保结构保真和时间一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在多种应用（视频重光照、重着色、低光增强、昼夜转换、对象特定颜色编辑）上进行了实验，展示了视觉质量和计算开销的显著优势。
limitations: 可能对复杂动态场景或极端光照变化处理有限。
依赖预训练视频生成模型的质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VibeFlow通过自监督学习实现视频色光编辑，无需配对数据。

papers.title: Physically-Guided Optical Inversion Enable Non-Contact Side-Channel Attack on Isolated Screens
papers.abstract: Noncontact exfiltration of electronic screen content poses a security challenge, with side-channel incursions as the principal vector. We introduce an optical projection side-channel paradigm that confronts two core instabilities: (i) the near-singular Jacobian spectrum of projection mapping breaches Hadamard stability, rendering inversion hypersensitive to perturbations; (ii) irreversible compression in light transport obliterates global semantic cues, magnifying reconstruction ambiguity. Exploiting passive speckle patterns formed by diffuse reflection, our Irradiance Robust Radiometric Inversion Network (IR4Net) fuses a Physically Regularized Irradiance Approximation (PRIrr-Approximation), which embeds the radiative transfer equation in a learnable optimizer, with a contour-to-detail cross-scale reconstruction mechanism that arrests noise propagation. Moreover, an Irreversibility Constrained Semantic Reprojection (ICSR) module reinstates lost global structure through context-driven semantic mapping. Evaluated across four scene categories, IR4Net achieves fidelity beyond competing neural approaches while retaining resilience to illumination perturbations.

analysis.tldr: 提出物理引导的光学逆方法，实现非接触式屏幕侧信道攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: 非接触式窃取电子屏幕内容构成安全挑战，现有侧信道方法面临投影映射的雅可比矩阵近奇异导致的不稳定性和光传输不可逆压缩导致的语义丢失问题。
analysis.problem: 解决光学投影侧信道攻击中重建对扰动敏感和全局语义线索丢失导致的模糊性问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 投影映射的雅可比矩阵近奇异违反Hadamard稳定性，使逆过程对扰动高度敏感；光传输中的不可逆压缩破坏全局语义线索，放大重建模糊性。
analysis.method: 提出IR4Net，融合物理正则化辐照度近似（PRIrr-Approximation）将辐射传输方程嵌入可学习优化器，结合轮廓到细节跨尺度重建机制抑制噪声传播，并引入不可逆约束语义重投影（ICSR）模块通过上下文驱动语义映射恢复全局结构。
contributions: 首次提出光学投影侧信道攻击范式，并识别两个核心不稳定性。
设计IR4Net网络，结合物理正则化和跨尺度重建实现鲁棒逆映射。
引入ICSR模块恢复不可逆压缩丢失的全局语义信息。
analysis.experiments: 在四个场景类别上评估，IR4Net在保真度上超越竞争神经方法，并对光照扰动保持鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能依赖特定散射环境假设。
未讨论对高动态范围或快速变化屏幕内容的适应性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出物理引导的光学逆方法，实现非接触式屏幕侧信道攻击。

papers.title: MERRIN: A Benchmark for Multimodal Evidence Retrieval and Reasoning in Noisy Web Environments
papers.abstract: Motivated by the underspecified, multi-hop nature of search queries and the multimodal, heterogeneous, and often conflicting nature of real-world web results, we introduce MERRIN (Multimodal Evidence Retrieval and Reasoning in Noisy Web Environments), a human-annotated benchmark for evaluating search-augmented agents. MERRIN measures AI agents' ability to identify relevant modalities, retrieve multimodal evidence, and perform multi-hop reasoning over noisy web sources. It differs from prior work in three important aspects: (1) using natural language queries without explicit modality cues, (2) incorporating underexplored modalities such as video and audio, and (3) requiring the retrieval of complex, often noisy or conflicting multimodal evidence during web search. We evaluate diverse search agents powered by ten models, including strong closed-source models (e.g., GPT-5.4-mini, Gemini 3/3.1 Flash/Pro) and open-weight models (Qwen3-4B/30B/235B), across three search settings (no search, native search, and agentic search). Our results show that MERRIN is highly challenging: the average accuracy across all agents is 22.3%, with the best-performing agent reaching only 40.1%. We further observe that while stronger agents like Gemini Deep Research achieve higher performance, gains are modest due to over-exploration; they take more steps and use more tools, but are often distracted by conflicting or partially relevant web content, leading to incorrect answers. Compared to humans, these agents consume more resources yet achieve lower accuracy, largely due to inefficient source selection and an overreliance on text modalities. These findings highlight the need for search agents capable of robust search and reasoning across diverse modalities in noisy web environments, making MERRIN a valuable testbed for evaluating such capabilities.

analysis.tldr: MERRIN是一个多模态证据检索与推理基准，在嘈杂网络环境下评估AI智能体，发现最佳智能体准确率仅40.1%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有搜索智能体评估缺乏对多模态、嘈杂网络环境的关注，且查询通常隐含多跳推理需求，而真实网络结果异构且常冲突。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能评估AI智能体在嘈杂网络环境中进行多模态证据检索与多跳推理能力的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，强智能体（如Gemini Deep Research）虽性能较高，但增益有限，因过度探索导致资源消耗大且易被冲突或部分相关的内容干扰；智能体普遍过度依赖文本模态。
analysis.method: 构建MERRIN基准，包含人类标注的多模态查询（无显式模态线索）、视频/音频等未充分探索模态，以及嘈杂/冲突的网络证据；评估多种搜索智能体（含闭源和开源模型）在无搜索、原生搜索和智能体搜索三种设置下的表现。
contributions: 提出MERRIN基准，填补多模态嘈杂网络环境下搜索智能体评估的空白。
系统评估10种模型驱动的搜索智能体，揭示当前方法在准确率（最佳40.1%）和资源效率上的不足。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅报告平均准确率22.3%和最佳40.1%，以及智能体过度探索和文本模态依赖的观察。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有真实网络噪声类型。
评估仅基于特定模型和搜索设置，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MERRIN是一个多模态证据检索与推理基准，在嘈杂网络环境下评估AI智能体，发现最佳智能体准确率仅40.1%。

papers.title: The Cognitive Circuit Breaker: A Systems Engineering Framework for Intrinsic AI Reliability
papers.abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in mission-critical software systems, detecting hallucinations and ``faked truthfulness'' has become a paramount engineering challenge. Current reliability architectures rely heavily on post-generation, black-box mechanisms, such as Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) cross-checking or LLM-as-a-judge evaluators. These extrinsic methods introduce unacceptable latency, high computational overhead, and reliance on secondary external API calls, frequently violating standard software engineering Service Level Agreements (SLAs). In this paper, we propose the Cognitive Circuit Breaker, a novel systems engineering framework that provides intrinsic reliability monitoring with minimal latency overhead. By extracting hidden states during a model's forward pass, we calculate the ``Cognitive Dissonance Delta'' -- the mathematical gap between an LLM's outward semantic confidence (softmax probabilities) and its internal latent certainty (derived via linear probes). We demonstrate statistically significant detection of cognitive dissonance, highlight architecture-dependent Out-of-Distribution (OOD) generalization, and show that this framework adds negligible computational overhead to the active inference pipeline.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种通过内部隐状态计算认知失调Δ的轻量级框架，用于实时检测LLM幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM可靠性架构依赖RAG或LLM-as-a-judge等后处理黑盒方法，引入高延迟、高计算开销和外部API依赖，难以满足软件工程SLA要求。
analysis.problem: 如何在LLM推理过程中以极低延迟和计算开销实现内在的幻觉/虚假真实性检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在模型前向传播中提取隐状态，通过线性探针计算语义置信度（softmax概率）与内部潜在确定性之间的“认知失调Δ”，作为检测信号。
contributions: 提出Cognitive Circuit Breaker框架，实现内在可靠性监控。
定义并计算认知失调Δ，用于检测LLM幻觉。
证明该方法计算开销可忽略，且具有架构相关的OOD泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖线性探针训练，可能需针对不同架构调整。
OOD泛化能力受架构限制，未在多种模型上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种通过内部隐状态计算认知失调Δ的轻量级框架，用于实时检测LLM幻觉。

papers.title: DF3DV-1K: A Large-Scale Dataset and Benchmark for Distractor-Free Novel View Synthesis
papers.abstract: Advances in radiance fields have enabled photorealistic novel view synthesis. In several domains, large-scale real-world datasets have been developed to support comprehensive benchmarking and to facilitate progress beyond scene-specific reconstruction. However, for distractor-free radiance fields, a large-scale dataset with clean and cluttered images per scene remains lacking, limiting the development. To address this gap, we introduce DF3DV-1K, a large-scale real-world dataset comprising 1,048 scenes, each providing clean and cluttered image sets for benchmarking. In total, the dataset contains 89,924 images captured using consumer cameras to mimic casual capture, spanning 128 distractor types and 161 scene themes across indoor and outdoor environments. A curated subset of 41 scenes, DF3DV-41, is systematically designed to evaluate the robustness of distractor-free radiance field methods under challenging scenarios. Using DF3DV-1K, we benchmark nine recent distractor-free radiance field methods and 3D Gaussian Splatting, identifying the most robust methods and the most challenging scenarios. Beyond benchmarking, we demonstrate an application of DF3DV-1K by fine-tuning a diffusion-based 2D enhancer to improve radiance field methods, achieving average improvements of 0.96 dB PSNR and 0.057 LPIPS on the held-out set (e.g., DF3DV-41) and the On-the-go dataset. We hope DF3DV-1K facilitates the development of distractor-free vision and promotes progress beyond scene-specific approaches.

analysis.tldr: DF3DV-1K是一个大规模无干扰新视角合成数据集，包含1048个场景，用于基准测试和提升无干扰辐射场方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有无干扰辐射场方法缺乏大规模真实世界数据集，限制了该领域的发展。
analysis.problem: 缺少同时包含干净和杂乱图像的大规模数据集，用于无干扰新视角合成的基准测试和方法改进。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含1048个场景、89,924张图像的数据集，每个场景提供干净和杂乱图像集，并设计DF3DV-41子集用于鲁棒性评估；通过微调扩散模型2D增强器提升辐射场方法性能。
contributions: 提出DF3DV-1K，包含1048个场景的大规模无干扰新视角合成数据集。
系统评估9种无干扰辐射场方法和3D高斯泼溅，识别最鲁棒的方法和最具挑战的场景。
展示数据集应用：微调扩散模型2D增强器，在保留集和On-the-go数据集上平均提升0.96 dB PSNR和0.057 LPIPS。
analysis.experiments: 在DF3DV-1K上基准测试9种无干扰辐射场方法和3D高斯泼溅，并展示通过微调扩散模型2D增强器提升性能。
limitations: 数据集仅包含静态场景，未涉及动态或移动物体。
数据集规模虽大，但可能仍无法覆盖所有真实世界干扰类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DF3DV-1K是一个大规模无干扰新视角合成数据集，包含1048个场景，用于基准测试和提升无干扰辐射场方法。

papers.title: Minimax Optimality and Spectral Routing for Majority-Vote Ensembles under Markov Dependence
papers.abstract: Majority-vote ensembles achieve variance reduction by averaging over diverse, approximately independent base learners. When training data exhibits Markov dependence, as in time-series forecasting, reinforcement learning (RL) replay buffers, and spatial grids, this classical guarantee degrades in ways that existing theory does not fully quantify. We provide a minimax characterization of this phenomenon for discrete classification in a fixed-dimensional Markov setting, together with an adaptive algorithm that matches the rate on a graph-regular subclass. We first establish an information-theoretic lower bound for stationary, reversible, geometrically ergodic chains in fixed ambient dimension, showing that no measurable estimator can achieve excess classification risk better than $Ω(\sqrt{\Tmix/n})$. We then prove that, on the AR(1) witness subclass underlying the lower-bound construction, dependence-agnostic uniform bagging is provably suboptimal with excess risk bounded below by $Ω(\Tmix/\sqrt{n})$, exhibiting a $\sqrt{\Tmix}$ algorithmic gap. Finally, we propose \emph{adaptive spectral routing}, which partitions the training data via the empirical Fiedler eigenvector of a dependency graph and achieves the minimax rate $\mathcal{O}(\sqrt{\Tmix/n})$ up to a lower-order geometric cut term on a graph-regular subclass, without knowledge of $\Tmix$. Experiments on synthetic Markov chains, 2D spatial grids, the 128-dataset UCR archive, and Atari DQN ensembles validate the theoretical predictions. Consequences for deep RL target variance, scalability via Nyström approximation, and bounded non-stationarity are developed as supporting material in the appendix.

analysis.tldr: 本文在马尔可夫依赖数据下，对多数投票集成学习进行了极小最优刻画，并提出了自适应谱路由算法。
analysis.research_motivation: 多数投票集成学习在独立同分布数据上表现良好，但当数据存在马尔可夫依赖（如时间序列、强化学习回放缓冲区）时，其方差缩减效果退化，现有理论未能充分量化这种退化。
analysis.problem: 在固定维度的马尔可夫依赖数据下，量化多数投票集成学习的分类风险下界，并设计达到该下界的自适应算法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 依赖无关的均匀装袋在AR(1)子类上是次优的，存在Ω(√T_mix)的算法差距；而自适应谱路由可达到极小最优率。
analysis.method: 提出自适应谱路由算法，通过依赖图的经验Fiedler特征向量划分训练数据，在无需知道混合时间T_mix的情况下达到极小最优率。
contributions: 建立了固定维度马尔可夫链下分类风险的极小最优下界Ω(√(T_mix/n))。
证明了依赖无关的均匀装袋在AR(1)子类上存在Ω(T_mix/√n)的次优下界。
提出了自适应谱路由算法，在正则图子类上达到极小最优率O(√(T_mix/n))。
analysis.experiments: 在合成马尔可夫链、2D空间网格、UCR 128数据集和Atari DQN集成上验证了理论预测。
limitations: 理论分析限于固定维度的离散分类问题。
算法依赖图正则子类假设，可能不适用于所有依赖结构。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文在马尔可夫依赖数据下，对多数投票集成学习进行了极小最优刻画，并提出了自适应谱路由算法。

papers.title: CausalDisenSeg: A Causality-Guided Disentanglement Framework with Counterfactual Reasoning for Robust Brain Tumor Segmentation Under Missing Modalities
papers.abstract: In clinical practice, the robustness of deep learning models for multimodal brain tumor segmentation is severely compromised by incomplete MRI data. This vulnerability stems primarily from modality bias, where models exploit spurious correlations as shortcuts rather than learning true anatomical structures. Existing feature fusion methods fail to fundamentally eliminate this dependency. To address this, we propose CausalDisenSeg, a novel Structural Causal Model (SCM)-grounded framework that achieves robust segmentation via causality-guided disentanglement and counterfactual reasoning. We reframe the problem as isolating the anatomical Causal Factor from the stylistic Bias Factor. Our framework implements a three-stage causal intervention: (1) Explicit Causal Disentanglement: A Conditional Variational Autoencoder (CVAE) coupled with an HSIC constraint mathematically enforces statistical orthogonality between anatomical and style features. (2) Causal Representation Reinforcement: A Region Causality Module (RCM) explicitly grounds causal features in physical tumor regions. (3) Counterfactual Reasoning: A dual-adversarial strategy actively suppresses the residual Natural Direct Effect (NDE) of the bias, forcing its spatial attention to be mutually exclusive from the causal path. Extensive experiments on the BraTS 2020 dataset demonstrate that CausalDisenSeg significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in accuracy and consistency across severe missing-modality scenarios. Furthermore, cross-dataset evaluation on BraTS 2023 under the same protocol yields a state-of-the-art macro-average DSC of 84.49.

analysis.tldr: 提出因果引导的解耦框架，通过反事实推理提升缺失模态下脑肿瘤分割的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态脑肿瘤分割在临床中常因MRI数据不完整而性能严重下降，现有方法无法消除模型对模态间虚假相关性的依赖。
analysis.problem: 解决缺失模态下模型利用虚假相关性作为捷径而非学习真实解剖结构导致的鲁棒性不足问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在缺失模态时性能下降主要源于模态偏差，即模型依赖模态间的虚假相关性作为捷径。
analysis.method: 基于结构因果模型（SCM）的框架，通过条件变分自编码器（CVAE）和HSIC约束实现解剖与风格特征的正交解耦，区域因果模块（RCM）将因果特征锚定于肿瘤区域，双对抗策略抑制偏差的残余自然直接效应（NDE）。
contributions: 提出因果引导的解耦框架CausalDisenSeg，将缺失模态分割问题重构为解剖因果因子与风格偏差因子的分离。
设计三阶段因果干预：显式因果解耦、因果表征强化和反事实推理，有效抑制模态偏差。
在BraTS 2020和BraTS 2023上取得SOTA结果，尤其在严重缺失模态场景下显著提升准确性和一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在BraTS 2020数据集上进行大量实验，并在BraTS 2023上跨数据集评估，取得宏观平均DSC 84.49的SOTA结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定肿瘤区域标注（如BraTS的肿瘤子区域），泛化到其他分割任务需调整。
反事实推理的双对抗策略可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出因果引导的解耦框架，通过反事实推理提升缺失模态下脑肿瘤分割的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Why Multimodal In-Context Learning Lags Behind? Unveiling the Inner Mechanisms and Bottlenecks
papers.abstract: In-context learning (ICL) enables models to adapt to new tasks via inference-time demonstrations. Despite its success in large language models, the extension of ICL to multimodal settings remains poorly understood in terms of its internal mechanisms and how it differs from text-only ICL. In this work, we conduct a systematic analysis of ICL in multimodal large language models. Using identical task formulations across modalities, we show that multimodal ICL performs comparably to text-only ICL in zero-shot settings but degrades significantly under few-shot demonstrations. To understand this gap, we decompose multimodal ICL into task mapping construction and task mapping transfer, and analyze how models establish cross-modal task mappings, and transfer them to query samples across layers. Our analysis reveals that current models lack reasoning-level alignment between visual and textual representations, and fail to reliably transfer learned task mappings to queries. Guided by these findings, we further propose a simple inference-stage enhancement method that reinforces task mapping transfer. Our results provide new insights into the mechanisms and limitations of multimodal ICL and suggest directions for more effective multimodal adaptation. Our code is available \href{https://github.com/deeplearning-wisc/Multimocal-ICL-Analysis-Framework-MGI}{here}.

analysis.tldr: 多模态上下文学习在少样本设置下性能显著下降，原因是视觉与文本表示缺乏推理级对齐且任务映射传递不可靠。
analysis.research_motivation: 上下文学习在大型语言模型中成功，但多模态扩展的内部机制和瓶颈尚不明确，理解其与纯文本ICL的差异有助于改进多模态适应。
analysis.problem: 多模态大语言模型中上下文学习在少样本演示下性能退化，需要揭示其内在机制和瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多模态ICL在零样本下与纯文本ICL相当，但在少样本演示下显著退化；模型缺乏视觉与文本表示的推理级对齐，且无法可靠地将学习到的任务映射传递到查询样本。
analysis.method: 将多模态ICL分解为任务映射构建和任务映射传递，分析跨模态任务映射的建立和跨层传递；提出推理阶段增强方法强化任务映射传递。
contributions: 系统分析多模态ICL与纯文本ICL的差异，揭示少样本性能退化的原因。
提出任务映射构建与传递的分析框架，发现推理级对齐缺失和传递不可靠的瓶颈。
提出简单有效的推理阶段增强方法，改善任务映射传递。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 增强方法可能仅适用于特定模型架构或任务。
分析可能局限于特定多模态模型和演示设置。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多模态上下文学习在少样本设置下性能显著下降，原因是视觉与文本表示缺乏推理级对齐且任务映射传递不可靠。

papers.title: From Prediction to Justification: Aligning Sentiment Reasoning with Human Rationale via Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: While Aspect-based Sentiment Analysis (ABSA) systems have achieved high accuracy in identifying sentiment polarities, they often operate as "black boxes," lacking the explicit reasoning capabilities characteristic of human affective cognition. Humans do not merely categorize sentiment; they construct causal explanations for their judgments. To bridge this gap, we propose ABSA-R1, a large language model framework designed to mimic this ``reason-before-predict" cognitive process. By leveraging reinforcement learning (RL), ABSA-R1 learns to articulate the why behind the what, generating natural language justifications that ground its sentiment predictions. We introduce a Cognition-Aligned Reward Model (formerly sentiment-aware reward model) that enforces consistency between the generated reasoning path and the final emotional label. Furthermore, inspired by metacognitive monitoring, we implement a performance-driven rejection sampling strategy that selectively targets hard cases where the model's internal reasoning is uncertain or inconsistent. Experimental results on four benchmarks demonstrate that equipping models with this explicit reasoning capability not only enhances interpretability but also yields superior performance in sentiment classification and triplet extraction compared to non-reasoning baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出ABS-R1框架，通过强化学习让ABSA模型在预测情感前先生成自然语言理由，提升可解释性和性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有ABSA系统虽准确但缺乏类人推理能力，无法解释情感判断的因果逻辑，限制了可解释性和可信度。
analysis.problem: 如何让ABSA模型在预测情感极性时同时生成合理的自然语言理由，实现'先推理后预测'的认知过程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ABS-R1框架，利用强化学习训练LLM生成情感理由；设计认知对齐奖励模型确保理由与标签一致；采用基于元认知监控的拒绝采样策略处理困难样本。
contributions: 提出ABS-R1框架，将强化学习用于ABSA的理由生成，实现'先推理后预测'。
设计认知对齐奖励模型和性能驱动的拒绝采样策略，提升理由质量和模型性能。
analysis.experiments: 在四个基准数据集上实验，ABS-R1在情感分类和三元组抽取任务上优于非推理基线。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量理由标注或奖励模型设计。
强化学习训练成本较高，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ABS-R1框架，通过强化学习让ABSA模型在预测情感前先生成自然语言理由，提升可解释性和性能。

papers.title: A Multimodal Clinically Informed Coarse-to-Fine Framework for Longitudinal CT Registration in Proton Therapy
papers.abstract: Proton therapy offers superior organ-at-risk sparing but is highly sensitive to anatomical changes, making accurate deformable image registration (DIR) across longitudinal CT scans essential. Conventional DIR methods are often too slow for emerging online adaptive workflows, while existing deep learning-based approaches are primarily designed for generic benchmarks and underutilize clinically relevant information beyond images. To address this gap, we propose a clinically scalable coarse-to-fine deformable registration framework that integrates multimodal information from the proton radiotherapy workflow to accommodate diverse clinical scenarios. The model employs dual CNN-based encoders for hierarchical feature extraction and a transformer-based decoder to progressively refine deformation fields. Beyond CT intensities, clinically critical priors, including target and organ-at-risk contours, dose distributions, and treatment planning text, are incorporated through anatomy- and risk-guided attention, text-conditioned feature modulation, and foreground-aware optimization, enabling anatomically focused and clinically informed deformation estimation. We evaluate the proposed framework on a large-scale proton therapy DIR dataset comprising 1,222 paired planning and repeat CT scans across multiple anatomical regions and disease types. Extensive experiments demonstrate consistent improvements over state-of-the-art methods, enabling fast and robust clinically meaningful registration.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种多模态临床信息引导的粗到细框架，用于质子治疗纵向CT配准，在大型数据集上优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 质子治疗对解剖变化敏感，需要精确的纵向CT可变形配准，但传统方法速度慢，现有深度学习方法未充分利用临床信息。
analysis.problem: 现有可变形配准方法在质子治疗在线自适应工作流中速度不足，且未有效整合临床先验信息（如轮廓、剂量、治疗计划文本）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出粗到细可变形配准框架，使用双CNN编码器分层提取特征，Transformer解码器逐步细化形变场，并通过解剖与风险引导注意力、文本条件特征调制和前景感知优化整合临床先验。
contributions: 提出一种多模态临床信息引导的粗到细配准框架，适用于质子治疗多种临床场景。
在包含1222对CT扫描的大型质子治疗数据集上验证，方法优于现有技术，实现快速鲁棒的临床有意义配准。
analysis.experiments: 在包含1222对计划与重复CT扫描的大型质子治疗数据集上评估，涵盖多个解剖区域和疾病类型，实验表明方法一致优于现有技术。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量临床先验（如轮廓、剂量），在标注不完整时性能可能下降。
仅在质子治疗数据集上验证，泛化到其他放疗模态或通用配准任务需进一步研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种多模态临床信息引导的粗到细框架，用于质子治疗纵向CT配准，在大型数据集上优于现有方法。

papers.title: Quantifying and Understanding Uncertainty in Large Reasoning Models
papers.abstract: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) have recently demonstrated significant improvements in complex reasoning. While quantifying generation uncertainty in LRMs is crucial, traditional methods are often insufficient because they do not provide finite-sample guarantees for reasoning-answer generation. Conformal prediction (CP) stands out as a distribution-free and model-agnostic methodology that constructs statistically rigorous uncertainty sets. However, existing CP methods ignore the logical connection between the reasoning trace and the final answer. Additionally, prior studies fail to interpret the origins of uncertainty coverage for LRMs as they typically overlook the specific training factors driving valid reasoning. Notably, it is challenging to disentangle reasoning quality from answer correctness when quantifying uncertainty, while simultaneously establishing theoretical guarantees for computationally efficient explanation methods. To address these challenges, we first propose a novel methodology that quantifies uncertainty in the reasoning-answer structure with statistical guarantees. Subsequently, we develop a unified example-to-step explanation framework using Shapley values that identifies a provably sufficient subset of training examples and their key reasoning steps to preserve the guarantees. We also provide theoretical analyses of our proposed methods. Extensive experiments on challenging reasoning datasets verify the effectiveness of the proposed methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结合共形预测和Shapley值的方法，为大型推理模型提供有统计保证的不确定性量化与解释。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型推理模型在复杂推理中表现优异，但传统不确定性量化方法缺乏有限样本保证，且忽略推理轨迹与最终答案的逻辑关联，同时难以解释不确定性覆盖的来源。
analysis.problem: 如何为大型推理模型的推理-答案结构提供有统计保证的不确定性量化，并识别关键训练样本和推理步骤以解释该保证。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一种基于共形预测的方法，量化推理-答案结构的不确定性并提供统计保证；然后利用Shapley值开发统一的示例到步骤解释框架，识别足以保持保证的训练子集和关键推理步骤。
contributions: 提出一种有统计保证的不确定性量化方法，适用于推理-答案结构。
开发基于Shapley值的解释框架，识别关键训练样本和推理步骤以解释不确定性保证。
提供理论分析并在多个推理数据集上验证有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个具有挑战性的推理数据集上进行了实验，验证了所提方法的有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖共形预测的交换性假设，在非交换场景下需调整。
Shapley值计算可能在大规模数据上存在效率问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种结合共形预测和Shapley值的方法，为大型推理模型提供有统计保证的不确定性量化与解释。

papers.title: ReSS: Learning Reasoning Models for Tabular Data Prediction via Symbolic Scaffold
papers.abstract: Tabular data remains prevalent in high-stakes domains such as healthcare and finance, where predictive models are expected to provide both high accuracy and faithful, human-understandable reasoning. While symbolic models offer verifiable logic, they lack semantic expressiveness. Meanwhile, general-purpose LLMs often require specialized fine-tuning to master domain-specific tabular reasoning. To address the dual challenges of scalable data curation and reasoning consistency, we propose ReSS, a systematic framework that bridges symbolic and neural reasoning models. ReSS leverages a decision-tree model to extract instance-level decision paths as symbolic scaffolds. These scaffolds, alongside input features and labels, guide an LLM to generate grounded natural-language reasoning that strictly adheres to the underlying decision logic. The resulting high-quality dataset is used to fine-tune a pretrained LLM into a specialized tabular reasoning model, further enhanced by a scaffold-invariant data augmentation strategy to improve generalization and explainability. To rigorously assess faithfulness, we introduce quantitative metrics including hallucination rate, explanation necessity, and explanation sufficiency. Experimental results on medical and financial benchmarks demonstrate that ReSS-trained models improve traditional decision trees and standard fine-tuning approaches up to $10\%$ while producing faithful and consistent reasoning

analysis.tldr: ReSS通过决策树提取符号脚手架，引导LLM生成忠实推理数据，微调出高精度可解释表格推理模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 表格数据在医疗、金融等高风险领域广泛应用，但现有符号模型缺乏语义表达，通用LLM需专门微调才能掌握领域推理，且面临数据扩展和推理一致性的双重挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地生成高质量、忠实于决策逻辑的表格推理数据，并训练出兼具高精度和可解释性的推理模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: ReSS框架：使用决策树提取实例级决策路径作为符号脚手架，结合输入特征和标签引导LLM生成严格遵循决策逻辑的自然语言推理，构建数据集微调预训练LLM，并采用脚手架不变数据增强策略提升泛化性和可解释性。
contributions: 提出ReSS框架，融合符号与神经推理模型，自动生成忠实于决策逻辑的表格推理数据。
引入定量评估指标（幻觉率、解释必要性、解释充分性）严格评估推理忠实性。
在医疗和金融基准上，ReSS训练的模型相比传统决策树和标准微调方法提升高达10%，同时保持忠实一致的推理。
analysis.experiments: 在医疗和金融基准数据集上评估，ReSS训练的模型相比传统决策树和标准微调方法提升高达10%，并产生忠实一致的推理。
limitations: 依赖决策树提取脚手架，可能受限于决策树本身的表达能力。
框架有效性可能高度依赖于LLM的初始能力和微调数据质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ReSS通过决策树提取符号脚手架，引导LLM生成忠实推理数据，微调出高精度可解释表格推理模型。

papers.title: On the Use of Evolutionary Optimization for the Dynamic Chance Constrained Open-Pit Mine Scheduling Problem
papers.abstract: Open-pit mine scheduling is a complex real world optimization problem that involves uncertain economic values and dynamically changing resource capacities. Evolutionary algorithms are particularly effective in these scenarios, as they can easily adapt to uncertain and changing environments. However, uncertainty and dynamic changes are often studied in isolation in real-world problems. In this paper, we study a dynamic chance-constrained open-pit mine scheduling problem in which block economic values are stochastic and mining and processing capacities vary over time. We adopt a bi-objective evolutionary formulation that simultaneously maximizes expected discounted profit and minimizes its standard deviation. To address dynamic changes, we propose a diversity-based change response mechanism that repairs a subset of infeasible solutions and introduces additional feasible solutions whenever a change is detected. We evaluate the effectiveness of this mechanism across four multi-objective evolutionary algorithms and compare it with a baseline re-evaluation-based change-response strategy. Experimental results on six mining instances demonstrate that the proposed approach consistently outperforms the baseline methods across different uncertainty levels and change frequencies.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于多样性的变化响应机制，用于动态机会约束露天矿调度问题的多目标进化优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 露天矿调度是复杂的现实优化问题，涉及不确定的经济价值和动态变化的资源容量，而现有研究通常孤立处理不确定性和动态变化。
analysis.problem: 解决同时具有随机经济价值和时变资源容量的动态机会约束露天矿调度问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用双目标进化公式同时最大化期望折现利润和最小化标准差，并提出基于多样性的变化响应机制，在检测到变化时修复部分不可行解并引入额外可行解。
contributions: 提出一种针对动态机会约束露天矿调度问题的双目标进化优化方法。
设计基于多样性的变化响应机制，有效处理动态变化。
analysis.experiments: 在六个采矿实例上，将所提方法与基线重评估变化响应策略比较，结果表明所提方法在不同不确定性和变化频率下均优于基线。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的矿场调度问题。
未讨论算法在大规模实例上的可扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于多样性的变化响应机制，用于动态机会约束露天矿调度问题的多目标进化优化。

papers.title: UniBlendNet: Unified Global, Multi-Scale, and Region-Adaptive Modeling for Ambient Lighting Normalization
papers.abstract: Ambient Lighting Normalization (ALN) aims to restore images degraded by complex, spatially varying illumination conditions. Existing methods, such as IFBlend, leverage frequency-domain priors to model illumination variations, but still suffer from limited global context modeling and insufficient spatial adaptivity, leading to suboptimal restoration in challenging regions. In this paper, we propose UniBlendNet, a unified framework for ambient lighting normalization that jointly models global illumination, multi-scale structures, and region-adaptive refinement. Specifically, we enhance global illumination understanding by integrating a UniConvNet-based module to capture long-range dependencies. To better handle complex lighting variations, we introduce a Scale-Aware Aggregation Module (SAAM) that performs pyramid-based multi-scale feature aggregation with dynamic reweighting. Furthermore, we design a mask-guided residual refinement mechanism to enable region-adaptive correction, allowing the model to selectively enhance degraded regions while preserving well-exposed areas. This design effectively improves illumination consistency and structural fidelity under complex lighting conditions. Extensive experiments on the NTIRE Ambient Lighting Normalization benchmark demonstrate that UniBlendNet consistently outperforms the baseline IFBlend and achieves improved restoration quality, while producing visually more natural and stable restoration results.

analysis.tldr: UniBlendNet通过全局、多尺度与区域自适应建模统一框架，在环境光照归一化任务上超越基线IFBlend。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有环境光照归一化方法（如IFBlend）虽利用频域先验，但全局上下文建模不足、空间自适应性有限，导致复杂光照区域恢复效果欠佳。
analysis.problem: 如何统一建模全局光照、多尺度结构和区域自适应细节，以提升复杂空间变化光照下图像恢复的质量与自然度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出IFBlend等现有方法在全局上下文建模和空间自适应性上存在瓶颈，导致挑战性区域恢复次优。
analysis.method: 提出UniBlendNet框架，包含：1) UniConvNet模块增强全局光照理解；2) 尺度感知聚合模块(SAAM)进行金字塔多尺度特征聚合与动态重加权；3) 掩码引导的残差细化机制实现区域自适应校正。
contributions: 提出UniBlendNet统一框架，联合建模全局光照、多尺度结构和区域自适应细化。
设计SAAM模块实现多尺度特征动态聚合，以及掩码引导残差细化机制提升区域自适应校正能力。
analysis.experiments: 在NTIRE环境光照归一化基准上，UniBlendNet持续优于基线IFBlend，恢复质量更优且视觉更自然稳定。
limitations: 摘要未提及在极端光照或高动态范围场景下的表现。
可能依赖掩码质量，弱监督或无掩码场景下性能未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: UniBlendNet通过全局、多尺度与区域自适应建模统一框架，在环境光照归一化任务上超越基线IFBlend。

papers.title: Young people's perceptions and recommendations for conversational generative artificial intelligence in youth mental health
papers.abstract: Conversational generative artificial intelligence agents (or genAI chatbots) could benefit youth mental health, yet young people's perspectives remain underexplored. We examined the Mental health Intelligence Agent (Mia), a genAI chatbot originally designed for professionals in Australian youth services. Following co-design, 32 young people participated in online workshops exploring their perceptions of genAI chatbots in youth mental health and to develop recommendations for reconceptualising Mia for consumers and integrating it into services. Four themes were developed: (1) Humanising AI without dehumanising care, (2) I need to know what's under the hood, (3) Right tool, right place, right time?, and (4) Making it mine on safe ground. This study offers insights into young people's attitudes, needs, and requirements regarding genAI chatbots in youth mental health, with key implications for service integration. Additionally, by co-designing system requirements, this work informs the ethics, design, development, implementation, and governance of genAI chatbots in youth mental health contexts.

analysis.tldr: 通过协同设计工作坊，探讨年轻人对青少年心理健康领域生成式AI聊天机器人的看法与建议。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式AI聊天机器人有潜力改善青少年心理健康，但年轻人的观点尚未被充分探索。
analysis.problem: 了解年轻人对青少年心理健康领域生成式AI聊天机器人的看法，并制定将其整合到服务中的建议。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用协同设计方法，组织32名年轻人参与在线工作坊，探讨他们对生成式AI聊天机器人的看法，并制定重新设计Mia（原为专业人士设计的聊天机器人）的建议。
contributions: 揭示了年轻人对青少年心理健康领域生成式AI聊天机器人的态度、需求和期望。
通过协同设计系统需求，为生成式AI聊天机器人在青少年心理健康领域的伦理、设计、开发、实施和治理提供了指导。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 样本量较小（32人），可能不具有广泛代表性。
研究基于特定聊天机器人Mia，结论可能不适用于其他生成式AI系统。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过协同设计工作坊，探讨年轻人对青少年心理健康领域生成式AI聊天机器人的看法与建议。

papers.title: H-Probes: Extracting Hierarchical Structures From Latent Representations of Language Models
papers.abstract: Representing and navigating hierarchy is a fundamental primitive of reasoning. Large language models have demonstrated proficiency in a wide variety of tasks requiring hierarchical reasoning, but there exists limited analysis on how the models geometrically represent the necessary latent constructions for such thinking. To this end, we develop H-probes, a collection of linear probes that extract hierarchical structure, specifically depth and pairwise distance, from latent representations. In synthetic tree traversal tasks, the H-probes robustly find the subspaces containing hierarchical structure necessary to complete the tasks; furthermore, in comprehensive ablation experiments, we show that these hierarchy-containing subspaces are low-dimensional, causally important for high task performance, and generalize within- and out-of-domain. Furthermore, we find analogous, though weaker, hierarchical structure in real-world hierarchical contexts such as mathematical reasoning traces. These results demonstrate that models represent hierarchy not only at the level of syntax and concepts, but at deeper levels of abstraction -- including the reasoning process itself.

analysis.tldr: 提出H-probes线性探针，从LLM隐层表征中提取层次结构（深度和距离），发现层次相关子空间低维、因果重要且可泛化。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型语言模型在层次推理任务中表现优异，但对其内部如何几何表征层次结构的理解有限，缺乏系统分析方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从语言模型的隐层表征中提取并分析层次结构（如深度和距离）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在合成树遍历任务中，H-probes能鲁棒地找到包含层次结构的子空间；消融实验表明这些子空间低维、对任务性能因果重要，且能域内和域外泛化；在数学推理等真实层次上下文中也发现类似但较弱的层次结构。
analysis.method: 开发H-probes，一组线性探针，从隐层表征中预测层次深度和成对距离，通过探针权重识别相关子空间。
contributions: 提出H-probes方法，从LLM隐层表征中提取层次结构。
通过消融实验证明层次子空间低维、因果重要且泛化。
在真实层次上下文（如数学推理）中验证了层次结构的存在。
analysis.experiments: 在合成树遍历任务和数学推理等真实层次上下文中进行实验，包括鲁棒性测试和消融实验。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 真实层次上下文中的层次结构较弱，可能限制实际应用。
仅使用线性探针，可能无法捕捉更复杂的层次表征。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出H-probes线性探针，从LLM隐层表征中提取层次结构（深度和距离），发现层次相关子空间低维、因果重要且可泛化。

papers.title: Automated detection of pediatric congenital heart disease from phonocardiograms using deep and handcrafted feature fusion
papers.abstract: Congenital heart disease (CHD) is the most common type of birth defect, impacting about 1% of live births worldwide. Echocardiography, the gold-standard diagnostic method, is costly and inaccessible in low-resource settings. Diagnosis is delayed due to limited skilled experts, whose ability to interpret pathological patterns varies significantly, causing inter- and intra-clinician variability. Therefore, we present a new method for a more accessible diagnostic modality, the digital stethoscope, to detect CHDs. Our method is based on deep feature fusion, integrating deep and handcrafted features for the automated early detection of CHDs. For this work, Phonocardiography (PCG) recordings were obtained from 751 pediatric subjects (Age:1 month- 16 years) in Bangladesh, ranging from infants to adults at four auscultation locations: mitral valve (MV), aortic valve (AV), pulmonary valve (PV), and tricuspid valve (TV). These recordings were labeled based on confirmed diagnoses by cardiologists as either cases of CHD or non-CHD. The results demonstrated that our proposed model achieved an accuracy of 92%, a sensitivity of 91%, and a specificity of 91%, based on a patient-wise split of 70% training, 20% validation, and 10% testing. Furthermore, the Area Under the Receiver Operating Characteristic curve (AUROC) of 96%, and an F1-score of 92%. This model promises efficient real-time remote detection of CHDs as a cost-effective screening tool for low-resource settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出深度与手工特征融合方法，从心音图中自动检测小儿先天性心脏病，在751名受试者上达到92%准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 先天性心脏病是常见出生缺陷，超声心动图成本高且资源匮乏地区难以普及，专家解读存在差异，亟需低成本、易获取的筛查工具。
analysis.problem: 如何利用数字听诊器采集的心音图（PCG）实现小儿先天性心脏病的自动、准确检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 融合深度特征与手工特征（如时频域特征）的深度学习模型，对四个听诊位置（二尖瓣、主动脉瓣、肺动脉瓣、三尖瓣）的PCG信号进行分类。
contributions: 提出一种深度与手工特征融合的方法用于小儿先天性心脏病检测。
在孟加拉国751名受试者上验证，达到92%准确率、96% AUROC，证明其作为低成本筛查工具的潜力。
analysis.experiments: 在751名小儿受试者（1个月-16岁）的PCG数据集上，按70%训练、20%验证、10%测试划分，得到准确率92%、灵敏度91%、特异度91%、AUROC 96%、F1-score 92%。
limitations: 数据集仅来自单一国家（孟加拉国），可能影响泛化性。
未提及与其他方法的详细对比或消融实验。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出深度与手工特征融合方法，从心音图中自动检测小儿先天性心脏病，在751名受试者上达到92%准确率。

papers.title: A 3D SAM-Based Progressive Prompting Framework for Multi-Task Segmentation of Radiotherapy-induced Normal Tissue Injuries in Limited-Data Settings
papers.abstract: Radiotherapy-induced normal tissue injury is a clinically important complication, and accurate segmentation of injury regions from medical images could facilitate disease assessment, treatment planning, and longitudinal monitoring. However, automatic segmentation of these lesions remains largely unexplored because of limited voxel-level annotations and substantial heterogeneity across injury types, lesion size, and imaging modality. To address this gap, we curate a dedicated head-and-neck radiotherapy-induced normal tissue injury dataset covering three manifestations: osteoradionecrosis (ORN), cerebral edema (CE), and cerebral radiation necrosis (CRN). We further propose a 3D SAM-based progressive prompting framework for multi-task segmentation in limited-data settings. The framework progressively incorporates three complementary prompts: text prompts for task-aware adaptation, dose-guided box prompts for coarse localization, and click prompts for iterative refinement. A small-target focus loss is introduced to improve local prediction and boundary delineation for small and sparse lesions. Experiments on ORN, CE, and CRN demonstrate that the proposed method achieves reliable segmentation performance across diverse injury types and outperforms state-of-the-art methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于3D SAM的渐进式提示框架，在有限标注数据下实现放疗正常组织损伤的多任务分割。
analysis.research_motivation: 放疗引起的正常组织损伤是临床重要并发症，但自动分割因标注稀缺、损伤类型异质性大而未被充分探索。
analysis.problem: 在有限标注数据下，实现多种放疗正常组织损伤（ORN、CE、CRN）的准确分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于3D SAM的渐进式提示框架，依次使用文本提示（任务感知）、剂量引导框提示（粗定位）和点击提示（迭代细化），并引入小目标聚焦损失改善小病灶分割。
contributions: 构建了头颈部放疗正常组织损伤专用数据集，涵盖三种损伤类型。
提出渐进式提示框架，结合文本、剂量引导框和点击提示，在有限数据下实现多任务分割。
设计小目标聚焦损失，提升小病灶和边界分割性能。
analysis.experiments: 在ORN、CE、CRN三种损伤上实验，方法优于现有方法。
limitations: 仅针对头颈部放疗损伤，泛化性未验证。
依赖剂量引导框，可能不适用于无剂量信息的场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于3D SAM的渐进式提示框架，在有限标注数据下实现放疗正常组织损伤的多任务分割。

papers.title: Non-intrusive Learning of Physics-Informed Spatio-temporal Surrogate for Accelerating Design
papers.abstract: Most practical engineering design problems involve nonlinear spatio-temporal dynamical systems. Multi-physics simulations are often performed to capture the fine spatio-temporal scales which govern the evolution of these systems. However, these simulations are often high-fidelity in nature, and can be computationally very expensive. Hence, generating data from these expensive simulations becomes a bottleneck in an end-to-end engineering design process. Spatio-temporal surrogate modeling of these dynamical systems has been a popular data-driven solution to tackle this computational bottleneck. This is because accurate machine learning models emulating the dynamical systems can be orders of magnitude faster than the actual simulations. However, one key limitation of purely data-driven approaches is their lack of generalizability to inputs outside the training distribution. In this paper, we propose a physics-informed spatio-temporal surrogate modeling (PISTM) framework constrained by the physics of the underlying dynamical system. The framework leverages state-of-the-art advancements in the field of Koopman autoencoders to learn the underlying spatio-temporal dynamics in a non-intrusive manner, coupled with a spatio-temporal surrogate model which predicts the behavior of the Koopman operator in a specified time window for unknown operating conditions. We evaluate our framework on a prototypical fluid flow problem of interest: two-dimensional incompressible flow around a cylinder.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种物理信息时空代理模型，结合Koopman自编码器非侵入式学习动力学，加速工程设计的计算过程。
analysis.research_motivation: 高保真多物理仿真计算成本高，成为工程设计瓶颈，需要高效的代理模型替代。
analysis.problem: 纯数据驱动代理模型对训练分布外输入泛化能力差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高保真仿真虽精确但计算昂贵，而数据驱动模型速度快但缺乏物理约束导致泛化不足。
analysis.main_method: 提出物理信息时空代理模型（PISTM），利用Koopman自编码器非侵入式学习时空动力学，并耦合代理模型预测未知工况下的Koopman算子行为。
analysis.key_experiments: 在二维不可压缩圆柱绕流问题上评估框架性能。
analysis.contributions: 首次将Koopman自编码器与物理约束结合用于时空代理建模，提升泛化能力。
analysis.limitations: 仅测试了单一流体问题，未讨论复杂多物理场景或高维系统的适用性。

papers.title: Asynchronous Probability Ensembling for Federated Disaster Detection
papers.abstract: Quick and accurate emergency handling in Disaster Decision Support Systems (DDSS) is often hampered by network latency and suboptimal application accuracy. While Federated Learning (FL) addresses some of these issues, it is constrained by high communication costs and rigid synchronization requirements across heterogeneous convolutional neural network (CNN) architectures. To overcome these challenges, this paper proposes a decentralized ensembling framework based on asynchronous probability aggregation and feedback distillation. By shifting the exchange unit from model weights to class-probability vectors, our method maintains data privacy, reduces communication requirements by orders of magnitude, and improves overall accuracy. This approach enables diverse CNN designs to collaborate asynchronously, enhancing disaster image identification performance even in resource-constrained settings. Experimental tests demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms traditional individual backbones and standard federated approaches, establishing a scalable and resource-aware solution for real-time disaster response.

analysis.tldr: 提出异步概率集成框架，通过交换类别概率向量而非模型权重，降低通信开销并提升灾难检测精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 灾难决策支持系统受网络延迟和精度不足限制，联邦学习虽有用但通信成本高且同步要求严格。
analysis.problem: 现有联邦学习在异构CNN架构下通信开销大、同步刚性，难以高效支持实时灾难检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 交换模型权重导致高通信成本，而类别概率向量更轻量且能保持隐私，异步聚合可适应异构设备。
analysis.main_method: 提出去中心化集成框架，采用异步概率聚合与反馈蒸馏，以类别概率向量替代模型权重进行协作。
analysis.key_experiments: 在灾难图像识别任务上测试，与传统单模型和标准联邦方法对比，显示精度提升和通信量降低。
analysis.contributions: 首次将异步概率集成用于联邦灾难检测，显著降低通信开销并支持异构CNN协作。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论概率向量聚合的隐私泄露风险，且实验场景可能未覆盖极端资源受限环境。

papers.title: Psychological Steering of Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) emulate a consistent human-like behavior that can be shaped through activation-level interventions. This paradigm is converging on additive residual-stream injections, which rely on injection-strength sweeps to approximate optimal intervention settings. However, existing methods restrict the search space and sweep in uncalibrated activation-space units, potentially missing optimal intervention conditions. Thus, we introduce a psychological steering framework that performs unbounded, fluency-constrained sweeps in semantically calibrated units. Our method derives and calibrates residual-stream injections using psychological artifacts, and we use the IPIP-NEO-120, which measures the OCEAN personality model, to compare six injection methods. We find that mean-difference (MD) injections outperform Personality Prompting (P$^2$), an established baseline for OCEAN steering, in open-ended generation in 11 of 14 LLMs, with gains of 3.6\% to 16.4\%, overturning prior reports favoring prompting and positioning representation engineering as a new frontier in open-ended psychological steering. Further, we find that a hybrid of P$^2$ and MD injections outperforms both methods in 13 of 14 LLMs, with gains over P$^2$ ranging from 5.6\% to 21.9\% and from 3.3\% to 26.7\% over MD injections. Finally, we show that MD injections align with the Linear Representation Hypothesis and provide reliable, approximately linear control knobs for psychological steering. Nevertheless, they also induce OCEAN trait covariance patterns that depart from the Big Two model, suggesting a gap between learned representations and human psychology.

analysis.tldr: 提出心理引导框架，通过语义校准的残差流注入实现大语言模型OCEAN人格控制，发现均值差注入优于提示方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有激活干预方法在未校准空间中搜索，可能错过最优设置，需要更精确的心理引导方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在大语言模型中实现语义校准、无界且流畅性约束的心理特征引导。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 均值差注入在开放生成中优于人格提示，但两者混合效果更佳，且注入方法偏离Big Two人格模型。
analysis.main_method: 基于IPIP-NEO-120心理量表推导并校准残差流注入，进行无界、流畅性约束的语义校准扫描。
analysis.key_experiments: 在14个LLM上比较6种注入方法，MD注入在11个模型中优于P²，混合方法在13个模型中最佳。
analysis.contributions: 提出语义校准的心理引导框架，证明表示工程在开放生成中优于提示方法，发现混合策略的有效性。
analysis.limitations: 注入方法导致OCEAN特质协方差偏离Big Two模型，表明学习表示与人类心理学存在差距。

papers.title: Filling in the Mechanisms: How do LMs Learn Filler-Gap Dependencies under Developmental Constraints?
papers.abstract: For humans, filler-gap dependencies require a shared representation across different syntactic constructions. Although causal analyses suggest this may also be true for LLMs (Boguraev et al., 2025), it is still unclear if such a representation also exists for language models trained on developmentally feasible quantities of data. We applied Distributed Alignment Search (DAS, Geiger et al. (2024)) to LMs trained on varying amounts of data from the BabyLM challenge (Warstadt et al., 2023), to evaluate whether representations of filler-gap dependencies transfer between wh-questions and topicalization, which greatly vary in terms of their input frequency. Our results suggest shared, yet item-sensitive mechanisms may develop with limited training data. More importantly, LMs still require far more data than humans to learn comparable generalizations, highlighting the need for language-specific biases in models of language acquisition.

analysis.tldr: 研究语言模型在有限数据下如何学习填充词-空位依赖，发现共享但项目敏感的机制，但模型仍需远超人类的数据量。
analysis.research_motivation: 人类能跨句法结构共享填充词-空位依赖表征，但语言模型在发育可行数据量下是否也能形成类似表征尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 语言模型在有限训练数据下，填充词-空位依赖的表征是否能在不同句法结构（如wh-疑问句和话题化）间迁移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在有限数据下发展出共享但项目敏感的机制，但数据需求远高于人类，表明缺乏语言特定偏置。
analysis.main_method: 使用分布式对齐搜索（DAS）分析BabyLM挑战中不同数据量训练的语言模型，评估表征在wh-疑问句和话题化间的迁移。
analysis.key_experiments: 在BabyLM数据集上训练模型，比较不同数据量下填充词-空位依赖的表征迁移效果。
analysis.contributions: 揭示了有限数据下模型能形成共享机制，但数据效率远低于人类，强调语言习得模型需引入语言特定偏置。
analysis.limitations: 仅关注两种句法结构，未覆盖其他填充词-空位依赖类型；DAS方法可能受限于模型架构。

papers.title: Deployment of AI-Assisted Interventions: Capacity Constraints and Noisy Compliance
papers.abstract: AI tools increasingly guide targeted interventions in healthcare, education, and recruiting. Algorithms score individuals, trigger outreach to those above a threshold (e.g., high-risk or high-value), and encourage them to request service; then providers deliver service to those who request. Standard practice sets the threshold and selects the algorithm to maximize predictive accuracy, assuming that better predictions yield better outcomes. We show that this approach is suboptimal when limited service capacity and probabilistic behavioral responses influence who receives service. In such settings, the optimal score threshold must balance two effects: ensuring all capacity is filled (utilization) and ensuring high-value individuals are served despite competition between requests (cannibalization). We characterize the optimal threshold and prove that policies based solely on predictive accuracy are generally suboptimal. Further, because optimal thresholds vary with service capacity, algorithm selection metrics like AUC, which weight all thresholds equally, are misaligned with operational performance. We introduce a new metric--Operational AUC (OpAUC)--and show it leads to optimal algorithm selection. Finally, we conduct a case study on sepsis early warning data and illustrate the magnitude of improvement that can be achieved from improved threshold and algorithm selection.

analysis.tldr: AI辅助干预部署中，服务容量限制和用户行为响应使仅优化预测准确率的方法次优，需平衡利用率和竞争效应。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI干预系统通常仅优化预测准确率，忽略了服务容量和用户行为对实际效果的影响，导致部署效果不佳。
analysis.problem: 在有限服务容量和用户行为响应（如请求服务概率）下，如何设置最优评分阈值并选择算法以最大化干预效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高阈值可能使服务容量闲置（利用率不足），低阈值则导致高价值个体被低价值请求挤占（竞争效应），两者需权衡。
analysis.main_method: 构建包含容量约束和用户行为响应的优化模型，提出Operational AUC (OpAUC) 指标用于算法选择。
analysis.key_experiments: 基于脓毒症早期预警数据进行案例研究，验证了优化阈值和算法选择带来的显著效果提升。
analysis.contributions: 揭示了预测准确率与操作性能的错位，提出OpAUC指标并证明其能实现最优算法选择。
analysis.limitations: 模型假设用户行为响应为概率性且已知，实际中可能难以精确估计。

papers.title: MARCA: A Checklist-Based Benchmark for Multilingual Web Search
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as sources of information, yet their reliability depends on the ability to search the web, select relevant evidence, and synthesize complete answers. While recent benchmarks evaluate web-browsing and agentic tool use, multilingual settings, and Portuguese in particular, remain underexplored. We present \textsc{MARCA}, a bilingual (English and Portuguese) benchmark for evaluating LLMs on web-based information seeking. \textsc{MARCA} consists of 52 manually authored multi-entity questions, paired with manually validated checklist-style rubrics that explicitly measure answer completeness and correctness. We evaluate 14 models under two interaction settings: a Basic framework with direct web search and scraping, and an Orchestrator framework that enables task decomposition via delegated subagents. To capture stochasticity, each question is executed multiple times and performance is reported with run-level uncertainty. Across models, we observe large performance differences, find that orchestration often improves coverage, and identify substantial variability in how models transfer from English to Portuguese. The benchmark is available at https://github.com/maritaca-ai/MARCA

analysis.tldr: 提出双语（英/葡）网页搜索基准MARCA，含52道多实体问题与清单式评分表，评估14个LLM在两种搜索框架下的表现。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准多聚焦英语，缺乏对多语言尤其是葡萄牙语网页搜索能力的系统评估。
analysis.problem: LLM在网页搜索中需检索、筛选证据并综合答案，但多语言场景下的可靠性和完整性缺乏标准化评测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在英语和葡萄牙语间表现差异显著，且任务分解（Orchestrator框架）能提升答案覆盖度，但存在随机性。
analysis.main_method: 构建52道多实体问题，每道问题配有人工验证的清单式评分表，并设计Basic（直接搜索+抓取）和Orchestrator（子代理分解任务）两种交互框架。
