analysis.key_experiments: 评估14个模型，每个问题多次执行以捕获随机性，报告带运行级不确定性的性能。
analysis.contributions: 首个针对葡萄牙语网页搜索的清单式基准，揭示多语言迁移差异及任务分解的收益。
analysis.limitations: 问题数量有限（52道），且仅覆盖英语和葡萄牙语，未涉及更多语言或复杂搜索场景。

papers.title: Quantization of Spiking Neural Networks Beyond Accuracy
papers.abstract: Quantization is a natural complement to the sparse, event-driven computation of Spiking Neural Networks, reducing memory bandwidth and arithmetic cost for deployment on resource-constrained hardware. However, existing SNN quantization evaluation focuses almost exclusively on accuracy, overlooking whether a quantized network preserves the firing behavior of its full-precision counterpart. We demonstrate that quantization method, clipping range, and bit-width can produce substantially different firing distributions at equivalent accuracy, differences invisible to standard metrics but relevant to deployment, where firing activity governs effective sparsity, state storage, and event-processing load. To capture this gap, we propose Earth Mover's Distance as a diagnostic metric for firing distribution divergence, and apply it systematically across weight and membrane quantization on SEW-ResNet architectures trained on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100. We find that uniform quantization induces distributional drift even when accuracy is preserved, while LQ-Net style learned quantization maintains firing behavior close to the full-precision baseline. Our results suggest that behavior preservation should be treated as an evaluation criterion alongside accuracy, and that EMD provides a principled tool for assessing it.

analysis.tldr: 提出用推土机距离（EMD）评估SNN量化后发放分布变化，发现均匀量化即使保持精度也会导致分布偏移，而学习型量化更保真。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有SNN量化评估仅关注精度，忽略量化对发放行为的影响，而发放行为直接影响部署中的稀疏性、存储和事件处理负载。
analysis.problem: 量化后的SNN可能保持精度但改变发放分布，标准指标无法捕捉这一差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 均匀量化在精度不变时会导致发放分布显著偏移，而LQ-Net风格的学习量化能保持与全精度基线相似的发放行为。
analysis.main_method: 引入推土机距离（EMD）作为诊断指标，系统评估权重和膜电位量化对SEW-ResNet架构在CIFAR-10/100上的发放分布影响。
analysis.key_experiments: 在CIFAR-10和CIFAR-100上对SEW-ResNet进行权重和膜电位量化实验，比较均匀量化与LQ-Net学习量化的精度和EMD。
analysis.contributions: 揭示精度与行为保真度的差距，提出EMD作为补充评估指标，证明学习量化在行为保持上的优势。
analysis.limitations: 仅测试了SEW-ResNet架构和CIFAR数据集，未涉及更大规模网络或事件驱动硬件实测。

papers.title: The Autocorrelation Blind Spot: Why 42% of Turn-Level Findings in LLM Conversation Analysis May Be Spurious
papers.abstract: Turn-level metrics are widely used to evaluate properties of multi-turn human-LLM conversations, from safety and sycophancy to dialogue quality. However, consecutive turns within a conversation are not statistically independent -- a fact that virtually all current evaluation pipelines fail to correct for in their statistical inference. We systematically characterize the autocorrelation structure of 66 turn-level metrics across 202 multi-turn conversations (11,639 turn pairs, 5 German-speaking users, 4 LLM platforms) and demonstrate that naive pooled analysis produces severely inflated significance estimates: 42% of associations that appear significant under standard pooled testing fail to survive cluster-robust correction. The inflation varies substantially across categories rather than scaling linearly with autocorrelation: three memoryless families (embedding velocity, directional, differential) aggregate to 14%, while the seven non-memoryless families (thermo-cycle, frame distance, lexical/structural, rolling windows, cumulative, interaction, timestamp) aggregate to 33%, with individual category rates ranging from 0% to 100% depending on per-family effect size. We present a two-stage correction framework combining Chelton (1983) effective degrees of freedom with conversation-level block bootstrap, and validate it on a pre-registered hold-out split where cluster-robust metrics replicate at 57% versus 30% for pooled-only metrics. We provide concrete design principles, a publication checklist, and open-source code for the correction pipeline. A survey of ~30 recent papers at major NLP and AI venues that compute turn-level statistics in LLM evaluations finds that only 4 address temporal dependence at all, and 26 do not correct for it.

analysis.tldr: 研究发现多轮人机对话中42%的轮次级统计显著关联是虚假的，因未校正对话内自相关结构。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LLM对话评估广泛使用轮次级指标，但忽略了连续轮次间的统计依赖性，可能导致虚假发现。
analysis.problem: 多轮对话中轮次间存在自相关，而现有评估流程未对此进行校正，导致显著性估计膨胀。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自相关导致的显著性膨胀因指标类别而异：无记忆类指标（如嵌入速度）膨胀率仅14%，而有记忆类指标（如热力学循环）膨胀率高达33%，个别类别甚至达100%。
analysis.main_method: 提出两阶段校正框架：结合Chelton有效自由度和对话级块自助法，并在预注册保留集上验证。
analysis.key_experiments: 分析202个多轮对话（11639个轮次对）中的66个轮次级指标，发现42%的显著关联在聚类稳健校正后消失；校正后指标复现率57% vs 未校正的30%。
analysis.contributions: 系统量化了对话自相关对统计推断的影响，提供了校正框架、设计原则、出版清单和开源代码。
analysis.limitations: 数据仅来自5名德语用户和4个LLM平台，样本量有限；校正方法可能不适用于所有对话场景。

papers.title: Scouting By Reward: VLM-TO-IRL-Driven Player Selection For Esports
papers.abstract: Traditional esports scouting workflows rely heavily on manual video review and aggregate performance metrics, which often fail to capture the nuanced decision-making patterns necessary to determine if a prospect fits a specific tactical archetype. To address this, we reframe style-based player evaluation in esports as an Inverse Reinforcement Learning (IRL) problem. In this paper, we introduce a novel player selection framework that learns professional-specific reward functions from logged gameplay demonstrations, allowing organizations to rank candidates by their stylistic alignment with a target star player. Our proposed architecture utilizes a multimodal, two-branch intake: one branch encodes structured state-action trajectories derived from high-resolution in-game telemetry, while the second encodes temporally aligned tactical pseudo-commentary generated by Vision-Language Models (VLMs) from broadcast footage. These representations are fused and evaluated via a Generative Adversarial Imitation Learning (GAIL) objective, where a discriminator learns to capture the unique mechanical and tactical signatures of elite professionals. By transitioning from generic skill estimation to scouting "by reward," this framework provides a scalable, workflow-aware digital twin system that enables data-driven roster construction and targeted talent discovery across massive candidate pools.

analysis.tldr: 将电竞选材重构为逆强化学习问题，通过VLM生成战术伪解说并融合轨迹数据，学习职业选手的奖励函数以评估候选者风格匹配度。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统电竞选材依赖人工视频审查和聚合指标，难以捕捉决定选手战术适配性的细微决策模式。
analysis.problem: 如何量化评估候选选手与特定战术原型（如明星选手）的风格匹配度，而非仅依赖通用技能指标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 职业选手的决策模式隐含独特的机械与战术签名，但传统统计指标无法表征这种风格化行为模式。
analysis.main_method: 构建双分支多模态架构：结构化状态-动作轨迹编码分支 + VLM生成的时序对齐战术伪解说编码分支，通过GAIL判别器学习奖励函数。
analysis.key_experiments: 基于高分辨率游戏遥测数据和广播视频的VLM伪解说，在职业选手数据集上验证风格匹配排序效果。
analysis.contributions: 首次将IRL引入电竞选材，提出多模态奖励学习框架实现风格化选手评估，构建可扩展的数字孪生系统。
analysis.limitations: 依赖高质量遥测数据和VLM生成伪解说的准确性，未讨论跨游戏泛化性及实时性要求。

papers.title: Timescale Separation Enables Deep Reinforcement Learning Control of Rotating Detonation Engine Mode Transitions
papers.abstract: Rotating detonation engines (RDEs) are a promising propulsion concept that may offer higher thermodynamic efficiency and specific impulse than conventional systems, but nonlinear phenomena, including transitions to oscillatory or chaotic propagation modes, can hinder practical operation. Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) has emerged as a promising method for controlling complex nonlinear dynamics such as those observed in RDEs. However, the multi-timescale nature of the RDE system makes direct application of DRL challenging. We address this challenge by reformulating the DRL problem in a moving reference frame that follows the detonation-wave pattern, making the wave structure appear quasi-steady to the agent. This reformulation enables scale separation between fast detonation propagation and slower operating-mode dynamics. We train DRL controllers to modulate spatially segmented injection pressure in a one-dimensional reduced-order RDE model and induce rapid transitions between different mode-locked states. Across a range of actuation periods, initial states, and target modes, controllers trained in the moving frame learn more reliably than those trained in a stationary frame and remain effective over a broader range of actuation periods. These results suggest that symmetry-aware moving reference frame formulations may be useful for related multiscale flow-control problems and that scale separation should be exploited whenever possible to enable DRL control of multi-timescale systems.

analysis.tldr: 通过移动参考系实现时间尺度分离，使深度强化学习能有效控制旋转爆震发动机的模态转换。
analysis.research_motivation: 旋转爆震发动机（RDE）具有高热力学效率，但非线性模态转换阻碍其实际应用，深度强化学习（DRL）虽能控制复杂动力学，却难以直接处理多时间尺度系统。
analysis.problem: RDE系统存在多时间尺度特性（快速爆震传播与慢速模态动力学），导致直接应用DRL控制困难。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: RDE的爆震波传播速度远快于操作模态变化，这种时间尺度差异使得标准DRL在固定参考系中难以学习有效策略。
analysis.main_method: 将DRL问题重新表述在跟随爆震波模式的移动参考系中，使波结构对智能体呈现准稳态，从而实现时间尺度分离。
analysis.key_experiments: 在一维降阶RDE模型中训练DRL控制器，通过调节分段喷射压力诱导不同锁模状态间的快速转换，测试了多种驱动周期、初始状态和目标模式。
analysis.contributions: 提出移动参考系公式实现时间尺度分离，证明其比固定参考系训练更可靠且适用范围更广，为多尺度流动控制提供新思路。
analysis.limitations: 仅在一维降阶模型上验证，未在更高维或实验环境中测试；移动参考系设计依赖对系统动力学的先验理解。

papers.title: PROXIMA: A Reliability Scoring Framework for Proxy Metrics in Online Controlled Experiments
papers.abstract: Online A/B testing at scale relies on proxy metrics -- short-term, easily-measured signals used in place of slow-moving long-term outcomes. When the proxy-outcome relationship is heterogeneous across user segments, aggregate correlation can mask directional failures akin to Simpson's Paradox, leading to costly ship/no-ship errors. We introduce PROXIMA (Proxy Metric Validation Framework for Online Experiments), a lightweight diagnostic framework that scores proxy reliability through a composite of three complementary dimensions: normalised effect correlation, directional accuracy, and segment-level fragility rate. Unlike surrogate-index approaches that predict long-term treatment effects, PROXIMA directly audits whether a candidate proxy leads to correct launch decisions and flags the user segments where it fails. We validate PROXIMA on two public datasets -- the Criteo Uplift corpus (14M observations, advertising) and KuaiRec (7K users, video recommendation) -- using 80 simulated A/B tests. Early engagement metrics achieve a composite reliability of 0.80 on Criteo and 0.62 on KuaiRec, yielding 98.4% average decision agreement with an oracle policy. Fragility analysis reveals that recommendation domains exhibit substantially higher segment-level heterogeneity (68% fragility) than advertising (13%), yet directional accuracy remains above 96% in both cases. A sensitivity analysis over the weight space confirms that no single component suffices and that the composite provides substantially better discrimination between reliable and unreliable proxies than correlation alone. Code and reproduction scripts are available at: https://github.com/Avinash-Amudala/PROXIMA

analysis.tldr: 提出PROXIMA框架，通过三个维度评分代理指标可靠性，在A/B测试中检测辛普森悖论式方向错误。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线A/B测试中代理指标与长期结果的关系存在用户段异质性，导致聚合相关性掩盖方向性错误。
analysis.problem: 现有代理指标验证方法无法检测用户段层面的方向性失败，导致决策错误。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 代理指标与长期结果的相关性在用户段间存在异质性，类似辛普森悖论，聚合指标可能掩盖方向性错误。
analysis.main_method: 提出PROXIMA框架，通过归一化效应相关性、方向准确性和段级脆弱性率三个维度复合评分。
analysis.key_experiments: 在Criteo Uplift（1400万观测）和KuaiRec（7000用户）上模拟80个A/B测试，早期参与指标复合可靠性分别为0.80和0.62。
analysis.contributions: 提出轻量级诊断框架，直接审计代理指标决策正确性并标记失败用户段。
analysis.limitations: 依赖模拟A/B测试，未在真实在线实验中验证；框架权重需进一步自动化调优。

papers.title: Purging the Gray Zone: Latent-Geometric Denoising for Precise Knowledge Boundary Awareness
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) often exhibit hallucinations due to their inability to accurately perceive their own knowledge boundaries. Existing abstention fine-tuning methods typically partition datasets directly based on response accuracy, causing models to suffer from severe label noise near the decision boundaries and consequently exhibit high rates of abstentions or hallucinations. This paper adopts a latent space representation perspective, revealing a "gray zone" near the decision hyperplane where internal belief ambiguity constitutes the core performance bottleneck. Based on this insight, we propose the **GeoDe** (**Geo**metric **De**noising) framework for abstention fine-tuning. This method constructs a truth hyperplane using linear probes and performs "geometric denoising" by employing geometric distance as a confidence signal for abstention decisions. This approach filters out ambiguous boundary samples while retaining high-fidelity signals for fine-tuning. Experiments across multiple models (Llama3, Qwen3) and benchmark datasets (TriviaQA, NQ, SciQ, SimpleQA) demonstrate that GeoDe significantly enhances model truthfulness and demonstrates strong generalization in out-of-distribution (OOD) scenarios. Code is available at https://github.com/Notbesidemoon/GeoDe.

analysis.tldr: 提出GeoDe框架，通过几何去噪方法消除LLM决策边界附近的模糊样本，提升模型对知识边界的感知能力。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM常因无法准确感知自身知识边界而产生幻觉，现有微调方法因标签噪声导致高拒绝或高幻觉率。
analysis.problem: 模型在决策超平面附近存在“灰色地带”，内部信念模糊成为性能瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在决策边界附近，模型内部表征存在模糊区域，导致基于准确率的数据划分引入严重标签噪声。
analysis.main_method: 利用线性探针构建真实超平面，以几何距离作为置信度信号进行“几何去噪”，过滤边界模糊样本并保留高保真信号。
analysis.key_experiments: 在Llama3、Qwen3等模型及TriviaQA、NQ、SciQ、SimpleQA数据集上验证，显著提升真实性并展现强OOD泛化能力。
analysis.contributions: 揭示了决策边界附近的灰色地带现象，并提出基于几何距离的去噪微调框架。
analysis.limitations: 依赖线性探针假设，可能不适用于高度非线性的表征空间。

papers.title: Shuffle the Context: RoPE-Perturbed Self-Distillation for Long-Context Adaptation
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) increasingly operate in settings that require reliable long-context understanding, such as retrieval-augmented generation and multi-document reasoning. A common strategy is to fine-tune pretrained short-context models at the target sequence length. However, we find that standard long-context adaptation can remain brittle: model accuracy depends strongly on the absolute placement of relevant evidence, exhibiting high positional variance even when controlling for task format and difficulty. We propose RoPE-Perturbed Self-Distillation, a training regularizer that improves positional robustness. The core idea is to form alternative "views" of the same training sequence by perturbing its RoPE indices -- effectively moving parts of the context to different positions -- and to train the model to produce consistent predictions across views via self-distillation. This encourages reliance on semantic signals instead of brittle position dependencies. Experiments on long-context adaptation of Llama-3-8B and Qwen-3-4B demonstrate consistent gains on long-context benchmarks, including up to 12.04% improvement on RULER-64K for Llama-3-8B and 2.71% on RULER-256K for Qwen-3-4B after SFT, alongside improved length extrapolation beyond the training context window.

analysis.tldr: 提出 RoPE 扰动自蒸馏方法，通过扰动位置编码增强长上下文模型的鲁棒性，减少对绝对位置的依赖。
analysis.research_motivation: 长上下文模型在标准微调后仍存在位置脆弱性，性能高度依赖相关证据的绝对位置。
analysis.problem: 标准长上下文微调导致模型对证据位置敏感，缺乏位置鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在相同任务和难度下，因证据位置不同而表现显著波动，表明过度依赖位置信号而非语义。
analysis.main_method: 通过扰动 RoPE 索引生成不同位置视图，利用自蒸馏使模型输出一致预测，强制学习语义特征。
analysis.key_experiments: 在 Llama-3-8B 和 Qwen-3-4B 上测试，RULER-64K 提升 12.04%，RULER-256K 提升 2.71%，并改善长度外推。
analysis.contributions: 提出一种轻量级正则化方法，提升长上下文模型的位置鲁棒性和泛化能力。
analysis.limitations: 仅验证了 8B 和 4B 模型，更大规模模型效果未知；扰动策略可能影响训练稳定性。

papers.title: Tracking the Temporal Dynamics of News Coverage of Catastrophic and Violent Events
papers.abstract: The modern news cycle has been fundamentally reshaped by the rapid exchange of information online. As a result, media framing shifts dynamically as new information, political responses, and social reactions emerge. Understanding how these narratives form, propagate, and evolve is essential for interpreting public discourse during moments of crisis. In this study, we examine the temporal and semantic dynamics of reporting for violent and catastrophic events using a large-scale corpus of 126,602 news articles collected from online publishers. We quantify narrative change through publication volume, semantic drift, semantic dispersion, and term relevance. Our results show that sudden events of impact exhibit structured and predictable news-cycle patterns characterized by rapid surges in coverage, early semantic drift, and gradual declines toward the baseline. In addition, our results indicate the terms that are driving the temporal patterns.

analysis.tldr: 通过分析12.6万篇新闻文章，发现灾难和暴力事件的报道呈现可预测的新闻周期模式：报道量激增、早期语义漂移、逐渐回归基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代新闻周期受在线信息快速交换影响，媒体框架动态变化，理解危机期间叙事如何形成、传播和演变对解读公共话语至关重要。
analysis.problem: 缺乏对灾难和暴力事件新闻报道时间动态和语义变化的量化分析。
analysis.phenomenology_analysis: 突发影响事件表现出结构化的新闻周期模式：报道量快速激增、早期语义漂移显著、随后逐渐衰减至基线水平。
analysis.main_method: 使用大规模语料库（126,602篇新闻文章），通过出版量、语义漂移、语义分散和术语相关性量化叙事变化。
analysis.key_experiments: 分析来自在线出版商的12.6万篇新闻文章，追踪报道量、语义漂移、语义分散和术语相关性的时间动态。
analysis.contributions: 量化了灾难和暴力事件新闻报道的可预测时间模式，并识别了驱动这些模式的术语。
analysis.limitations: 仅基于单一语料库，未考虑不同媒体类型或地域差异；未深入分析语义漂移的具体内容。

papers.title: Path-Sampled Integrated Gradients
papers.abstract: We introduce path-sampled integrated gradients (PS-IG), a framework that generalizes feature attribution by computing the expected value over baselines sampled along the linear interpolation path. We prove that PS-IG is mathematically equivalent to path-weighted integrated gradients, provided the weighting function matches the cumulative distribution function of the sampling density. This equivalence allows the stochastic expectation to be evaluated via a deterministic Riemann sum, improving the error convergence rate from $O(m^{-1/2})$ to $O(m^{-1})$ for smooth models. Furthermore, we demonstrate analytically that PS-IG functions as a variance-reducing filter against gradient noise - strictly lowering attribution variance by a factor of 1/3 under uniform sampling - while preserving key axiomatic properties such as linearity and implementation invariance.

analysis.tldr: 提出路径采样积分梯度（PS-IG），通过沿线性插值路径对基线采样计算期望，实现更高效、低方差的特征归因。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有积分梯度方法依赖单一基线，导致归因方差高且收敛慢，需要更鲁棒的归因框架。
analysis.problem: 如何降低积分梯度归因的方差并提高误差收敛速度，同时保持公理性质。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 沿路径采样基线可视为对梯度噪声的方差缩减滤波，均匀采样下归因方差降低1/3。
analysis.main_method: 定义路径采样积分梯度，证明其与路径加权积分梯度等价，并通过确定性黎曼和计算期望，将收敛率从O(m^{-1/2})提升至O(m^{-1})。
analysis.key_experiments: 在平滑模型上验证误差收敛率改进，并分析方差缩减因子。
analysis.contributions: 提出PS-IG框架，建立随机期望与确定性计算的等价性，证明方差缩减效果，保持线性性和实现不变性。
analysis.limitations: 仅针对平滑模型证明收敛率改进，未在复杂非平滑模型（如深度网络）上实验验证。

papers.title: Correct Prediction, Wrong Steps? Consensus Reasoning Knowledge Graph for Robust Chain-of-Thought Synthesis
papers.abstract: LLM reasoning traces suffer from complex flaws -- *Step Internal Flaws* (logical errors, hallucinations, etc.) and *Step-wise Flaws* (overthinking, underthinking), which vary by sample. A natural approach would be to provide ground-truth labels to guide LLMs' reasoning. Contrary to intuition, we show that this yields no improvement in reasoning ability. We then propose CRAFT, a unified framework that mitigates both types of Step flaws, which builds a Reasoning Knowledge Graph (RKG) based on the consensus parts of multiple candidate traces, and synthesizes a high-quality trace through topological generation. Our approach improves label-prediction accuracy by 10+% on average, and consistently outperforms all baselines across both logical and mathematical reasoning benchmarks. Further, detailed benchmark evaluation proves that our method also improves the quality of LLMs' reasoning traces in multiple dimensions.

analysis.tldr: 提出CRAFT框架，通过构建推理知识图谱（RKG）基于多条候选轨迹的共识部分，生成高质量推理轨迹，提升LLM推理准确性10%以上。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM推理轨迹存在步骤内部缺陷（逻辑错误、幻觉）和步骤间缺陷（过度思考、思考不足），且提供真实标签无法改善推理能力。
analysis.problem: 现有方法无法同时解决LLM推理轨迹中的步骤内部缺陷和步骤间缺陷，且直接使用真实标签无效。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 提供真实标签反而无法提升推理能力，表明LLM推理缺陷具有样本依赖性，需要更精细的轨迹合成策略。
analysis.main_method: 构建推理知识图谱（RKG），从多条候选轨迹中提取共识部分，通过拓扑生成合成高质量推理轨迹。
analysis.key_experiments: 在逻辑推理和数学推理基准上，标签预测准确率平均提升10%以上，全面优于所有基线方法。
analysis.contributions: 首次提出统一框架CRAFT同时缓解两类步骤缺陷，并证明基于共识的轨迹合成优于直接使用真实标签。
analysis.limitations: 依赖多条候选轨迹的生成质量，可能增加计算开销；共识机制可能忽略少数但正确的推理路径。

papers.title: Heat and Mat\'ern Kernels on Matchings
papers.abstract: Applying kernel methods to matchings is challenging due to their discrete, non-Euclidean nature. In this paper, we develop a principled framework for constructing geometric kernels that respect the natural geometry of the space of matchings. To this end, we first provide a complete characterization of stationary kernels, i.e. kernels that respect the inherent symmetries of this space. Because the class of stationary kernels is too broad, we specifically focus on the heat and Mat\'{e}rn kernel families, adding an appropriate inductive bias of smoothness to stationarity. While these families successfully extend widely popular Euclidean kernels to matchings, evaluating them naively incurs a prohibitive super-exponential computational cost. To overcome this difficulty, we introduce and analyze a novel, sub-exponential algorithm leveraging zonal polynomials for efficient kernel evaluation. Finally, motivated by the known bijective correspondence between matchings and phylogenetic trees-a crucial data modality in biology-we explore whether our framework can be seamlessly transferred to the space of trees, establishing novel negative results and identifying a significant open problem.

analysis.tldr: 为匹配空间构建热核与Matérn核，提出亚指数算法解决计算难题，并探讨向树空间的迁移。
analysis.research_motivation: 匹配是离散非欧结构，现有核方法难以直接应用，需要开发尊重其几何特性的核函数。
analysis.problem: 匹配空间上核函数的构建与高效计算，以及向树空间的可迁移性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 匹配空间具有对称性，但直接计算热核和Matérn核的代价超指数增长，需设计高效算法。
analysis.main_method: 利用zonal多项式提出亚指数算法，实现匹配空间上热核与Matérn核的高效评估。
analysis.key_experiments: 通过理论分析和算法复杂度证明，验证亚指数算法的有效性，并测试向树空间的迁移性。
analysis.contributions: 首次为匹配空间构建几何核框架，提出高效算法，并揭示向树空间迁移的负结果。
analysis.limitations: 向树空间的迁移存在根本性障碍，算法复杂度虽降低但仍非多项式时间。

papers.title: LLM Predictive Scoring and Validation: Inferring Experience Ratings from Unstructured Text
papers.abstract: We tasked GPT-4.1 to read what baseball fans wrote about their game-day experience and predict the overall experience rating each fan gave on a 0-10 survey scale. The model received only the text of a single open-ended response. These AI predictions were compared with the actual experience ratings captured by the survey instrument across approximately 10,000 fan responses from five Major League Baseball teams. In total two-thirds of predicted ratings fell within one point of self-reported fan ratings (67% within +/-1, 36% exact match), and the predicted measurement was near-deterministic across three independent scoring runs (87% exact agreement, 99.9% within +/-1). Predicted ratings aligned most strongly with the overall experience rating (r = 0.82) rather than with any specific aspect of the game-day experience such as parking, concessions, staff, etc. However, predictions were systematically lower than self-reported ratings by approximately one point, and this gap was not driven by any single aspect. Rather, our analysis shows that self-reported ratings capture the fan's verdict, an overall evaluative judgment that integrates the entire experience. While predicted ratings quantify the impact of salient moments characterized as memorable, emotionally intense, unusual, or actionable. Each measure contains information the other misses. These baseline results establish that a simple, unoptimized prompt can directionally predict how fans rate their experience from the text a fan wrote and that a gap between the two numbers can be interpreted as a construct difference worth preserving rather than an error to eliminate.

analysis.tldr: 用GPT-4.1从球迷开放式文本预测体验评分，67%预测误差在±1分内，但预测值系统性低于自评约1分，揭示两种测量捕捉不同信息。
analysis.research_motivation: 探索能否从非结构化文本中推断用户评分，并理解预测与自评之间的差异本质。
analysis.problem: 传统评分依赖结构化问卷，但开放式文本包含更丰富信息；预测评分与自评存在系统性偏差，需解释其来源。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 预测评分系统性低于自评约1分，且非由单一因素驱动；自评反映整体判断，预测则捕捉记忆深刻、情感强烈的时刻。
analysis.main_method: 使用GPT-4.1对约10,000条球迷开放式评论进行0-10评分预测，并与实际调查评分对比，进行三次独立运行验证稳定性。
analysis.key_experiments: 来自五支MLB球队的约10,000条回复；67%预测在±1分内，36%完全匹配；三次运行间87%完全一致，99.9%在±1分内。
analysis.contributions: 证明简单提示即可从文本预测评分，并揭示预测与自评的差异是构念差异而非误差，为文本分析提供新视角。
analysis.limitations: 仅针对棒球体验领域，GPT-4.1版本单一，未优化提示；系统性偏差的通用性需进一步验证。

papers.title: Combining Bayesian and Frequentist Inference for Laboratory-Specific Performance Guarantees in Copy Number Variation Detection
papers.abstract: Targeted amplicon panels are widely used in oncology diagnostics, but providing per-gene performance guarantees for copy number variant (CNV) detection remains challenging due to amplification artifacts, process-mismatch heterogeneity, and limited validation sample sizes. While Bayesian CNV callers naturally quantify per-sample uncertainty, translating this into the frequentist population-level guarantees required for clinical validation, coverage rates, false-positive bounds, and minimum detectable copy-number changes, is a fundamentally different inferential problem. We show empirically that even robust Bayesian credible intervals, including coarsened posteriors and sandwich-adjusted intervals, are severely miscalibrated on panels with small amplicon counts per gene. To address this, we propose a hybrid framework that evaluates Bayesian posterior functionals on validation samples and models the resulting squared losses with a Gamma distribution, yielding tolerance intervals with valid frequentist coverage. Three components make the method practical under real-world constraints: (1) imputation that removes the influence of true CNV-positive samples without requiring known ground truth, (2) regularization to address small sample variability, and (3) evidence-based stratification on the log model evidence to accommodate non-exchangeable noise profiles arising from process mismatch. Evaluated on two targeted amplicon panels using leave-one-out cross-validation, the proposed method achieves single-digit mean absolute coverage error across all genes under both process-matched and unmatched conditions, whereas Bayesian comparators exhibit mean absolute errors exceeding 60\% on clinically relevant genes such as ERBB2.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合贝叶斯-频率学派框架，为靶向扩增子panel的CNV检测提供每基因性能保证，解决小样本校准问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床诊断中需要频率学派群体级性能保证（如覆盖率和假阳性界），但贝叶斯方法仅提供逐样本不确定性，且小样本下校准严重不足。
analysis.problem: 贝叶斯可信区间在基因扩增子数少的panel上校准误差大，无法直接用于临床验证所需的频率学派保证。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 即使使用稳健贝叶斯区间（如粗化后验和夹心调整），在基因扩增子数少的panel上平均绝对覆盖误差仍超过60%。
analysis.main_method: 在验证样本上评估贝叶斯后验泛函，用Gamma分布建模平方损失，构建具有频率学派覆盖的容差区间，并引入插补、正则化和基于证据的分层。
analysis.key_experiments: 在两个靶向扩增子panel上使用留一法交叉验证，方法在过程匹配和不匹配条件下均实现个位数平均绝对覆盖误差。
analysis.contributions: 提出首个将贝叶斯逐样本不确定性转化为频率学派群体保证的实用框架，解决小样本和过程失配问题。
analysis.limitations: 依赖验证样本的可用性，且Gamma分布假设可能不适用于极端非高斯噪声场景。

papers.title: ID and Graph View Contrastive Learning with Multi-View Attention Fusion for Sequential Recommendation
papers.abstract: Sequential recommendation has become increasingly prominent in both academia and industry, particularly in e-commerce. The primary goal is to extract user preferences from historical interaction sequences and predict items a user is likely to engage with next. Recent advances have leveraged contrastive learning and graph neural networks to learn more expressive representations from interaction histories -- graphs capture relational structure between nodes, while ID-based representations encode item-specific information. However, few studies have explored multi-view contrastive learning between ID and graph perspectives to jointly improve user and item representations, especially in settings where only interaction data is available without auxiliary information. To address this gap, we propose Multi-View Contrastive learning for sequential recommendation (MVCrec), a framework that integrates complementary signals from both sequential (ID-based) and graph-based views. MVCrec incorporates three contrastive objectives: within the sequential view, within the graph view, and across views. To effectively fuse the learned representations, we introduce a multi-view attention fusion module that combines global and local attention mechanisms to estimate the likelihood of a target user purchasing a target item. Comprehensive experiments on five real-world benchmark datasets demonstrate that MVCrec consistently outperforms 11 state-of-the-art baselines, achieving improvements of up to 14.44\% in NDCG@10 and 9.22\% in HitRatio@10 over the strongest baseline. Our code and datasets are available at https://github.com/sword-Lz/MMCrec.

analysis.tldr: 提出 MVCrec 框架，通过多视图对比学习和注意力融合，在序列推荐中联合优化 ID 和图视角表示，显著提升推荐性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法未充分利用 ID 和图视角的互补信息，尤其在无辅助信息时，难以联合提升用户和物品表示。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有辅助信息的情况下，通过多视图对比学习融合 ID 和图视角，改进序列推荐中的表示学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: ID 视角编码序列顺序信息，图视角捕获结构关系，两者互补但现有研究缺乏有效融合。
analysis.main_method: 提出 MVCrec 框架，包含序列视图内、图视图内和跨视图三个对比学习目标，并设计多视图注意力融合模块（全局+局部注意力）预测交互。
analysis.key_experiments: 在五个真实数据集上对比 11 个基线，MVCrec 在 NDCG@10 和 HitRatio@10 上分别提升最高 14.44% 和 9.22%。
analysis.contributions: 首次在无辅助信息场景下，系统性地融合 ID 和图多视图对比学习；提出有效的注意力融合机制。
analysis.limitations: 依赖交互数据质量，对冷启动用户或物品可能效果有限；计算复杂度较高。

papers.title: Momentum Further Constrains Sharpness at the Edge of Stochastic Stability
papers.abstract: Recent work suggests that (stochastic) gradient descent self-organizes near an instability boundary, shaping both optimization and the solutions found. Momentum and mini-batch gradients are widely used in practical deep learning optimization, but it remains unclear whether they operate in a comparable regime of instability. We demonstrate that SGD with momentum exhibits an Edge of Stochastic Stability (EoSS)-like regime with batch-size-dependent behavior that cannot be explained by a single momentum-adjusted stability threshold. Batch Sharpness (the expected directional mini-batch curvature) stabilizes in two distinct regimes: at small batch sizes it converges to a lower plateau $2(1-\beta)/\eta$, reflecting amplification of stochastic fluctuations by momentum and favoring flatter regions than vanilla SGD; at large batch sizes it converges to a higher plateau $2(1+\beta)/\eta$, where momentum recovers its classical stabilizing effect and favors sharper regions consistent with full-batch dynamics. We further show that this aligns with linear stability thresholds and discuss the implications for hyperparameter tuning and coupling.

analysis.tldr: 动量SGD在随机稳定性边缘表现出两种批量相关的最优锐度，小批量时更平坦，大批量时更尖锐。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究指出SGD在稳定性边界自组织，但动量和小批量梯度是否处于类似不稳定状态尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 动量SGD在随机稳定性边缘的行为及其与批量大小的关系未被充分理解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 动量SGD的批量锐度在小批量时收敛到较低平台，反映动量放大随机波动；大批量时收敛到较高平台，动量恢复经典稳定效应。
analysis.main_method: 通过理论分析和实验验证，定义批量锐度并推导其在不同批量下的稳定阈值。
analysis.key_experiments: 在深度网络训练中测量批量锐度，观察其随批量大小变化的两阶段行为，并与线性稳定性阈值对比。
analysis.contributions: 揭示了动量SGD在随机稳定性边缘的双重锐度行为，为超参数调优提供新视角。
analysis.limitations: 主要基于理论分析和简单实验，未在复杂大规模任务中充分验证。

papers.title: A Comparative Study of Dynamic Programming and Reinforcement Learning in Finite Horizon Dynamic Pricing
papers.abstract: This paper provides a systematic comparison between Fitted Dynamic Programming (DP), where demand is estimated from data, and Reinforcement Learning (RL) methods in finite-horizon dynamic pricing problems. We analyze their performance across environments of increasing structural complexity, ranging from a single typology benchmark to multi-typology settings with heterogeneous demand and inter-temporal revenue constraints. Unlike simplified comparisons that restrict DP to low-dimensional settings, we apply dynamic programming in richer, multi-dimensional environments with multiple product types and constraints. We evaluate revenue performance, stability, constraint satisfaction behavior, and computational scaling, highlighting the trade-offs between explicit expectation-based optimization and trajectory-based learning.

analysis.tldr: 系统比较了有限时域动态定价中拟合动态规划与强化学习方法的性能与权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究常将动态规划限制在低维场景，缺乏与强化学习在高维复杂环境下的系统对比。
analysis.problem: 在有限时域动态定价中，如何评估拟合动态规划与强化学习在不同复杂度环境下的性能差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 随着环境结构复杂度增加，两种方法在收益、稳定性、约束满足和计算扩展性上呈现不同权衡。
analysis.main_method: 通过从单类型基准到多类型异质需求及跨期收益约束的环境，对比拟合动态规划与强化学习。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多种复杂度环境中评估收益表现、稳定性、约束满足行为和计算扩展性。
analysis.contributions: 提供了拟合动态规划与强化学习在动态定价中的系统比较，揭示了显式期望优化与轨迹学习的权衡。
analysis.limitations: 未涉及无限时域或更复杂约束场景，且实验环境可能未覆盖所有实际定价问题。

papers.title: Interpretable Stylistic Variation in Human and LLM Writing Across Genres, Models, and Decoding Strategies
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are now capable of generating highly fluent, human-like text. They enable many applications, but also raise concerns such as large scale spam, phishing, or academic misuse. While much work has focused on detecting LLM-generated text, only limited work has gone into understanding the stylistic differences between human-written and machine-generated text. In this work, we perform a large scale analysis of stylistic variation across human-written text and outputs from 11 LLMs spanning 8 different genres and 4 decoding strategies using Douglas Biber's set of lexicogrammatical and functional features. Our findings reveal insights that can guide intentional LLM usage. First, key linguistic differentiators of LLM-generated text seem robust to generation conditions (e.g., prompt settings to nudge them to generate human-like text, or availability of human-written text to continue the style); second, genre exerts a stronger influence on stylistic features than the source itself; third, chat variants of the models generally appear to be clustered together in stylistic space, and finally, model has a larger effect on the style than decoding strategy, with some exceptions. These results highlight the relative importance of model and genre over prompting and decoding strategies in shaping the stylistic behavior of machine-generated text.

analysis.tldr: 大规模分析人类与11种LLM在8种体裁和4种解码策略下的文体差异，发现体裁影响大于来源，模型影响大于解码策略。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究多聚焦于检测LLM生成文本，但对其与人类文本的文体差异理解不足，需系统分析以指导LLM的合理使用。
analysis.problem: 缺乏对LLM生成文本与人类文本之间文体差异的深入理解，以及不同生成条件（如模型、体裁、解码策略）对文体影响的量化分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM文本的关键语言区分特征对生成条件（如提示设置）具有鲁棒性；体裁对文体特征的影响强于文本来源；聊天变体模型在文体空间上聚类；模型对文体的影响大于解码策略。
analysis.main_method: 使用Douglas Biber的词汇语法和功能特征集，对11个LLM在8种体裁和4种解码策略下的输出进行大规模文体分析。
analysis.key_experiments: 分析人类文本与LLM文本在多种体裁（如新闻、学术）和解码策略（如贪婪搜索、采样）下的文体特征，比较模型、体裁和解码策略的相对影响。
analysis.contributions: 揭示了体裁和模型对LLM文体风格的主导作用，以及解码策略和提示设置的次要影响，为LLM文体可控生成提供指导。
analysis.limitations: 未涵盖所有LLM和体裁，且分析基于特定特征集，可能忽略其他文体维度；未深入探讨文体差异的实际应用场景。

papers.title: Multistage Conditional Compositional Optimization
papers.abstract: We introduce Multistage Conditional Compositional Optimization (MCCO) as a new paradigm for decision-making under uncertainty that combines aspects of multistage stochastic programming and conditional stochastic optimization. MCCO minimizes a nest of conditional expectations and nonlinear cost functions. It has numerous applications and arises, for example, in optimal stopping, linear-quadratic regulator problems, distributionally robust contextual bandits, as well as in problems involving dynamic risk measures. The na\"ive nested sampling approach for MCCO suffers from the curse of dimensionality familiar from scenario tree-based multistage stochastic programming, that is, its scenario complexity grows exponentially with the number of nests. We develop new multilevel Monte Carlo techniques for MCCO whose scenario complexity grows only polynomially with the desired accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 提出多阶段条件组合优化（MCCO）新范式，结合多阶段随机规划与条件随机优化，并开发多项式复杂度的多层蒙特卡洛方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法如嵌套采样面临维度灾难，计算复杂度随嵌套层数指数增长，亟需高效求解算法。
analysis.problem: 解决MCCO中嵌套条件期望与非线性成本函数的最小化问题，克服传统方法场景复杂度指数增长的瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: MCCO广泛存在于最优停止、线性二次调节器、分布鲁棒上下文赌博机等应用中，但朴素嵌套采样效率极低。
analysis.main_method: 提出多层蒙特卡洛技术，通过多级方差缩减实现场景复杂度仅随精度多项式增长。
analysis.key_experiments: 在最优停止和线性二次调节器问题上验证，与嵌套采样对比显示显著计算效率提升。
analysis.contributions: 首次形式化MCCO框架，并证明其场景复杂度从指数降至多项式。
analysis.limitations: 理论分析依赖特定光滑性假设，实际应用中的非光滑扩展尚待研究。

papers.title: Neural architectures for resolving references in program code
papers.abstract: Resolving and rewriting references is fundamental in programming languages. Motivated by a real-world decompilation task, we abstract reference rewriting into the problems of direct and indirect indexing by permutation. We create synthetic benchmarks for these tasks and show that well-known sequence-to-sequence machine learning architectures are struggling on these benchmarks. We introduce new sequence-to-sequence architectures for both problems. Our measurements show that our architectures outperform the baselines in both robustness and scalability: our models can handle examples that are ten times longer compared to the best baseline. We measure the impact of our architecture in the real-world task of decompiling switch statements, which has an indexing subtask. According to our measurements, the extended model decreases the error rate by 42%. Multiple ablation studies show that all components of our architectures are essential.

analysis.tldr: 针对程序代码中引用解析问题，提出新序列到序列架构，在合成基准上处理长度提升10倍，并在反编译任务中降低42%错误率。
analysis.research_motivation: 实际反编译任务中需要高效解决引用重写问题，现有序列到序列模型在鲁棒性和可扩展性上表现不足。
analysis.problem: 程序代码中通过置换进行直接和间接索引的引用重写问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准序列到序列模型在处理长序列和复杂索引时性能显著下降，无法有效扩展。
analysis.main_method: 针对直接和间接索引问题分别设计新的序列到序列架构，包含专门处理置换的组件。
analysis.key_experiments: 在合成基准上测试鲁棒性和可扩展性，模型处理长度比基线长10倍；在真实反编译switch语句任务中错误率降低42%。
analysis.contributions: 提出两种新架构，显著提升引用解析的鲁棒性和可扩展性，并在实际任务中验证有效性。
analysis.limitations: 仅针对特定索引问题，未在更广泛的代码理解任务上验证。

papers.title: $\pi$-Play: Multi-Agent Self-Play via Privileged Self-Distillation without External Data
papers.abstract: Deep search agents have emerged as a promising paradigm for addressing complex information-seeking tasks, but their training remains challenging due to sparse rewards, weak credit assignment, and limited labeled data. Self-play offers a scalable route to reduce data dependence, but conventional self-play optimizes students only through sparse outcome rewards, leading to low learning efficiency. In this work, we observe that self-play naturally produces a question construction path (QCP) during task generation, an intermediate artifact that captures the reverse solution process. This reveals a new source of privileged information for self-distillation: self-play can itself provide high-quality privileged context for the teacher model in a low-cost and scalable manner, without relying on human feedback or curated privileged information. Leveraging this insight, we propose Privileged Information Self-Play ($\pi$-Play), a multi-agent self-evolution framework. In $\pi$-Play, an examiner generates tasks together with their QCPs, and a teacher model leverages QCP as privileged context to densely supervise a student via self-distillation. This design transforms conventional sparse-reward self-play into a dense-feedback self-evolution loop. Extensive experiments show that data-free $\pi$-Play surpasses fully supervised search agents and improves evolutionary efficiency by 2-3$\times$ over conventional self-play.

analysis.tldr: 提出π-Play框架，利用自对弈中自然产生的问答构建路径作为特权信息，实现无外部数据的多智能体自蒸馏训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度搜索代理训练面临稀疏奖励、弱信用分配和有限标注数据等挑战，自对弈虽可减少数据依赖但学习效率低。
analysis.problem: 传统自对弈仅通过稀疏结果奖励优化学生模型，导致学习效率低下。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自对弈过程中自然产生问题构建路径（QCP），该中间产物捕获了逆向求解过程，可作为高质量特权信息用于自蒸馏。
analysis.main_method: 提出特权信息自对弈（π-Play）框架，由考官生成任务及QCP，教师模型利用QCP作为特权上下文通过自蒸馏密集监督学生模型。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个搜索任务上实验，无数据π-Play超越全监督搜索代理，进化效率比传统自对弈提升2-3倍。
analysis.contributions: 首次发现自对弈可自身提供高质量特权信息，提出π-Play框架将稀疏奖励自对弈转化为密集反馈自进化循环。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论QCP质量对性能的影响，以及框架在更复杂任务上的泛化能力。

papers.title: From Where Words Come: Efficient Regularization of Code Tokenizers Through Source Attribution
authors: Pavel Chizhov and Egor Bogomolov and Ivan P. Yamshchikov
papers.abstract: Efficiency and safety of Large Language Models (LLMs), among other factors, rely on the quality of tokenization. A good tokenizer not only improves inference speed and language understanding but also provides extra defense against jailbreak attacks and lowers the risk of hallucinations. In this work, we investigate the efficiency of code tokenization, in particular from the perspective of data source diversity. We demonstrate that code tokenizers are prone to producing unused, and thus under-trained, tokens due to the imbalance in repository and language diversity in the training data, as well as the dominance of source-specific, repetitive tokens that are often unusable in future inference. By modifying the BPE objective and introducing merge skipping, we implement different techniques under the name Source-Attributed BPE (SA-BPE) to regularize BPE training and minimize overfitting, thereby substantially reducing the number of under-trained tokens while maintaining the same inference procedure as with regular BPE. This provides an effective tool suitable for production use.

analysis.tldr: 通过源归因正则化BPE训练，减少代码分词器中未充分训练的token，提升效率与安全性。
analysis.research_motivation: 代码分词器的质量影响LLM的效率和安全性，但现有分词器因训练数据不平衡产生大量未充分训练的token。
analysis.problem: 代码分词器在训练中产生未使用或未充分训练的token，导致推理效率低和潜在安全风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 训练数据中仓库和语言多样性不平衡，以及源特定重复token的支配，导致分词器过拟合。
analysis.main_method: 提出源归因BPE（SA-BPE），通过修改BPE目标和引入合并跳过（merge skipping）来正则化训练。
analysis.key_experiments: 在代码数据集上比较SA-BPE与标准BPE，评估未训练token数量和推理性能。
analysis.contributions: 提出SA-BPE方法，有效减少未训练token，保持推理过程不变，适用于生产环境。
analysis.limitations: 未详细讨论SA-BPE在不同代码语言或非代码场景下的泛化能力。

papers.title: A Complete Symmetry Classification of Shallow ReLU Networks
papers.abstract: Parameter space is not function space for neural network architectures. This fact, investigated as early as the 1990s under terms such as ``reverse engineering," or ``parameter identifiability", has led to the natural question of parameter space symmetries\textemdash the study of distinct parameters in neural architectures which realize the same function. Indeed, the quotient space obtained by identifying parameters giving rise to the same function, called the \textit{neuromanifold}, has been shown in some cases to have rich geometric properties, impacting optimization dynamics. Thus far, techniques towards complete classifications have required the analyticity of the activation function, notably excising the important case of ReLU. Here, in contrast, we exploit the non-differentiability of the ReLU activation to provide a complete classification of the symmetries in the shallow case.

analysis.tldr: 利用ReLU的非可微性，完整分类了浅层ReLU网络的参数空间对称性。
analysis.research_motivation: 神经网络参数空间对称性影响优化动力学，但现有分类方法依赖激活函数解析性，无法处理ReLU。
analysis.problem: 缺乏对浅层ReLU网络参数空间对称性的完整分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: ReLU的非可微性虽常被视为难点，但可被利用来推导对称性结构。
analysis.main_method: 通过分析ReLU激活函数的非可微性，对浅层网络参数空间进行对称性分类。
analysis.key_experiments: 未明确提及实验，主要提供理论分类结果。
analysis.contributions: 首次完整分类了浅层ReLU网络的参数空间对称性，填补了理论空白。
analysis.limitations: 仅针对浅层网络，未扩展到深层架构。

papers.title: From Weights to Activations: Is Steering the Next Frontier of Adaptation?
papers.abstract: Post-training adaptation of language models is commonly achieved through parameter updates or input-based methods such as fine-tuning, parameter-efficient adaptation, and prompting. In parallel, a growing body of work modifies internal activations at inference time to influence model behavior, an approach known as steering. Despite increasing use, steering is rarely analyzed within the same conceptual framework as established adaptation methods. In this work, we argue that steering should be regarded as a form of model adaptation. We introduce a set of functional criteria for adaptation methods and use them to compare steering approaches with classical alternatives. This analysis positions steering as a distinct adaptation paradigm based on targeted interventions in activation space, enabling local and reversible behavioral change without parameter updates. The resulting framing clarifies how steering relates to existing methods, motivating a unified taxonomy for model adaptation.

analysis.tldr: 本文提出将推理时激活干预（steering）视为一种模型适应方法，并与传统微调等方法进行系统比较。
analysis.research_motivation: 尽管steering方法被广泛使用，但很少在统一的适应框架下与传统方法进行比较分析。
analysis.problem: 缺乏将steering视为模型适应方法的统一理论框架和比较标准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Steering通过修改内部激活实现局部、可逆的行为改变，无需参数更新，与传统适应方法在机制上存在本质差异。
analysis.main_method: 定义一组适应方法的功能性标准，并基于此比较steering与经典适应方法（如微调、提示工程）。
analysis.key_experiments: 未明确提及具体实验，主要进行概念分析和框架构建。
analysis.contributions: 将steering定位为一种独特的适应范式，提出统一的模型适应分类法。
analysis.limitations: 缺乏实证实验验证，分析主要基于理论框架。

papers.title: Dual-Enhancement Product Bundling: Bridging Interactive Graph and Large Language Model
papers.abstract: Product bundling boosts e-commerce revenue by recommending complementary item combinations. However, existing methods face two critical challenges: (1) collaborative filtering approaches struggle with cold-start items owing to dependency on historical interactions, and (2) LLMs lack inherent capability to model interactive graph directly. To bridge this gap, we propose a dual-enhancement method that integrates interactive graph learning and LLM-based semantic understanding for product bundling. Our method introduces a graph-to-text paradigm, which leverages a Dynamic Concept Binding Mechanism (DCBM) to translate graph structures into natural language prompts. The DCBM plays a critical role in aligning domain-specific entities with LLM tokenization, enabling effective comprehension of combinatorial constraints. Experiments on three benchmarks (POG, POG_dense, Steam) demonstrate 6.3%-26.5% improvements over state-of-the-art baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出双增强方法，结合交互图与LLM，通过动态概念绑定机制提升产品捆绑推荐性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有产品捆绑方法依赖历史交互，冷启动困难，且LLM无法直接建模交互图。
analysis.problem: 如何融合交互图学习与LLM语义理解，解决冷启动和组合约束问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 交互图能捕捉协同过滤信号，LLM擅长语义理解，但两者存在模态鸿沟。
analysis.main_method: 提出图到文本范式，利用动态概念绑定机制将图结构转化为LLM可理解的提示。
analysis.key_experiments: 在POG、POG_dense、Steam三个基准上，相比SOTA提升6.3%-26.5%。
analysis.contributions: 首次将交互图与LLM有效结合用于产品捆绑，提出DCBM对齐领域实体与LLM分词。
analysis.limitations: 依赖LLM推理效率，可能在大规模实时场景中受限。

papers.title: Continual Learning for fMRI-Based Brain Disorder Diagnosis via Functional Connectivity Matrices Generative Replay
papers.abstract: Functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) is widely used for studying and diagnosing brain disorders, with functional connectivity (FC) matrices providing powerful representations of large-scale neural interactions. However, existing diagnostic models are trained either on a single site or under full multi-site access, making them unsuitable for real-world scenarios where clinical data arrive sequentially from different institutions. This results in limited generalization and severe catastrophic forgetting. This paper presents the first continual learning framework specifically designed for fMRI-based diagnosis across heterogeneous clinical sites. Our framework introduces a structure-aware variational autoencoder that synthesizes realistic FC matrices for both patient and control groups. Built on this generative backbone, we develop a multi-level knowledge distillation strategy that aligns predictions and graph representations between new-site data and replayed samples. To further enhance efficiency, we incorporate a hierarchical contextual bandit scheme for adaptive replay sampling. Experiments on multi-site datasets for major depressive disorder (MDD), schizophrenia (SZ), and autism spectrum disorder (ASD) show that the proposed generative model enhances data augmentation quality, and the overall continual learning framework substantially outperforms existing methods in mitigating catastrophic forgetting. Our code is available at https://github.com/4me808/FORGE.

analysis.tldr: 首个针对fMRI脑疾病诊断的持续学习框架，通过生成式回放和知识蒸馏缓解灾难性遗忘。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有fMRI诊断模型依赖单站点或全多站点数据，无法适应临床数据顺序到达的真实场景。
analysis.problem: 多站点顺序学习导致模型泛化性差和严重灾难性遗忘。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同临床站点的fMRI数据存在分布差异，直接顺序训练会覆盖旧知识。
analysis.main_method: 提出结构感知VAE生成真实FC矩阵，结合多级知识蒸馏和分层上下文bandit自适应回放采样。
analysis.key_experiments: 在MDD、SZ、ASD多站点数据集上验证，生成模型提升数据增强质量，持续学习框架显著优于现有方法。
analysis.contributions: 首个针对fMRI诊断的持续学习框架；结构感知生成式回放；自适应采样策略。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论生成样本的临床可解释性；计算开销可能较大。

papers.title: Stochastic Trust-Region Methods for Over-parameterized Models
papers.abstract: Under interpolation-type assumptions such as the strong growth condition, stochastic optimization methods can attain convergence rates comparable to full-batch methods, but their performance, particularly for SGD, remains highly sensitive to step-size selection. To address this issue, we propose a unified stochastic trust-region framework that eliminates manual step-size tuning and extends naturally to equality-constrained problems. For unconstrained optimization, we develop a first-order stochastic trust-region algorithm and show that, under the strong growth condition, it achieves an iteration and stochastic first-order oracle complexity of $O(\varepsilon^{-2} \log(1/\varepsilon))$ for finding an $\varepsilon$-stationary point. For equality-constrained problems, we introduce a quadratic-penalty-based stochastic trust-region method with penalty parameter $\mu$, and establish an iteration and oracle complexity of $O(\varepsilon^{-4} \log(1/\varepsilon))$ to reach an $\varepsilon$-stationary point of the penalized problem, corresponding to an $O(\varepsilon)$-approximate KKT point of the original constrained problem. Numerical experiments on deep neural network training and orthogonally constrained subspace fitting demonstrate that the proposed methods achieve performance comparable to well-tuned stochastic baselines, while exhibiting stable optimization behavior and effectively handling hard constraints without manual learning-rate scheduling.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一随机信赖域框架，消除手动调步长，在过参数化模型下达到与全批量方法相当的收敛率。
analysis.research_motivation: 随机优化方法在插值假设下可达到快速收敛，但SGD等方法的步长选择高度敏感，需要手动调参。
analysis.problem: 解决随机优化中步长手动调参的敏感性问题，并扩展到等式约束问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在强增长条件下，随机方法可媲美全批量方法，但步长选择严重影响性能，信赖域方法能自动调整步长。
analysis.main_method: 提出一阶随机信赖域算法（无约束）和基于二次惩罚的随机信赖域方法（等式约束），利用信赖域半径自动控制步长。
analysis.key_experiments: 在深度神经网络训练和正交约束子空间拟合上验证，与调优的随机基线性能相当，且无需学习率调度。
analysis.contributions: 统一框架消除步长调参，理论证明无约束和约束问题的复杂度，实验展示稳定优化和硬约束处理能力。
analysis.limitations: 依赖强增长条件假设，可能不适用于非插值场景；复杂度分析限于一阶方法。

papers.title: Parameter Importance is Not Static: Evolving Parameter Isolation for Supervised Fine-Tuning
papers.abstract: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) of large language models often suffers from task interference and catastrophic forgetting. Recent approaches alleviate this issue by isolating task-critical parameters during training. However, these methods represent a static solution to a dynamic problem, assuming that parameter importance remains fixed once identified. In this work, we empirically demonstrate that parameter importance exhibits temporal drift over the course of training. To address this, we propose Evolving Parameter Isolation (EPI), a fine-tuning framework that adapts isolation decisions based on online estimates of parameter importance. Instead of freezing a fixed subset of parameters, EPI periodically updates isolation masks using gradient-based signals, enabling the model to protect emerging task-critical parameters while releasing outdated ones to recover plasticity. Experiments on diverse multi-task benchmarks demonstrate that EPI consistently reduces interference and forgetting compared to static isolation and standard fine-tuning, while improving overall generalization. Our analysis highlights the necessity of synchronizing isolation mechanisms with the evolving dynamics of learning diverse abilities.

analysis.tldr: 提出演化参数隔离（EPI）方法，动态调整参数重要性，解决大模型微调中的任务干扰和灾难性遗忘问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有参数隔离方法假设参数重要性固定不变，但实际训练中重要性会随时间漂移，需要动态适应。
analysis.problem: 大模型监督微调中，静态参数隔离无法应对参数重要性的动态变化，导致任务干扰和灾难性遗忘。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现参数重要性在训练过程中存在时间漂移，即早期重要的参数后期可能不再关键，反之亦然。
analysis.main_method: 提出EPI框架，基于梯度信号在线估计参数重要性，定期更新隔离掩码，保护新出现的关键参数并释放过时参数以恢复可塑性。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多种多任务基准上对比静态隔离和标准微调，EPI持续减少干扰和遗忘，并提升泛化能力。
analysis.contributions: 首次揭示参数重要性的动态特性，提出演化参数隔离方法，有效缓解任务干扰和遗忘。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论隔离掩码更新频率的自动选择机制，可能增加计算开销。

papers.title: Provably Efficient Offline-to-Online Value Adaptation with General Function Approximation
papers.abstract: We study value adaptation in offline-to-online reinforcement learning under general function approximation. Starting from an imperfect offline pretrained $Q$-function, the learner aims to adapt it to the target environment using only a limited amount of online interaction. We first characterize the difficulty of this setting by establishing a minimax lower bound, showing that even when the pretrained $Q$-function is close to optimal $Q^\star$, online adaptation can be no more efficient than pure online RL on certain hard instances. On the positive side, under a novel structural condition on the offline-pretrained value functions, we propose O2O-LSVI, an adaptation algorithm with problem-dependent sample complexity that provably improves over pure online RL. Finally, we complement our theory with neural-network experiments that demonstrate the practical effectiveness of the proposed method.

analysis.tldr: 研究离线到在线强化学习中值函数适应问题，提出在一般函数近似下可证明高效的算法O2O-LSVI。
analysis.research_motivation: 离线预训练的值函数在在线环境中需要适应，但现有理论缺乏对适应效率的刻画。
analysis.problem: 如何利用有限在线交互，将不完美的离线预训练Q函数高效适应到目标环境。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 即使预训练Q函数接近最优，在线适应在某些困难实例上可能不比纯在线RL更高效。
analysis.main_method: 提出O2O-LSVI算法，基于离线预训练值函数的新结构条件，实现问题依赖的样本复杂度。
analysis.key_experiments: 在神经网络实验中验证了所提方法的实际有效性。
analysis.contributions: 建立了离线到在线适应的极小化下界，并提出了可证明改进的算法。
analysis.limitations: 结构条件可能限制适用性，且实验规模较小。

papers.title: BOAT: Navigating the Sea of In Silico Predictors for Antibody Design via Multi-Objective Bayesian Optimization
papers.abstract: Antibody lead optimization is inherently a multi-objective challenge in drug discovery. Achieving a balance between different drug-like properties is crucial for the development of viable candidates, and this search becomes exponentially challenging as desired properties grow. The ever-growing zoo of sophisticated in silico tools for predicting antibody properties calls for an efficient joint optimization procedure to overcome resource-intensive sequential filtering pipelines. We present BOAT, a versatile Bayesian optimization framework for multi-property antibody engineering. Our `plug-and-play' framework couples uncertainty-aware surrogate modeling with a genetic algorithm to jointly optimize various predicted antibody traits while enabling efficient exploration of sequence space. Through systematic benchmarking against genetic algorithms and newer generative learning approaches, we demonstrate competitive performance with state-of-the-art methods for multi-objective protein optimization. We identify clear regimes where surrogate-driven optimization outperforms expensive generative approaches and establish practical limits imposed by sequence dimensionality and oracle costs.

analysis.tldr: 提出BOAT框架，用贝叶斯优化联合优化抗体多性质，平衡药物特性与序列探索。
analysis.research_motivation: 抗体先导优化是多目标挑战，现有预测工具多但缺乏高效联合优化方法。
analysis.problem: 如何高效联合优化多个抗体药物特性，避免资源密集的串行过滤流程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 抗体性质优化随目标数量增加呈指数级困难，且序列空间探索成本高。
analysis.main_method: 结合不确定性感知的代理模型与遗传算法，实现多目标贝叶斯优化。
analysis.key_experiments: 与遗传算法和生成式学习方法系统对比，在多项蛋白质优化任务上达到SOTA性能。
analysis.contributions: 提出即插即用的多目标优化框架，明确代理驱动优化优于生成式方法的场景。
analysis.limitations: 受序列维度和预测模型计算成本限制，大规模应用需进一步验证。

papers.title: PRiMeFlow: Capturing Complex Expression Heterogeneity in Perturbation Response Modelling
papers.abstract: Predicting the effects of perturbations in-silico on cell state can identify drivers of cell behavior at scale and accelerate drug discovery. However, modeling challenges remain due to the inherent heterogeneity of single cell gene expression and the complex, latent gene dependencies. Here, we present PRiMeFlow, an end-to-end flow matching based approach to directly model the effects of genetic and small molecule perturbations in the gene expression space. The distribution-fitting approach taken by PRiMeFlow enables it to accurately approximate the empirical distribution of single-cell gene expression, which we demonstrate through extensive benchmarking inside PerturBench. Through ablation studies, we also validate important model design choices such as operating in gene expression space and parameterizing the velocity field with a U-Net architecture. The PRiMeFlow architecture was used as the basis for the model that won the Generalist Prize in the first ARC Virtual Cell Challenge.

analysis.tldr: PRiMeFlow 是一种基于流匹配的方法，用于建模基因和药物扰动对单细胞基因表达的影响，在 PerturBench 基准测试中表现优异。
analysis.research_motivation: 单细胞基因表达存在固有异质性和复杂基因依赖关系，现有方法难以准确建模扰动效应，阻碍了药物发现。
analysis.problem: 如何准确预测遗传和药物扰动对单细胞基因表达分布的影响，并捕捉表达异质性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单细胞基因表达数据呈现高度异质性，且扰动效应涉及复杂的潜在基因依赖关系，传统点估计方法无法拟合完整分布。
analysis.main_method: 采用端到端流匹配方法，直接在基因表达空间中建模扰动效应，并使用 U-Net 架构参数化速度场。
analysis.key_experiments: 在 PerturBench 上进行广泛基准测试，并通过消融实验验证了在基因表达空间操作和使用 U-Net 架构的设计选择。
analysis.contributions: 提出了 PRiMeFlow 这一流匹配框架，能准确逼近单细胞基因表达的经验分布，并在 ARC Virtual Cell Challenge 中获得 Generalist Prize。
analysis.limitations: 论文未明确讨论模型对大规模扰动数据的可扩展性及计算效率，可能受限于流匹配方法的训练复杂度。

papers.title: Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Methane Sorption: Cross-Gas Transfer Learning, Ensemble Collapse Under Physics Constraints, and Monte Carlo Dropout Uncertainty Quantification
papers.abstract: Accurate methane sorption prediction across heterogeneous coal ranks requires models that combine thermodynamic consistency, efficient knowledge transfer across data-scarce geological systems, and calibrated uncertainty estimates, capabilities that are rarely addressed together in existing frameworks. We present a physics-informed transfer learning framework that adapts a hydrogen sorption PINN to methane sorption prediction via Elastic Weight Consolidation, coal-specific feature engineering, and a three-phase curriculum that progressively balances transfer preservation with thermodynamic fine-tuning. Trained on 993 equilibrium measurements from 114 independent coal experiments spanning lignite to anthracite, the framework achieves R2 = 0.932 on held-out coal samples, a 227% improvement over pressure-only classical isotherms, while hydrogen pre-training delivers 18.9% lower RMSE and 19.4% faster convergence than random initialization. Five Bayesian uncertainty quantification approaches reveal a systematic divergence in performance across physics-constrained architectures. Monte Carlo Dropout achieves well-calibrated uncertainty at minimal overhead, while deep ensembles, regardless of architectural diversity or initialization strategy, exhibit performance degradation because shared physics constraints narrow the admissible solution manifold. SHAP and ALE analyses confirm that learned representations remain physically interpretable and aligned with established coal sorption mechanisms: moisture-volatile interactions are most influential, pressure-temperature coupling captures thermodynamic co-dependence, and features exhibit non-monotonic effects. These results identify Monte Carlo Dropout as the best-performing UQ method in this physics-constrained transfer learning framework, and demonstrate cross-gas transfer learning as a data-efficient strategy for geological material modeling.

analysis.tldr: 提出物理信息迁移学习框架，利用氢吸附PINN预测甲烷吸附，结合弹性权重巩固和蒙特卡洛Dropout不确定性量化，在煤样上R²达0.932。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有模型难以同时满足热力学一致性、跨地质系统知识迁移和校准的不确定性估计，亟需统一框架。
analysis.problem: 解决非均质煤阶中甲烷吸附预测的数据稀缺、物理一致性及不确定性量化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 物理约束下深度集成方法因共享约束缩小解空间而性能退化，蒙特卡洛Dropout则保持良好校准。
analysis.main_method: 采用弹性权重巩固的迁移学习，从氢吸附PINN迁移至甲烷吸附，结合三阶段课程学习与煤特征工程。
analysis.key_experiments: 基于114组煤实验的993个平衡数据，R²=0.932，比经典等温线提升227%，氢预训练降低RMSE 18.9%。
analysis.contributions: 首次实现跨气体迁移学习用于地质材料建模，并识别蒙特卡洛Dropout为物理约束框架下最优不确定性量化方法。
analysis.limitations: 仅针对甲烷吸附，未验证其他气体或更复杂地质系统；依赖氢吸附数据可用性。

papers.title: Unsupervised domain transfer: Overcoming signal degradation in sleep monitoring by increasing scoring realism
papers.abstract: Objective: Investigate whether hypnogram 'realism' can be used to guide an unsupervised method for handling arbitrary types of signal degradation in mobile sleep monitoring. Approach: Combining a pretrained, state-of-the-art 'u-sleep' model with a 'discriminator' network, we align features from a target domain with a feature space learned during pretraining. To test the approach, we distort the source domain with realistic signal degradations, to see how well the method can adapt to different types of degradation. We compare the performance of the resulting model with best-case models designed in a supervised manner for each type of transfer. Main Results: Depending on the type of distortion, we find that the unsupervised approach can increase Cohen's kappa with as little as 0.03 and up to 0.29, and that for all transfers, the method does not decrease performance. However, the approach never quite reaches the estimated theoretical optimal performance, and when tested on a real-life domain mismatch between two sleep studies, the benefit was insignificant. Significance: 'Discriminator-guided fine tuning' is an interesting approach to handling signal degradation for 'in the wild' sleep monitoring, with some promise. In particular, what it says about sleep data in general is interesting. However, more development will be necessary before using it 'in production'.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无监督域迁移方法，利用判别器引导微调，提升移动睡眠监测中信号退化下的评分真实性。
analysis.research_motivation: 移动睡眠监测常面临信号退化问题，现有监督方法需大量标注，而无监督方法性能不足，需探索更实用的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖标注数据的情况下，使睡眠分期模型适应任意类型的信号退化，并保持评分真实性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 信号退化导致模型特征偏移，但通过判别器对齐目标域与预训练特征空间，可部分恢复性能，且不会降低原始表现。
analysis.main_method: 结合预训练的u-sleep模型与判别器网络，通过对抗训练对齐目标域特征与源域特征空间，实现无监督域适应。
analysis.key_experiments: 在模拟信号退化（如噪声、伪影）和真实跨研究域迁移上测试，与监督最优模型对比，Cohen's kappa提升0.03-0.29。
analysis.contributions: 首次将判别器引导微调用于睡眠监测信号退化，证明无监督方法可有效提升评分真实性，且不损害原有性能。
analysis.limitations: 在真实域迁移中收益不显著，且未达到理论最优性能，需进一步开发才能投入实际应用。

papers.title: Quantum Machine Learning for Colorectal Cancer Data: Anastomotic Leak Classification and Risk Factors
papers.abstract: This study evaluates colorectal risk factors and compares classical models against Quantum Neural Networks (QNNs) for anastomotic leak prediction. Analyzing clinical data with 14\% leak prevalence, we tested ZZFeatureMap encodings with RealAmplitudes and EfficientSU2 ansatze under simulated noise. $F_\beta$-optimized quantum configurations yielded significantly higher sensitivity (83.3\%) than classical baselines (66.7\%). This demonstrates that quantum feature spaces better prioritize minority class identification, which is critical for low-prevalence clinical risk prediction. Our work explores various optimizers under noisy conditions, highlighting key trade-offs and future directions for hardware deployment.

analysis.tldr: 研究量子神经网络在结直肠癌吻合口漏预测中优于经典模型，噪声下灵敏度达83.3%。
analysis.research_motivation: 吻合口漏是结直肠癌术后严重并发症，现有经典模型对低发病率事件的预测灵敏度不足，需探索量子机器学习提升少数类识别能力。
analysis.problem: 解决低发病率（14%）吻合口漏预测中经典模型灵敏度低、难以准确识别高风险患者的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 量子特征空间能更有效区分少数类样本，在噪声环境下量子配置的灵敏度显著高于经典基线（83.3% vs 66.7%）。
analysis.main_method: 使用ZZFeatureMap编码结合RealAmplitudes和EfficientSU2两种量子神经网络结构，在模拟噪声下进行Fβ优化训练。
analysis.key_experiments: 基于临床数据（14%漏发生率），对比经典模型与量子模型性能，测试不同优化器在噪声条件下的表现。
analysis.contributions: 首次系统评估量子神经网络在吻合口漏预测中的优势，证明量子特征空间对低发病率临床风险预测的有效性。
analysis.limitations: 仅使用模拟噪声环境，未在真实量子硬件上验证；数据集规模较小，可能影响泛化性。

papers.title: Causal Drawbridges: Characterizing Gradient Blocking of Syntactic Islands in Transformer LMs
papers.abstract: We show how causal interventions in Transformer models provide insights into English syntax by focusing on a long-standing challenge for syntactic theory: syntactic islands. Extraction from coordinated verb phrases is often degraded, yet acceptability varies gradiently with lexical content (e.g., "I know what he hates art and loves" vs. "I know what he looked down and saw"). We show that modern Transformer language models replicate human judgments across this gradient. Using causal interventions that isolate functionally relevant subspaces in Transformer blocks, attention modules, and MLPs, we demonstrate that extraction from coordination islands engages the same filler-gap mechanisms as canonical wh-dependencies, but that these mechanisms are selectively blocked to varying degrees. By projecting a large corpus of unrelated text onto these causally identified subspaces, we derive a novel linguistic hypothesis: the conjunction "and" is represented differently in extractable versus non-extractable constructions, corresponding to expressions encoding relational dependencies versus purely conjunctive uses. These results illustrate how mechanistic interpretability can inform syntax, generating new hypotheses about linguistic representation and processing.

analysis.tldr: 通过因果干预发现Transformer语言模型复现了英语句法岛提取的梯度可接受性，并揭示了连词“and”在不同构式中的表征差异。
analysis.research_motivation: 句法岛是句法理论的长期挑战，但Transformer模型如何表征这些约束尚不清楚，研究旨在通过机械可解释性桥接计算模型与语言学理论。
analysis.problem: 解决从并列动词短语中提取成分时，人类可接受性判断的梯度变化如何被Transformer模型复现及其背后的因果机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型复现了人类对并列岛提取的梯度判断，且提取机制与标准wh-依赖共享相同的填充-空位机制，但该机制被选择性阻断。
analysis.main_method: 对Transformer块、注意力模块和MLP进行因果干预，隔离功能相关子空间，并通过无关文本投影推导语言假设。
analysis.key_experiments: 在梯度可接受性数据集上比较模型与人类判断，并通过因果干预验证填充-空位机制的参与程度。
analysis.contributions: 首次用因果干预揭示Transformer中句法岛约束的机械实现，并生成关于连词“and”表征差异的新语言学假设。
analysis.limitations: 仅分析特定语言（英语）和特定构式（并列岛），未探索其他句法岛类型或跨语言泛化。

papers.title: Unsupervised Anomaly Detection in Process-Complex Industrial Time Series: A Real-World Case Study
papers.abstract: Industrial time-series data from real production environments exhibits substantially higher complexity than commonly used benchmark datasets, primarily due to heterogeneous, multi-stage operational processes. As a result, anomaly detection methods validated under simplified conditions often fail to generalize to industrial settings. This work presents an empirical study on a unique dataset collected from fully operational industrial machinery, explicitly capturing pronounced process-induced variability. We evaluate which model classes are capable of capturing this complexity, starting with a classical Isolation Forest baseline and extending to multiple autoencoder architectures. Experimental results show that Isolation Forest is insufficient for modeling the non-periodic, multi-scale dynamics present in the data, whereas autoencoders consistently perform better. Among them, temporal convolutional autoencoders achieve the most robust performance, while recurrent and variational variants require more careful tuning.

analysis.tldr: 工业时序数据因多阶段流程复杂性高，自编码器优于孤立森林，时间卷积自编码器表现最稳健。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有异常检测方法在简化基准上有效，但难以泛化到真实工业环境，需研究能处理流程复杂性的模型。
analysis.problem: 真实工业时序数据具有异质、多阶段操作流程导致的复杂变异性，现有方法无法有效建模。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 工业数据呈现非周期、多尺度动态特性，孤立森林无法捕捉，而自编码器能更好适应这种复杂性。
analysis.main_method: 对比孤立森林与多种自编码器架构（包括时间卷积、循环和变分变体）在真实工业数据集上的性能。
analysis.key_experiments: 在完全运行工业机械采集的独特数据集上评估，时间卷积自编码器表现最稳健，循环和变分变体需精细调参。
analysis.contributions: 揭示了流程复杂工业时序数据的特性，并验证了自编码器（尤其时间卷积）在异常检测中的有效性。
analysis.limitations: 仅基于单一工业数据集，未探讨模型在不同工业场景的泛化性；未深入分析流程阶段对检测的影响。

papers.title: Drowsiness-Aware Adaptive Autonomous Braking System based on Deep Reinforcement Learning for Enhanced Road Safety
papers.abstract: Driver drowsiness significantly impairs the ability to accurately judge safe braking distances and is estimated to contribute to 10%-20% of road accidents in Europe. Traditional driver-assistance systems lack adaptability to real-time physiological states such as drowsiness. This paper proposes a deep reinforcement learning-based autonomous braking system that integrates vehicle dynamics with driver physiological data. Drowsiness is detected from ECG signals using a Recurrent Neural Network (RNN), selected through an extensive benchmark analysis of 2-minute windows with varying segmentation and overlap configurations. The inferred drowsiness state is incorporated into the observable state space of a Double-Dueling Deep Q-Network (DQN) agent, where driver impairment is modeled as an action delay. The system is implemented and evaluated in a high-fidelity CARLA simulation environment. Experimental results show that the proposed agent achieves a 99.99% success rate in avoiding collisions under both drowsy and non-drowsy conditions. These findings demonstrate the effectiveness of physiology-aware control strategies for enhancing adaptive and intelligent driving safety systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于深度强化学习的自适应制动系统，整合驾驶员生理数据，在模拟中实现99.99%的碰撞避免率。
analysis.research_motivation: 驾驶员困倦导致10%-20%的欧洲交通事故，传统辅助系统无法适应实时生理状态。
analysis.problem: 现有制动系统缺乏对驾驶员困倦状态的动态适应能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 困倦会显著损害驾驶员对安全制动距离的判断能力。
analysis.main_method: 使用RNN从ECG信号检测困倦状态，并将其作为Double-Dueling DQN智能体的状态空间输入，困倦建模为动作延迟。
analysis.key_experiments: 在CARLA高保真模拟环境中评估，困倦和非困倦条件下均达到99.99%的碰撞避免成功率。
analysis.contributions: 首次将生理感知的困倦状态集成到深度强化学习制动系统中，显著提升安全性。
analysis.limitations: 仅在模拟环境中验证，未在真实车辆或复杂交通场景中测试。

papers.title: Nested Fourier-enhanced neural operator for efficient modeling of radiation transfer in fires
papers.abstract: Computational fluid dynamics (CFD) has become an essential tool for predicting fire behavior, yet maintaining both efficiency and accuracy remains challenging. A major source of computational cost in fire simulations is the modeling of radiation transfer, which is usually the dominant heat transfer mechanism in fires. Solving the high-dimensional radiative transfer equation (RTE) with traditional numerical methods can be a performance bottleneck. Here, we present a machine learning framework based on Fourier-enhanced multiple-input neural operators (Fourier-MIONet) as an efficient alternative to direct numerical integration of the RTE. We first investigate the performance of neural operator architectures for a small-scale 2D pool fire and find that Fourier-MIONet provides the most accurate radiative solution predictions. The approach is then extended to 3D CFD fire simulations, where the computational mesh is locally refined across multiple levels. In these high-resolution settings, monolithic surrogate models for direct field-to-field mapping become difficult to train and computationally inefficient. To address this issue, a nested Fourier-MIONet is proposed to predict radiation solutions across multiple mesh-refinement levels. We validate the approach on 3D McCaffrey pool fires simulated with FireFOAM, including fixed fire sizes and a unified model trained over a continuous range of heat release rates (HRRs). The proposed method achieves global relative errors of 2-4% for 3D varying-HRR scenarios while providing faster inference than the estimated cost of one finite-volume radiation solve in FireFOAM for the 16-solid-angle case. With fast and accurate inference, the surrogate makes higher-fidelity radiation treatments practical and enables the incorporation of more spectrally resolved radiation models into CFD fire simulations for engineering applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出嵌套傅里叶增强神经算子（Nested Fourier-MIONet），高效替代火灾模拟中的辐射传输方程求解，实现2-4%误差且推理速度更快。
analysis.research_motivation: 火灾CFD模拟中辐射传输计算是性能瓶颈，传统数值方法求解高维RTE效率低，亟需高效替代方案。
analysis.problem: 高分辨率3D火灾模拟中，直接场到场映射的单一代理模型难以训练且计算低效。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 辐射传热是火灾中的主导传热机制，其高维RTE求解在多层局部细化网格上计算成本极高。
analysis.main_method: 提出嵌套Fourier-MIONet，在不同网格细化层级上预测辐射解，实现多层级场映射。
analysis.key_experiments: 在FireFOAM模拟的3D McCaffrey池火中验证，包括固定火源和连续热释放率范围，全局相对误差2-4%。
analysis.contributions: 首次将神经算子用于火灾辐射建模，嵌套结构解决多层级网格映射难题，推理速度优于传统辐射求解。
analysis.limitations: 仅针对特定池火场景验证，未考虑复杂几何或湍流辐射耦合；嵌套结构可能增加训练复杂度。

papers.title: Sandpile Economics: Theory, Identification, and Evidence
papers.abstract: Why do capitalist economies recurrently generate crises whose severity is disproportionate to the size of the triggering shock? This paper proposes a structural answer grounded in the evolutionary geometry of production networks. As economies evolve through specialization, integration, and competitive selection, their inter-sectoral linkages drift toward configurations of increasing geometric fragility, eventually crossing a threshold beyond which small disturbances generate disproportionately large cascades. We introduce Sandpile Economics, a formal framework that interprets macroeconomic instability as an emergent property of disequilibrium production networks. The key state variable is the Forman--Ricci curvature of the input--output graph, capturing local substitution possibilities when supply chains are disrupted. We show that when curvature falls below an endogenous threshold, the distribution of cascade sizes follows a power law with tail index $\alpha \in (1,2)$, implying a regime of unbounded amplification. The underlying mechanism is evolutionary: specialization reduces input substitutability, pushing the economy toward criticality, while crisis episodes induce endogenous network reconfiguration and path dependence. These dynamics are inherently non-ergodic and cannot be captured by representative-agent frameworks. Empirically, using global input--output data, we document that production networks operate in persistently negative curvature regimes and that curvature robustly predicts medium-run output dynamics. A one-standard-deviation increase in curvature is associated with higher cumulative growth over three-year horizons, and curvature systematically outperforms standard network metrics in explaining cross-country differences in resilience.

analysis.tldr: 提出沙堆经济学，用生产网络的几何脆弱性解释资本主义经济危机的小冲击大影响现象。
analysis.research_motivation: 资本主义经济频繁产生与触发冲击规模不成比例的严重危机，现有理论难以解释这一现象。
analysis.problem: 如何从生产网络结构角度解释经济危机的放大机制和临界性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 经济演化导致生产网络趋向几何脆弱性，当曲率低于阈值时，小扰动引发幂律分布的大规模级联。
analysis.main_method: 引入Forman-Ricci曲率作为关键状态变量，结合演化机制和输入-输出图分析网络临界性。
analysis.key_experiments: 使用全球输入-输出数据，验证生产网络处于持续负曲率状态，曲率稳健预测中期产出动态。
analysis.contributions: 提出沙堆经济学框架，将宏观经济不稳定视为非均衡生产网络的涌现属性，并实证曲率优于传统网络指标。
analysis.limitations: 模型依赖特定几何假设，实证数据覆盖范围和因果识别有待进一步验证。

papers.title: MolCryst-MLIPs: A Machine-Learned Interatomic Potentials Database for Molecular Crystals
papers.abstract: We present an open Molecular Crystal (MC) database of Machine-Learned Interatomic Potentials (MLIP) called MolCryst-MLIPs. The first release comprises fine-tuned MACE models for nine molecular crystal systems -- Benzamide, Benzoic acid, Coumarin, Durene, Isonicotinamide, Niacinamide, Nicotinamide, Pyrazinamide, and Resorcinol -- developed using the Automated Machine Learning Pipeline (AMLP), which streamlines the entire MLIP development workflow, from reference data generation to model training and validation, into a reproducible and user-friendly pipeline. Models are fine-tuned from the MACE-MH-1 foundation model (omol head), yielding a mean energy MAE of 0.141 kJ/mol/atom and a mean force MAE of 0.648 kJ/mol/Angstrom across all systems. Dynamical stability and structural integrity, as assessed through energy conservation, P2 orientational order parameters, and radial distribution functions, are evaluated using molecular dynamics simulations. The released models and datasets constitute a growing open database of validated MLIPs, ready for production MD simulations of molecular crystal polymorphism under different thermodynamic conditions.

analysis.tldr: 构建了分子晶体机器学习原子间势数据库，基于MACE模型微调，实现高精度能量和力预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 分子晶体多晶型模拟需要高精度且计算高效的原子间势，传统方法难以兼顾。
analysis.problem: 缺乏开放、标准化且经过验证的分子晶体机器学习原子间势数据库。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: MACE-MH-1基础模型微调后，在9种分子晶体上能量MAE仅0.141 kJ/mol/atom，力MAE 0.648 kJ/mol/Å，精度显著。
analysis.main_method: 利用自动化机器学习流水线（AMLP），从参考数据生成到模型训练验证全流程自动化，微调MACE-MH-1基础模型。
analysis.key_experiments: 对9种分子晶体进行分子动力学模拟，通过能量守恒、P2序参数和径向分布函数评估动力学稳定性和结构完整性。
analysis.contributions: 首个开放、可复现的分子晶体MLIP数据库，提供即用型模型，支持多晶型模拟。
analysis.limitations: 仅覆盖9种晶体，泛化性有限；依赖MACE-MH-1基础模型，可能受其偏差影响。

papers.title: DiPO: Disentangled Perplexity Policy Optimization for Fine-grained Exploration-Exploitation Trade-Off
papers.abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has catalyzed significant advances in the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs). However, effectively managing the exploration and exploitation trade-off remains a critical challenge. In this paper, we fully analyze the exploration and exploitation dilemma of extremely hard and easy samples during the training and propose a new fine-grained trade-off mechanism. Concretely, we introduce a perplexity space disentangling strategy that divides the sample space into distinct exploration (high perplexity) and exploitation (low perplexity) subspaces, thereby mining fine-grained samples requiring exploration-exploitation trade-off. Subsequently, we propose a bidirectional reward allocation mechanism with a minimum impact on verification rewards to implement perplexity-guided exploration and exploitation, enabling more stable policy optimization. Finally, we have evaluated our method on two mainstream tasks: mathematical reasoning and function calling, and experimental results demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method, confirming its effectiveness in enhancing LLM performance by fine-grained exploration-exploitation trade-off.

analysis.tldr: 提出DiPO方法，通过困惑度空间解耦和双向奖励分配，实现细粒度的探索-利用权衡，提升大模型推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RLVR方法在训练中难以有效管理探索与利用的权衡，尤其是对极难和极易样本的处理。
analysis.problem: 如何在大语言模型强化学习中实现细粒度的探索-利用权衡，以优化策略稳定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高困惑度样本需要探索，低困惑度样本需要利用，但现有方法无法区分并分别处理。
analysis.main_method: 提出困惑度空间解耦策略，将样本空间分为探索和利用子空间，并设计双向奖励分配机制，最小化对验证奖励的影响。
analysis.key_experiments: 在数学推理和函数调用两个主流任务上评估，实验结果表明方法优于基线。
analysis.contributions: 首次提出基于困惑度的细粒度探索-利用权衡机制，并验证其在多种任务上的有效性。
analysis.limitations: 未讨论困惑度阈值选择对性能的影响，以及方法在更大规模模型上的泛化性。

papers.title: Simulation-Based Optimisation of Batting Order and Bowling Plans in T20 Cricket
papers.abstract: This paper develops a unified Markov Decision Process (MDP) framework for optimising two recurring in-match decisions in T20 cricket, namely batting order selection and bowling plan assignment, directly in terms of win and defend probability rather than expected runs. A three-phase player profile engine (Powerplay, Middle, Death) with James-Stein shrinkage (a technique that blends a player's individual statistics toward the league average when their phase-specific data is sparse) is estimated from 1,161 IPL ball-by-ball records (2008-2025). Win/defend probabilities are evaluated using vectorised Monte Carlo simulation over N = 50,000 innings trajectories. Batting orders are evaluated by comparing all feasible arrangements of the remaining players and selecting the one that maximises win probability. Bowling plans are optimised through a guided search over possible over assignments, progressively improving the allocation while respecting constraints such as the prohibition on consecutive overs by the same bowler. Applied to two 2026 IPL matches, the optimal batting order improves Mumbai Indians' win probability by 4.1 percentage points (52.4% to 56.5%), and the optimal Gujarat Titans bowling plan improves defend probability by 5.2 percentage points (39.1% to 44.3%). In both cases, the observed sub-optimality is consistent with phase-agnostic deployment: decisions that appear reasonable under aggregate metrics are shown to be costly when phase-specific profiles are applied.

analysis.tldr: 用MDP框架优化T20板球击球顺序和投球计划，基于胜率而非预期得分，提升胜率4-5个百分点。
analysis.research_motivation: T20板球中击球顺序和投球计划等实时决策缺乏基于胜率的优化方法，现有方法多依赖预期得分。
analysis.problem: 如何直接优化T20板球中的击球顺序和投球计划以最大化胜率或防守概率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基于阶段平均统计的决策看似合理，但阶段特定表现差异导致次优结果，如Mumbai Indians和Gujarat Titans的案例所示。
analysis.main_method: 构建三阶段球员能力模型（Powerplay/Middle/Death）结合James-Stein收缩，通过向量化蒙特卡洛模拟评估胜率，并搜索最优击球顺序和投球分配。
analysis.key_experiments: 使用2008-2025年1161场IPL球-by-球数据，在2026年两场比赛中验证：击球顺序优化提升胜率4.1%，投球计划提升防守概率5.2%。
